645 | | } catch {} 646 | | } 647 | | } 648 | | 649 | | /*////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 650 | | GLOBAL 651 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/ 652 | | 653 | | /// @custom:property PANO-SYS-008 The Collateral Tracker's internal accounting always shows it has less than or equal to its true balance of the underlying token 654 | * | function invariant_never_overcount_underlying_token() public { 655 | * | (uint256 ct0_s_poolAssets, , ) = collToken0.getPoolData(); 656 | * | assertWithMsg( 657 | * | ct0_s_poolAssets <= IERC20(collToken0.asset()).balanceOf(address(panopticPool)) + 1, 658 | | "CollateralTracker0 has overcounted its token0 assets" 659 | | ); 660 | | 661 | * | (uint256 ct1_s_poolAssets, , ) = collToken1.getPoolData(); 662 | * | assertWithMsg( 663 | * | ct1_s_poolAssets <= IERC20(collToken1.asset()).balanceOf(address(panopticPool)) + 1, 664 | | "CollateralTracker1 has overcounted its token1 assets" 665 | | ); 666 | | } 667 | | 668 | | /// @custom:property PANO-SYS-011 The pool can never have a utilisation over 100% 669 | * | function invariant_never_allow_pool_utilisation_over_100p() public { 670 | * | (, , int256 collToken0PU) = collToken0.getPoolData(); 671 | * | assertWithMsg( 672 | * | collToken0PU <= 10000, 673 | | "collToken0 pool utilisation exceeded 10k bps <=> 100%" 674 | | ); 675 | | 676 | * | (, , int256 collToken1PU) = collToken1.getPoolData(); 677 | * | assertWithMsg( 678 | * | collToken1PU <= 10000, 679 | | "collToken1 pool utilisation exceeded 10k bps <=> 100%" 680 | | ); 681 | | } 682 | | 683 | | /// @custom:property PANO-SYS-012 Users can't deposit more than the maximum allowed amount, 2^104 684 | * | function invariant_never_allow_overdeposit( 685 | | address receiver, 686 | | uint256 tooLargeDepositAmount, 687 | | bool depositToSelf 688 | | ) public { 689 | * | _attempt_overdeposit(true, msg.sender, receiver, tooLargeDepositAmount, depositToSelf); 690 | | _attempt_overdeposit(false, msg.sender, receiver, tooLargeDepositAmount, depositToSelf); 691 | | } 692 | | 693 | * | function _attempt_overdeposit( 694 | | bool isToken0, 695 | | address depositor, 696 | | address receiver, 697 | | uint256 tooLargeDepositAmount, 698 | | bool depositToSelf 699 | | ) internal { 700 | * | CollateralTracker collToken = isToken0 ? collToken0 : collToken1; 701 | * | uint256 maxDeposit = type(uint104).max; 702 | * | tooLargeDepositAmount = bound(tooLargeDepositAmount, maxDeposit + 1, type(uint256).max); 703 | | 704 | * | if (depositToSelf) { 705 | * | receiver = depositor; 706 | | } 707 | | 708 | * | uint256 depositorBalance = IERC20(collToken.asset()).balanceOf(depositor); 709 | * | uint256 shortfallForDeposit = tooLargeDepositAmount - depositorBalance; 710 | * | isToken0 711 | * | ? deal_USDC(depositor, shortfallForDeposit) 712 | | : deal_WETH(depositor, shortfallForDeposit); 713 | | hevm.prank(depositor); 714 | | IERC20(collToken.asset()).approve(address(collToken), type(uint256).max); 715 | | 716 | | hevm.prank(depositor); 717 | | try collToken.deposit(tooLargeDepositAmount, receiver) { 718 | | assertWithMsg(false, "Deposit over maximum allowed did not revert"); 719 | | } catch { 720 | | emit LogString( 721 | | "Invariant succeeded, likely because we enforced the max deposit amount correctly" 722 | | ); 723 | | } 724 | | } 725 | | 726 | | /// @custom:property PANO-SYS-013 Users can't mint more than the maximum allowed amount, 2^104 727 | * | function invariant_never_allow_overmint( 728 | | address minter, 729 | | address receiver, 730 | | uint256 tooLargeMintAmount, 731 | | bool mintToSelf 732 | | ) public { 733 | * | _attempt_overmint(true, minter, receiver, tooLargeMintAmount, mintToSelf); 734 | | _attempt_overmint(false, minter, receiver, tooLargeMintAmount, mintToSelf); 735 | | } 736 | | 737 | * | function _attempt_overmint( 738 | | bool isToken0, 739 | | address minter, 740 | | address receiver, 741 | | uint256 tooLargeMintAmount, 742 | | bool mintToSelf 743 | | ) internal { 744 | * | CollateralTracker collToken = isToken0 ? collToken0 : collToken1; 745 | * | uint256 maxMint = collToken.previewDeposit(type(uint104).max); 746 | * | tooLargeMintAmount = bound(tooLargeMintAmount, maxMint + 1, type(uint256).max); 747 | | 748 | * | if (mintToSelf) { 749 | * | receiver = minter; 750 | | } 751 | | 752 | * | uint256 minterBalance = IERC20(collToken.asset()).balanceOf(minter); 753 | *r | uint256 shortfallForMint = collToken.previewDeposit(tooLargeMintAmount) - minterBalance; 754 | * | isToken0 ? deal_USDC(minter, shortfallForMint) : deal_WETH(minter, shortfallForMint); 755 | | 756 | | hevm.prank(minter); 757 | | IERC20(collToken.asset()).approve(address(collToken), type(uint256).max); 758 | | hevm.prank(minter); 759 | | try collToken.mint(tooLargeMintAmount, receiver) { 760 | | assertWithMsg(false, "Mint over maximum allowed did not revert"); 761 | | } catch { 762 | | emit LogString( 763 | | "Invariant succeeded, likely because we enforced the max mint amount correctly" 764 | | ); 765 | | } 766 | | } 767 | | 768 | | /// @custom:property PANO-SYS-014 Users can't deposit/mint more than their balance 769 | * | function invariant_no_mint_nor_deposit_over_balance( 770 | | address receiver, 771 | | uint256 amountOver, 772 | | bool viaMint 773 | | ) public { 774 | * | _attempt_deposit_over_balance(collToken0, msg.sender, receiver, amountOver, viaMint); 775 | * | _attempt_deposit_over_balance(collToken1, msg.sender, receiver, amountOver, viaMint); 776 | | } 777 | | 778 | * | function _attempt_deposit_over_balance( 779 | | CollateralTracker collToken, 780 | | address depositor, 781 | | address receiver, 782 | | uint256 amountOver, 783 | | bool viaMint 784 | | ) internal { 785 | * | uint256 depositorBalance = IERC20(collToken.asset()).balanceOf(depositor); 786 | * | amountOver = bound(amountOver, 1, type(uint256).max - depositorBalance); 787 | * | uint256 tooLargeAmount = depositorBalance + amountOver; 788 | *r | uint256 tooLargeShares = collToken.convertToShares(tooLargeAmount); 789 | | 790 | * | hevm.prank(depositor); 791 | * | if (viaMint) { 792 | * | try collToken.mint(tooLargeShares, receiver) { 793 | | assertWithMsg( 794 | | false, 795 | | "User minted an amount of shares greater than their balance of the asset" 796 | | ); 797 | | } catch {} 798 | | } else { 799 | * | try collToken.deposit(tooLargeAmount, receiver) { 800 | | assertWithMsg( 801 | | false, 802 | | "User deposited an amount greater than their balance of the asset" 803 | | ); 804 | | } catch {} 805 | | } 806 | | } 807 | | 808 | | function _withdraw_with_open_positions_and_check( 809 | | CollateralTracker collToken, 810 | | uint256 assetsToWithdraw, 811 | | address withdrawer, 812 | | bool isToken0 813 | | ) internal { 814 | | // check whether current positions are solvent; revert if not 815 | | TokenId[] memory withdrawersOpenPositions = userPositions[withdrawer]; 816 | | 817 | | panopticPool.validateCollateralWithdrawable(withdrawer, withdrawersOpenPositions); 818 | | 819 | | // attempt withdrawal, and assert assets & shares were deducted/incremented appropriately 820 | | uint256 withdrawerAssetsBefore = IERC20(collToken.asset()).balanceOf(withdrawer); 821 | | uint256 poolAssetsBefore = IERC20(collToken.asset()).balanceOf(address(panopticPool)); 822 | | uint256 withdrawerSharesBefore = collToken.balanceOf(withdrawer); 823 | | 824 | | // Bound the fuzzed assets-to-withdraw to max assets withdrawable: 825 | | // the smaller of the s_poolAssets and the user's assets in the CT 826 | | assetsToWithdraw = bound( 827 | | assetsToWithdraw, 828 | | 1, 829 | | _max_assets_withdrawable(collToken, withdrawerSharesBefore) 830 | | ); 831 | | // Figure out how many shares we expect to see burnt: 832 | | uint256 expectedSharesBurnt = collToken.previewWithdraw(assetsToWithdraw); 833 | | 834 | | hevm.prank(withdrawer); 835 | | 836 | | try collToken.withdraw(assetsToWithdraw, withdrawer, withdrawer, withdrawersOpenPositions) { 837 | | // assert assets & shares were deducted/incremented appropriately: 838 | | uint256 poolAssetsAfter = IERC20(collToken.asset()).balanceOf(address(panopticPool)); 839 | | uint256 withdrawerAssetsAfter = IERC20(collToken.asset()).balanceOf(withdrawer); 840 | | uint256 withdrawerSharesAfter = collToken.balanceOf(withdrawer); 841 | | assertWithMsg( 842 | | poolAssetsBefore - poolAssetsAfter == assetsToWithdraw, 843 | | "Pool asset balance incorrect after withdrawal" 844 | | ); 845 | | assertWithMsg( 846 | | withdrawerAssetsAfter - withdrawerAssetsBefore == assetsToWithdraw, 847 | | "User balance incorrect after deposit" 848 | | ); 849 | | assertWithMsg( 850 | | withdrawerSharesBefore - withdrawerSharesAfter == expectedSharesBurnt, 851 | | "User share balance incorrect after withdrawal" 852 | | ); 853 | | 854 | | // show we are still solvent: 855 | | try 856 | | panopticPool.validateCollateralWithdrawable(withdrawer, withdrawersOpenPositions) 857 | | {} catch { 858 | | assertWithMsg( 859 | | false, 860 | | "User not solvent after seemingly legal withdrawal-with-open-positions" 861 | | ); 862 | | } 863 | | } catch { 864 | | // if .withdraw reverted for some unknown reason, we failed an invariant, but if we just 865 | | // reverted because the withdrawal causes insolvency everything is fine: 866 | | assertWithMsg( 867 | | _does_withdrawal_cause_insolvency( 868 | | withdrawer, 869 | | withdrawersOpenPositions, 870 | | assetsToWithdraw, 871 | | isToken0 872 | | ), 873 | | "Withdrawal reverted for reason other than causing insolvency" 874 | | ); 875 | | } 876 | | } 877 | | 878 | * | function _max_assets_withdrawable( 879 | | CollateralTracker collToken, 880 | | uint256 withdrawerSharesBefore 881 | * | ) internal view returns (uint256 maxAssetsWithdrawable) { 882 | * | (uint256 ct_s_poolAssets, , ) = collToken.getPoolData(); 883 | * | uint256 withdrawersAssetsInCT = collToken.convertToAssets(withdrawerSharesBefore); 884 | * | maxAssetsWithdrawable = ct_s_poolAssets - 1 < withdrawersAssetsInCT 885 | | ? ct_s_poolAssets - 1 886 | * | : withdrawersAssetsInCT; 887 | | } 888 | | 889 | | function _does_withdrawal_cause_insolvency( 890 | | address withdrawer, 891 | | TokenId[] memory withdrawersOpenPositions, 892 | | uint256 assetsToWithdraw, 893 | | bool isToken0 894 | | ) internal returns (bool withdrawalCausesInsolvency) { 895 | | (, int24 currentTick, uint16 observationIndex, uint16 observationCardinality, , , ) = pool 896 | | .slot0(); 897 | | 898 | | (int24 fastOracleTick, ) = PanopticMath.computeMedianObservedPrice( 899 | | pool, 900 | | observationIndex, 901 | | observationCardinality, 902 | | FAST_ORACLE_CARDINALITY, 903 | | FAST_ORACLE_PERIOD 904 | | ); 905 | | 906 | | // s_miniMedian, an internal var in the PanopticPool, can be found in storage slot 1: 907 | | uint256 miniMedian = uint256(hevm.load(address(panopticPool), bytes32(uint256(1)))); 908 | | (int24 slowOracleTick, ) = PanopticMath.computeInternalMedian( 909 | | observationIndex, 910 | | observationCardinality, 911 | | MEDIAN_PERIOD, 912 | | miniMedian, 913 | | pool 914 | | ); 915 | | 916 | | withdrawalCausesInsolvency = !_checkSolvencyAtTickForPossibleWithdrawal( 917 | | withdrawer, 918 | | withdrawersOpenPositions, 919 | | currentTick, 920 | | fastOracleTick, 921 | | BP_DECREASE_BUFFER, 922 | | assetsToWithdraw, 923 | | isToken0 924 | | ); 925 | | 926 | | // If one of the ticks is too stale, we fall back to the more conservative tick, i.e, the user must be solvent at both the fast and slow oracle ticks. 927 | | withdrawalCausesInsolvency = 928 | | withdrawalCausesInsolvency || 929 | | ((Math.abs(int256(fastOracleTick) - slowOracleTick) > MAX_SLOW_FAST_DELTA) && 930 | | !_checkSolvencyAtTickForPossibleWithdrawal( 931 | | withdrawer, 932 | | withdrawersOpenPositions, 933 | | currentTick, 934 | | slowOracleTick, 935 | | BP_DECREASE_BUFFER, 936 | | assetsToWithdraw, 937 | | isToken0 938 | | )); 939 | | } 940 | | 941 | | function _checkSolvencyAtTickForPossibleWithdrawal( 942 | | address account, 943 | | TokenId[] memory positionIdList, 944 | | int24 currentTick, 945 | | int24 atTick, 946 | | uint256 buffer, 947 | | uint256 amountWithdrawn, 948 | | bool isToken0 949 | | ) internal returns (bool) { 950 | | (int128 premium0, int128 premium1, uint256[2][] memory positionBalanceArray) = panopticPool 951 | | .calculateAccumulatedFeesBatch(account, ONLY_AVAILABLE_PREMIUM, positionIdList); 952 | | 953 | | LeftRightUnsigned tokenData0 = collToken0.getAccountMarginDetails( 954 | | account, 955 | | atTick, 956 | | positionBalanceArray, 957 | | premium0 958 | | ); 959 | | LeftRightUnsigned tokenData1 = collToken1.getAccountMarginDetails( 960 | | account, 961 | | atTick, 962 | | positionBalanceArray, 963 | | premium1 964 | | ); 965 | | 966 | | (uint256 balanceCross, uint256 thresholdCross) = _getSolvencyBalances( 967 | | tokenData0, 968 | | tokenData1, 969 | | Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick(atTick), 970 | | amountWithdrawn, 971 | | isToken0 972 | | ); 973 | | 974 | | // compare balance and required tokens, can use unsafe div because denominator is always nonzero 975 | | unchecked { 976 | | return balanceCross >= Math.unsafeDivRoundingUp(thresholdCross * buffer, 10_000); 977 | | } 978 | | } 979 | | } 980 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/fuzz/echidna/EchidnaWrapper.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: UNLICENSED 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.12; 3 | | 4 | | import "./FuzzHelpers.sol"; 5 | | import {PanopticPoolActions} from "./PanopticPoolActions.sol"; 6 | | import {Pointer} from "@types/Pointer.sol"; 7 | | 8 | | // container that inherits all the actions contracts for the system and does necessary deployment/setup for a pool 9 | | // FuzzHelpers -> GeneralActions -> SFPMActions -> CollateralTrackerActions -> PanopticPoolActions -> EchidnaWrapper 10 | *r | contract EchidnaWrapper is PanopticPoolActions { 11 | | constructor() { 12 | | // Actors 13 | | // We have 5 actors 14 | | // The addresses need to be the same than in the echidna.yaml 15 | | // See sender: ["0xa11ce", "0xb0b", "0xcafe", "0xda210", "0xedda"] 16 | | actors = new address[](5); 17 | | actors[0] = address(0xa11ce); 18 | | actors[1] = address(0xb0b); 19 | | actors[2] = address(0xcafe); 20 | | actors[3] = address(0xda210); 21 | | actors[4] = address(0xedda); 22 | | 23 | | pool_manipulator = address(0xfaded); 24 | | 25 | | for (uint i = 0; i < actors.length; i++) { 26 | | userPositions[actors[i]] = new TokenId[](0); 27 | | } 28 | | 29 | | userPositions[pool_manipulator] = new TokenId[](0); 30 | | 31 | | univ3factory = IUniswapV3Factory(deployer.factory()); 32 | | emit LogAddress("UniV3 Factory", address(univ3factory)); 33 | | 34 | | sfpm = new SemiFungiblePositionManager(univ3factory); 35 | | emit LogAddress("Panoptic SFPM", address(sfpm)); 36 | | 37 | | panopticHelper = new PanopticHelper(sfpm); 38 | | emit LogAddress("Panoptic Helper", address(panopticHelper)); 39 | | 40 | | // Import the Panoptic Pool reference (for cloning) 41 | | poolReference = address(new PanopticPoolWrapper(sfpm)); 42 | | emit LogAddress("Panoptic Pool reference", address(poolReference)); 43 | | 44 | | // Import the Collateral Tracker reference (for cloning) 45 | | collateralReference = address( 46 | | new CollateralTracker(10, 2_000, 1_000, -1_024, 5_000, 9_000, 20_000) 47 | | ); 48 | | emit LogAddress("Panoptic Collateral reference", address(collateralReference)); 49 | | 50 | | panopticFactory = new PanopticFactory( 51 | | address(WETH), 52 | | sfpm, 53 | | univ3factory, 54 | | poolReference, 55 | | collateralReference, 56 | | new bytes32[](0), 57 | | new uint256[][](0), 58 | | new Pointer[][](0) 59 | | ); 60 | | emit LogAddress("Panoptic Factory", address(panopticFactory)); 61 | | 62 | | swapperc = new SwapperC(); 63 | | emit LogAddress("Panoptic Swapper", address(swapperc)); 64 | | 65 | | emit LogAddress("USDC Token", address(USDC)); 66 | | emit LogAddress("WETH Token", address(WETH)); 67 | | emit LogAddress("USDC/WETH 5 pool", address(USDC_WETH_5)); 68 | | emit LogAddress("UniV3 router", address(router)); 69 | | 70 | | initialize(); 71 | | 72 | | deal_USDC(pool_manipulator, 1000000000 ether); 73 | | deal_WETH(pool_manipulator, 1000000 ether); 74 | | hevm.prank(pool_manipulator); 75 | | IERC20(USDC).approve(address(pool), type(uint256).max); 76 | | hevm.prank(pool_manipulator); 77 | | IERC20(WETH).approve(address(pool), type(uint256).max); 78 | | hevm.prank(pool_manipulator); 79 | | IERC20(USDC).approve(address(swapperc), type(uint256).max); 80 | | hevm.prank(pool_manipulator); 81 | | IERC20(WETH).approve(address(swapperc), type(uint256).max); 82 | | 83 | | for (uint i = 0; i < 100; i++) { 84 | | _perform_swap_with_delay( 85 | | uint160(uint256(bytes32(keccak256(abi.encode(1, i))))), 86 | | uint256(bytes32(keccak256(abi.encode(i)))) 87 | | ); 88 | | } 89 | | } 90 | | 91 | | function initialize() internal { 92 | | // initalize current pool we are deploying 93 | | pool = USDC_WETH_5; 94 | | poolFee = pool.fee(); 95 | | poolTickSpacing = pool.tickSpacing(); 96 | | 97 | | assert(pool.token0() == address(USDC)); 98 | | assert(pool.token1() == address(WETH)); 99 | | 100 | | // give test contract a sufficient amount of tokens to deploy a new pool 101 | | deal_USDC(address(this), 10000000 ether); 102 | | deal_WETH(address(this), 10000 ether); 103 | | 104 | | // Check: Make sure the correct balance is set to the contract 105 | | assert(USDC.balanceOf(address(this)) == 10000000 ether); 106 | | assert(WETH.balanceOf(address(this)) == 10000 ether); 107 | | 108 | | // approve factory to move tokens, on behalf of the test contract 109 | | USDC.approve(address(panopticFactory), type(uint256).max); 110 | | WETH.approve(address(panopticFactory), type(uint256).max); 111 | | 112 | | // approve sfpm to move tokens, on behalf of the test contract 113 | | USDC.approve(address(sfpm), type(uint256).max); 114 | | WETH.approve(address(sfpm), type(uint256).max); 115 | | 116 | | // approve self 117 | | USDC.approve(address(this), type(uint256).max); 118 | | WETH.approve(address(this), type(uint256).max); 119 | | 120 | | (currentSqrtPriceX96, currentTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 121 | | 122 | | sfpm.initializeAMMPool(pool.token0(), pool.token1(), poolFee); 123 | | poolId = sfpm.getPoolId(address(pool)); 124 | | 125 | | panopticPool = PanopticPoolWrapper( 126 | | address( 127 | | panopticFactory.deployNewPool( 128 | | pool.token0(), 129 | | pool.token1(), 130 | | poolFee, 131 | | uint96(0), 132 | | type(uint256).max, 133 | | type(uint256).max 134 | | ) 135 | | ) 136 | | ); 137 | | 138 | | collToken0 = panopticPool.collateralToken0(); 139 | | collToken1 = panopticPool.collateralToken1(); 140 | | 141 | | hevm.prank(address(collToken0)); 142 | | IERC20(collToken0.asset()).approve(address(pool), type(uint256).max); 143 | | hevm.prank(address(collToken0)); 144 | | IERC20(collToken1.asset()).approve(address(pool), type(uint256).max); 145 | | 146 | | hevm.prank(address(collToken1)); 147 | | IERC20(collToken0.asset()).approve(address(pool), type(uint256).max); 148 | | hevm.prank(address(collToken1)); 149 | | IERC20(collToken1.asset()).approve(address(pool), type(uint256).max); 150 | | } 151 | | } 152 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/fuzz/echidna/FuzzHelpers.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: UNLICENSED 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.12; 3 | | 4 | | import {IUniswapV3Pool} from "univ3-core/interfaces/IUniswapV3Pool.sol"; 5 | | import {ISwapRouter} from "v3-periphery/interfaces/ISwapRouter.sol"; 6 | | import {IERC20} from "openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol"; 7 | | import {PropertiesAsserts} from "./PropertiesHelper.sol"; 8 | | import {IUniDeployer} from "./fuzz-mocks/IUniDeployer.sol"; 9 | | import {IUniSwapRouterDeployer} from "./fuzz-mocks/IUniSwapRouterDeployer.sol"; 10 | | import {IERC20} from "openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol"; 11 | | 12 | | import {CollateralTracker} from "@contracts/CollateralTracker.sol"; 13 | | import {PanopticPool} from "@contracts/PanopticPool.sol"; 14 | | import {SemiFungiblePositionManager} from "@contracts/SemiFungiblePositionManager.sol"; 15 | | import {PanopticFactory} from "@contracts/PanopticFactory.sol"; 16 | | import {PanopticHelper} from "@periphery/PanopticHelper.sol"; 17 | | import {IUniswapV3Factory} from "univ3-core/interfaces/IUniswapV3Factory.sol"; 18 | | import {IUniswapV3Pool} from "univ3-core/interfaces/IUniswapV3Pool.sol"; 19 | | import {TokenId} from "@types/TokenId.sol"; 20 | | import {LiquidityChunk} from "@types/LiquidityChunk.sol"; 21 | | import {LiquidityAmounts} from "v3-periphery/libraries/LiquidityAmounts.sol"; 22 | | import {LeftRightUnsigned, LeftRightSigned} from "@types/LeftRight.sol"; 23 | | import {PanopticMath} from "@libraries/PanopticMath.sol"; 24 | | import {TickMath} from "v3-core/libraries/TickMath.sol"; 25 | | import {CallbackLib} from "@libraries/CallbackLib.sol"; 26 | | import {Math} from "@libraries/Math.sol"; 27 | | import {SafeTransferLib} from "@libraries/SafeTransferLib.sol"; 28 | | import {Constants} from "@libraries/Constants.sol"; 29 | | import {Errors} from "@libraries/Errors.sol"; 30 | | 31 | | interface IHevm { 32 | | function warp(uint256 newTimestamp) external; 33 | | 34 | | function roll(uint256 newNumber) external; 35 | | 36 | | function load(address where, bytes32 slot) external returns (bytes32); 37 | | 38 | | function store(address where, bytes32 slot, bytes32 value) external; 39 | | 40 | | function sign( 41 | | uint256 privateKey, 42 | | bytes32 digest 43 | | ) external returns (uint8 r, bytes32 v, bytes32 s); 44 | | 45 | | function addr(uint256 privateKey) external returns (address add); 46 | | 47 | | function ffi(string[] calldata inputs) external returns (bytes memory result); 48 | | 49 | | function prank(address newSender) external; 50 | | 51 | | function createFork(string calldata urlOrAlias) external returns (uint256); 52 | | 53 | | function selectFork(uint256 forkId) external; 54 | | 55 | | function activeFork() external returns (uint256); 56 | | 57 | | function label(address addr, string calldata label) external; 58 | | } 59 | | 60 | | // Copy of test/foundry/core/Misc.t.sol:SwapperC 61 | * | contract SwapperC { 62 | | event LogUint256(string, uint256); 63 | | 64 | * | function uniswapV3SwapCallback( 65 | | int256 amount0Delta, 66 | | int256 amount1Delta, 67 | | bytes calldata data 68 | * | ) external { 69 | | // Decode the swap callback data, checks that the UniswapV3Pool has the correct address. 70 | * | CallbackLib.CallbackData memory decoded = abi.decode(data, (CallbackLib.CallbackData)); 71 | | 72 | | // Extract the address of the token to be sent (amount0 -> token0, amount1 -> token1) 73 | * | address token = amount0Delta > 0 74 | * | ? address(decoded.poolFeatures.token0) 75 | * | : address(decoded.poolFeatures.token1); 76 | | 77 | | // Transform the amount to pay to uint256 (take positive one from amount0 and amount1) 78 | | // the pool will always pass one delta with a positive sign and one with a negative sign or zero, 79 | | // so this logic always picks the correct delta to pay 80 | * | uint256 amountToPay = amount0Delta > 0 ? uint256(amount0Delta) : uint256(amount1Delta); 81 | | 82 | | // Pay the required token from the payer to the caller of this contract 83 | * | SafeTransferLib.safeTransferFrom(token, decoded.payer, msg.sender, amountToPay); 84 | | } 85 | | 86 | | function uniswapV3MintCallback( 87 | | uint256 amount0Owed, 88 | | uint256 amount1Owed, 89 | | bytes calldata data 90 | | ) external { 91 | | // Decode the mint callback data 92 | | CallbackLib.CallbackData memory decoded = abi.decode(data, (CallbackLib.CallbackData)); 93 | | 94 | | // Sends the amount0Owed and amount1Owed quantities provided 95 | | if (amount0Owed > 0) 96 | | SafeTransferLib.safeTransferFrom( 97 | | decoded.poolFeatures.token0, 98 | | decoded.payer, 99 | | msg.sender, 100 | | amount0Owed 101 | | ); 102 | | if (amount1Owed > 0) 103 | | SafeTransferLib.safeTransferFrom( 104 | | decoded.poolFeatures.token1, 105 | | decoded.payer, 106 | | msg.sender, 107 | | amount1Owed 108 | | ); 109 | | } 110 | | 111 | | function mint(IUniswapV3Pool pool, int24 tickLower, int24 tickUpper, uint128 liquidity) public { 112 | | pool.mint( 113 | | address(this), 114 | | tickLower, 115 | | tickUpper, 116 | | liquidity, 117 | | abi.encode( 118 | | CallbackLib.CallbackData({ 119 | | poolFeatures: CallbackLib.PoolFeatures({ 120 | | token0: pool.token0(), 121 | | token1: pool.token1(), 122 | | fee: pool.fee() 123 | | }), 124 | | payer: msg.sender 125 | | }) 126 | | ) 127 | | ); 128 | | } 129 | | 130 | * | function burn(IUniswapV3Pool pool, int24 tickLower, int24 tickUpper, uint128 liquidity) public { 131 | | pool.burn(tickLower, tickUpper, liquidity); 132 | | } 133 | | 134 | * | function swapTo(IUniswapV3Pool pool, uint160 sqrtPriceX96) public { 135 | * | (uint160 sqrtPriceX96Before, , , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 136 | | 137 | * | if (sqrtPriceX96Before == sqrtPriceX96) return; 138 | | 139 | * | emit LogUint256("price before", sqrtPriceX96Before); 140 | * | emit LogUint256("price target", sqrtPriceX96); 141 | | 142 | * | pool.swap( 143 | * | msg.sender, 144 | * | sqrtPriceX96Before > sqrtPriceX96 ? true : false, 145 | * | sqrtPriceX96Before > sqrtPriceX96 146 | * | ? int256(IERC20(pool.token0()).balanceOf(msg.sender)) 147 | * | : int256(IERC20(pool.token1()).balanceOf(msg.sender)), 148 | * | sqrtPriceX96, 149 | * | abi.encode( 150 | * | CallbackLib.CallbackData({ 151 | * | poolFeatures: CallbackLib.PoolFeatures({ 152 | * | token0: pool.token0(), 153 | * | token1: pool.token1(), 154 | * | fee: pool.fee() 155 | | }), 156 | * | payer: msg.sender 157 | | }) 158 | | ) 159 | | ); 160 | | } 161 | | } 162 | | 163 | * | contract PanopticPoolWrapper is PanopticPool { 164 | | /// @notice get the positions hash of an account 165 | | /// @param user the account to get the positions hash of 166 | | /// @return _positionsHash positions hash of the account 167 | | function positionsHash(address user) external view returns (uint248 _positionsHash) { 168 | | _positionsHash = uint248(s_positionsHash[user]); 169 | | } 170 | | 171 | * | function miniMedian() external view returns (uint256) { 172 | | return s_miniMedian; 173 | | } 174 | | 175 | | function settledTokens(bytes32 chunk) external view returns (LeftRightUnsigned) { 176 | | return s_settledTokens[chunk]; 177 | | } 178 | | 179 | | function calculateAccumulatedPremia( 180 | | address user, 181 | | bool computeAllPremia, 182 | | bool includePendingPremium, 183 | | TokenId[] calldata positionIdList 184 | | ) external view returns (int128 premium0, int128 premium1, uint256[2][] memory) { 185 | | // Get the current tick of the Uniswap pool 186 | | (, int24 currentTick, , , , , ) = s_univ3pool.slot0(); 187 | | 188 | | // Compute the accumulated premia for all tokenId in positionIdList (includes short+long premium) 189 | | (LeftRightSigned premia, uint256[2][] memory balances) = _calculateAccumulatedPremia( 190 | | user, 191 | | positionIdList, 192 | | computeAllPremia, 193 | | includePendingPremium, 194 | | currentTick 195 | | ); 196 | | 197 | | // Return the premia as (token0, token1) 198 | | return (premia.rightSlot(), premia.leftSlot(), balances); 199 | | } 200 | | 201 | | // return premiaByLeg 202 | | function burnAllOptionsFrom( 203 | | TokenId[] calldata positionIdList, 204 | | int24 tickLimitLow, 205 | | int24 tickLimitHigh 206 | | ) external returns (LeftRightSigned[4][] memory, LeftRightSigned) { 207 | | ( 208 | | LeftRightSigned netExchanged, 209 | | LeftRightSigned[4][] memory premiasByLeg 210 | | ) = _burnAllOptionsFrom( 211 | | msg.sender, 212 | | tickLimitLow, 213 | | tickLimitHigh, 214 | | COMMIT_LONG_SETTLED, 215 | | positionIdList 216 | | ); 217 | | 218 | | return (premiasByLeg, netExchanged); 219 | | } 220 | | 221 | | function premiaSettlementData( 222 | | TokenId tokenId, 223 | | uint256 leg 224 | | ) public view returns (uint128, uint128, uint128, uint128) { 225 | | bytes32 chunkKey = keccak256( 226 | | abi.encodePacked(tokenId.strike(leg), tokenId.width(leg), tokenId.tokenType(leg)) 227 | | ); 228 | | 229 | | LeftRightUnsigned settled = s_settledTokens[chunkKey]; 230 | | LeftRightUnsigned gross = s_grossPremiumLast[chunkKey]; 231 | | 232 | | return (settled.rightSlot(), settled.leftSlot(), gross.rightSlot(), gross.leftSlot()); 233 | | } 234 | | 235 | | function optionData( 236 | | TokenId tokenId, 237 | | address account, 238 | | uint256 leg 239 | | ) public view returns (uint128, uint128) { 240 | | LeftRightUnsigned legData = s_options[account][tokenId][leg]; 241 | | 242 | | return (legData.rightSlot(), legData.leftSlot()); 243 | | } 244 | | 245 | | constructor(SemiFungiblePositionManager _sfpm) PanopticPool(_sfpm) {} 246 | | } 247 | | 248 | | contract FuzzHelpers is PropertiesAsserts { 249 | | // Used for safecasting 250 | | using Math for uint256; 251 | | using Math for int256; 252 | | 253 | | error SwapSimulationResults(int256, int256, int24); 254 | | 255 | | error UniMintSimulationResults(uint256, uint256, bool); 256 | | 257 | | error UniMintAndCollectSimulationResults(uint256, uint256, uint128, uint128, bool); 258 | | 259 | | error UniBurnAndCollectSimulationResults(uint256, uint256, uint128, uint128, bool); 260 | | 261 | | error SimulationResults( 262 | | LeftRightUnsigned, 263 | | LeftRightUnsigned, 264 | | LeftRightUnsigned, 265 | | LeftRightSigned, 266 | | int256, 267 | | LeftRightSigned, 268 | | LeftRightSigned, 269 | | uint256, 270 | | int256, 271 | | bytes 272 | | ); 622 | | 623 | | mapping(address => mapping(TokenId => LeftRightUnsigned)) $userBalance; 624 | | 625 | | mapping(bytes32 chunk => LeftRightUnsigned removedAndNet) $panopticChunkLiquidity; 626 | | 627 | | ChunkWithTokenType[] touchedPanopticChunks; 628 | | 629 | * | uint256 constant MAX_DEPOSIT = 100 ether; 630 | * | uint256 constant MIN_DEPOSIT = 0.01 ether; 631 | | 632 | | BurnSimulationResults burnSimResults; 633 | | LiquidationResults liqResults; 634 | | 635 | | IHevm hevm = IHevm(0x7109709ECfa91a80626fF3989D68f67F5b1DD12D); 636 | | 637 | | //Testing uni deployment 638 | | IUniDeployer deployer = IUniDeployer(address(0xde0001)); 639 | | 640 | | IUniswapV3Pool USDC_WETH_5 = IUniswapV3Pool(deployer.pool()); 641 | | IERC20 USDC = IERC20(deployer.token0()); 642 | | IERC20 WETH = IERC20(deployer.token1()); 643 | | 644 | | ISwapRouter router = ISwapRouter(IUniSwapRouterDeployer(address(0xde0002)).sr()); 645 | | 646 | * | function bound(uint256 value, uint256 _min, uint256 _max) internal pure returns (uint256) { 647 | * | uint256 range = _max - _min + 1; 648 | * | return _min + (value % range); 649 | | } 650 | | 651 | * | function bound(int256 value, int256 _min, int256 _max) internal pure returns (int256) { 652 | * | int256 range = _max - _min + 1; 653 | * | return _min + Math.abs(value % range); 654 | | } 655 | | 656 | | function max(uint256 a, uint256 b) internal pure returns (uint256) { 657 | | return ((a >= b) ? a : b); 658 | | } 659 | | 660 | * | function min(uint256 a, uint256 b) internal pure returns (uint256) { 661 | * | return ((a <= b) ? a : b); 662 | | } 663 | | 664 | * | function abs(int256 a) internal pure returns (uint256) { 665 | | // Required or it will fail when `a = type(int256).min` 666 | * | if (a == INT256_MIN) { 667 | | return 57896044618658097711785492504343953926634992332820282019728792003956564819968; 668 | | } 669 | | 670 | * | return uint256(a > 0 ? a : -a); 671 | | } 672 | | 673 | * | function delta(uint256 a, uint256 b) internal pure returns (uint256) { 674 | * | return a > b ? a - b : b - a; 675 | | } 676 | | 677 | * | function delta(int256 a, int256 b) internal pure returns (uint256) { 678 | | // a and b are of the same sign 679 | | // this works thanks to two's complement, the left-most bit is the sign bit 680 | * | if ((a ^ b) > -1) { 681 | * | return delta(abs(a), abs(b)); 682 | | } 683 | | 684 | | // a and b are of opposite signs 685 | | return abs(a) + abs(b); 686 | | } 687 | | 688 | | function percentDelta(uint256 a, uint256 b) internal pure returns (uint256) { 689 | | uint256 absDelta = delta(a, b); 690 | | 691 | | return (absDelta * 1e18) / b; 692 | | } 693 | | 694 | * | function percentDelta(int256 a, int256 b) internal pure returns (uint256) { 695 | * | uint256 absDelta = delta(a, b); 696 | * | uint256 absB = abs(b); 697 | | 698 | * | return (absDelta * 1e18) / absB; 699 | | } 700 | | 701 | * | function assertApproxEqRel( 702 | | int256 a, 703 | | int256 b, 704 | | uint256 maxPercentDelta, // An 18 decimal fixed point number, where 1e18 == 100% 705 | | string memory err 706 | | ) internal { 707 | * | uint256 percentDelta = percentDelta(a, b); 708 | | 709 | * | if (percentDelta > maxPercentDelta) { 710 | | assertWithMsg(false, err); 711 | | } 712 | | } 713 | | 714 | | function assertApproxEqRel( 715 | | uint256 a, 716 | | uint256 b, 717 | | uint256 maxPercentDelta, // An 18 decimal fixed point number, where 1e18 == 100% 718 | | string memory err 719 | | ) internal { 720 | | uint256 percentDelta = percentDelta(a, b); 721 | | 722 | | if (percentDelta > maxPercentDelta) { 723 | | assertWithMsg(false, err); 724 | | } 725 | | } 726 | | 727 | * | function deal_USDC(address to, uint256 amt) internal { 728 | *r | deployer.mintToken(false, to, amt); 729 | | } 730 | | 731 | * | function deal_WETH(address to, uint256 amt) internal { 732 | * | deployer.mintToken(true, to, amt); 733 | | } 734 | | 735 | | function alter_USDC(address to, uint256 bal) internal { 736 | | // Balances in slot 0 737 | | uint256 slot_balances = uint256(0); 738 | | hevm.store(address(USDC), keccak256(abi.encode(address(to), slot_balances)), bytes32(bal)); 739 | | } 740 | | 741 | | function alter_WETH(address to, uint256 bal) internal { 742 | | // Balances in slot 3 (verify with "slither --print variable-order 0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2") 743 | | hevm.store(address(WETH), keccak256(abi.encode(address(to), uint256(0))), bytes32(bal)); 744 | | } 745 | | 746 | | function deal_Generic( 747 | | address token, 748 | | uint256 slot, 749 | | address to, 750 | | uint256 amt, 751 | | bool alter_supply, 752 | | uint256 supply_slot 753 | | ) internal { 754 | | uint256 slot_balances = slot; 755 | | uint256 original_balance = uint256( 756 | | hevm.load(token, keccak256(abi.encode(address(to), slot_balances))) 757 | | ); 758 | | int256 delta = int256(amt) - int256(original_balance); 759 | | hevm.store(token, keccak256(abi.encode(address(to), slot_balances)), bytes32(amt)); 760 | | 761 | | if (alter_supply) { 762 | | bytes32 slot_supply = bytes32(supply_slot); 763 | | uint256 orig_supply = uint256(hevm.load(token, slot_supply)); 764 | | uint256 new_supply = uint256(int256(orig_supply) + delta); 765 | | hevm.store(token, slot_supply, bytes32(new_supply)); 766 | | } 767 | | } 768 | | 769 | | function _get_account_margin( 770 | | address to_liquidate, 771 | | int24 tick 772 | | ) internal view returns (LeftRightUnsigned tokenData0, LeftRightUnsigned tokenData1) { 773 | | require(userPositions[to_liquidate].length > 0); 774 | | int128 premium0; 775 | | int128 premium1; 776 | | uint256[2][] memory positions; 777 | | 778 | | (premium0, premium1, positions) = panopticPool.calculateAccumulatedFeesBatch( 779 | | to_liquidate, 780 | | false, 781 | | userPositions[to_liquidate] 782 | | ); 783 | | tokenData0 = collToken0.getAccountMarginDetails(to_liquidate, tick, positions, premium0); 784 | | tokenData1 = collToken1.getAccountMarginDetails(to_liquidate, tick, positions, premium1); 785 | | } 786 | | 787 | | ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 788 | | // Calculation helpers 789 | | ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 790 | | 791 | | // given an itm0 and itm1 values return the swapped amounts and swap direction 792 | * | function _compute_swap_amounts( 793 | | int256 itm0, 794 | | int256 itm1 795 | * | ) internal returns (int256 swapAmount, bool zeroForOne) { 796 | * | if ((itm0 != 0) && (itm1 != 0)) { 797 | * | (uint160 sqrtPriceX96, , , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 798 | | 799 | * | int256 net0 = itm0 - PanopticMath.convert1to0(itm1, sqrtPriceX96); 800 | | 801 | * | zeroForOne = net0 < 0; 802 | | 803 | * | swapAmount = -net0; 804 | * | } else if (itm0 != 0) { 805 | * | zeroForOne = itm0 < 0; 806 | * | swapAmount = -itm0; 807 | | } else { 808 | * | zeroForOne = itm1 > 0; 809 | * | swapAmount = -itm1; 810 | | } 811 | | } 812 | | 813 | | function quote_uni_CollectAndBurn() internal { 814 | * | try this.uniswap_CollectAndBurn_sim() {} catch (bytes memory results) { 815 | | emit LogBytes("r", results); 816 | | assembly ("memory-safe") { 817 | | results := add(results, 0x04) 818 | | } 819 | | bool sRevert; 820 | * | ( 821 | | $amountBurned0[$activeLegIndex], 822 | * | $amountBurned1[$activeLegIndex], 823 | * | $recievedAmount0[$activeLegIndex], 824 | * | $recievedAmount1[$activeLegIndex], 825 | | sRevert 826 | | ) = abi.decode(results, (int256, int256, uint128, uint128, bool)); 827 | | 828 | * | $shouldRevertSFPM = $shouldRevertSFPM || sRevert; 829 | | } 830 | | } 831 | | 832 | * | function uniswap_CollectAndBurn_sim() external { 833 | * | int256 burned0; 834 | | int256 burned1; 835 | | 836 | * | hevm.prank(address(sfpm)); 837 | * | try pool.burn($tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive, $LiqAmountActive) returns ( 838 | | uint256 amount0, 839 | | uint256 amount1 840 | | ) { 841 | | burned0 = int256(amount0); 842 | | burned1 = int256(amount1); 843 | | } catch { 844 | * | revert UniBurnAndCollectSimulationResults(0, 0, 0, 0, true); 845 | | } 846 | | 847 | | hevm.prank(address(sfpm)); 848 | | try 849 | | pool.collect( 850 | | $activeUser, //recipient 851 | | $tickLowerActive, 852 | | $tickUpperActive, 853 | | uint128($amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] + int128(burned0)), 854 | | uint128($amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] + int128(burned1)) 855 | | ) 856 | | returns (uint128 received0, uint128 received1) { 857 | | revert UniBurnAndCollectSimulationResults( 858 | | uint256(burned0), 859 | | uint256(burned1), 860 | | received0, 861 | | received1, 862 | | false 863 | | ); 864 | | } catch { 865 | | revert UniBurnAndCollectSimulationResults(0, 0, 0, 0, true); 866 | | } 867 | | } 868 | | 869 | * | function quote_uni_CollectAndMint() internal { 870 | * | try this.uniswap_CollectAndMint_sim() {} catch (bytes memory results) { 871 | * | emit LogBytes("r", results); 872 | | assembly ("memory-safe") { 873 | * | results := add(results, 0x04) 874 | | } 875 | * | bool sRevert; 876 | | ( 877 | * | $amountMinted0[$activeLegIndex], 878 | * | $amountMinted1[$activeLegIndex], 879 | | $recievedAmount0[$activeLegIndex], 880 | | $recievedAmount1[$activeLegIndex], 881 | | sRevert 882 | * | ) = abi.decode(results, (uint256, uint256, uint128, uint128, bool)); 883 | | 884 | | $shouldRevertSFPM = $shouldRevertSFPM || sRevert; 885 | | } 886 | | } 887 | | 888 | * | function uniswap_CollectAndMint_sim() external { 889 | * | bytes memory mintdata = abi.encode( 890 | * | CallbackLib.CallbackData({ 891 | | // compute by reading values from univ3pool every time 892 | * | poolFeatures: CallbackLib.PoolFeatures({ 893 | * | token0: pool.token0(), 894 | * | token1: pool.token1(), 895 | * | fee: pool.fee() 896 | | }), 897 | * | payer: $activeUser 898 | | }) 899 | | ); 900 | | 901 | * | uint256 minted0; 902 | | uint256 minted1; 903 | | 904 | * | hevm.prank(address(sfpm)); 905 | * | try 906 | * | pool.mint( 907 | * | $activeUser, //recipient 908 | * | $tickLowerActive, 909 | * | $tickUpperActive, 910 | * | $LiqAmountActive, 911 | * | mintdata 912 | | ) 913 | | returns (uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1) { 914 | * | minted0 = amount0; 915 | | minted1 = amount1; 916 | | } catch { 917 | * | revert UniMintAndCollectSimulationResults(0, 0, 0, 0, true); 918 | | } 919 | | 920 | | // 921 | * | hevm.prank(address(sfpm)); 922 | * | try 923 | * | pool.collect( 924 | * | $activeUser, //recipient 925 | * | $tickLowerActive, 926 | * | $tickUpperActive, 927 | * | uint128($amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex]), 928 | * | uint128($amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex]) 929 | | ) 930 | | returns (uint128 received0, uint128 received1) { 931 | * | revert UniMintAndCollectSimulationResults( 932 | * | minted0, 933 | * | minted1, 934 | * | received0, 935 | * | received1, 936 | * | false 937 | | ); 938 | | } catch { 939 | | revert UniMintAndCollectSimulationResults(0, 0, 0, 0, true); 940 | | } 941 | | } 942 | | 943 | | function quote_uni_mint() internal { 944 | | try this.uniswap_mint_sim() {} catch (bytes memory results) { 945 | | emit LogBytes("r", results); 946 | | assembly ("memory-safe") { 947 | | results := add(results, 0x04) 948 | | } 949 | | bool sRevert; 950 | | ($amountMinted0[$activeLegIndex], $amountMinted1[$activeLegIndex], sRevert) = abi 951 | | .decode(results, (uint256, uint256, bool)); 952 | | 953 | | $shouldRevertSFPM = $shouldRevertSFPM || sRevert; 954 | | } 955 | | } 956 | | 957 | * | function uniswap_mint_sim() external { 958 | * | bytes memory mintdata = abi.encode( 959 | * | CallbackLib.CallbackData({ 960 | | // compute by reading values from univ3pool every time 961 | * | poolFeatures: CallbackLib.PoolFeatures({ 962 | * | token0: pool.token0(), 963 | * | token1: pool.token1(), 964 | * | fee: pool.fee() 965 | | }), 966 | * | payer: msg.sender 967 | | }) 968 | | ); 969 | | 970 | * | hevm.prank(address(sfpm)); 971 | * | try 972 | * | pool.mint( 973 | * | msg.sender, //recipient 974 | * | $tickLowerActive, 975 | * | $tickUpperActive, 976 | * | $LiqAmountActive, 977 | * | mintdata 978 | | ) 979 | | returns (uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1) { 980 | * | revert UniMintSimulationResults(amount0, amount1, false); 981 | | } catch { 982 | * | revert UniMintSimulationResults(0, 0, false); 983 | | } 984 | | } 985 | | 986 | * | function simulate_swap(address recipient, bool zeroForOne, int256 amountSpecified) external { 987 | * | hevm.prank(recipient); 988 | * | IERC20(USDC).approve(address(sfpm), type(uint256).max); 989 | * | hevm.prank(recipient); 990 | * | IERC20(WETH).approve(address(sfpm), type(uint256).max); 991 | | 992 | * | int256 swap0; 993 | | int256 swap1; 994 | | 995 | * | if (amountSpecified != 0) { 996 | * | hevm.prank(address(sfpm)); 997 | *r | (int256 amt0, int256 amt1) = pool.swap( 998 | * | recipient, 999 | * | zeroForOne, 1000 | * | amountSpecified, 1001 | * | zeroForOne 1002 | * | ? Constants.MIN_V3POOL_SQRT_RATIO + 1 1003 | * | : Constants.MAX_V3POOL_SQRT_RATIO - 1, 1004 | * | abi.encode( 1005 | * | CallbackLib.CallbackData({ 1006 | * | poolFeatures: CallbackLib.PoolFeatures({ 1007 | * | token0: token0, 1008 | * | token1: token1, 1009 | * | fee: poolFee 1010 | | }), 1011 | | payer: recipient 1012 | | }) 1013 | | ) 1014 | | ); 1015 | | 1016 | | swap0 = amt0; 1017 | | swap1 = amt1; 1018 | | } 1019 | | 1020 | | // get current tick after swap 1021 | * | (, int24 tickAfterSwap, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 1022 | | 1023 | * | revert SwapSimulationResults(swap0, swap1, tickAfterSwap); 1024 | | } 1025 | | 1026 | * | function _execute_swap_simulation( 1027 | | address recipient, 1028 | | bool zeroForOne, 1029 | | int256 amountSpecified 1030 | * | ) internal returns (int256, int256, int24) { 1031 | * | try this.simulate_swap(recipient, zeroForOne, amountSpecified) { 1032 | * | assertWithMsg(false, "swap succeeded ??"); 1033 | | } catch (bytes memory results) { 1034 | * | bytes4 selector = bytes4(results); 1035 | *r | require(selector == SwapSimulationResults.selector); 1036 | * | emit LogBytes("r", results); 1037 | | 1038 | | assembly ("memory-safe") { 1039 | * | results := add(results, 0x04) 1040 | | } 1041 | | 1042 | * | (int256 swap0, int256 swap1, int24 tickAfterSwap) = abi.decode( 1043 | * | results, 1044 | | (int256, int256, int24) 1045 | | ); 1046 | | 1047 | * | return (swap0, swap1, tickAfterSwap); 1048 | | } 1049 | | } 1050 | | 1051 | | // for multiple legs 1052 | * | function _calculate_moved_amounts( 1053 | | TokenId tokenId, 1054 | | uint128 positionSize 1055 | * | ) internal returns (int256, int256) { 1056 | | // 1057 | * | int256 moved0; 1058 | * | int256 moved1; 1059 | | 1060 | * | uint128 _positionSize = positionSize; 1061 | * | TokenId _tokenId = tokenId; 1062 | | 1063 | | // update to latest current tick 1064 | * | (, currentTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 1065 | | 1066 | | // 1067 | * | uint256 numLegs = _tokenId.countLegs(); 1068 | * | for (uint256 leg = 0; leg < numLegs; leg++) { 1069 | | //create liquidity chunk object 1070 | * | LiquidityChunk currChunk = PanopticMath.getLiquidityChunk(_tokenId, leg, _positionSize); 1071 | | 1072 | | // tick lower 1073 | * | emit LogInt256("tick lower", currChunk.tickLower()); 1074 | | // tick upper 1075 | * | emit LogInt256("tick upper", currChunk.tickUpper()); 1076 | | // amount of liquidity 1077 | * | emit LogUint256("liquidity", currChunk.liquidity()); 1078 | | // current tick 1079 | * | emit LogInt256("current tick", currentTick); 1080 | | 1081 | * | (uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1) = Math.getAmountsForLiquidity( 1082 | * | currentTick, 1083 | * | currChunk 1084 | | ); 1085 | | 1086 | | // actual moved amounts when minting rounds up (round down when burning) 1087 | | 1088 | * | if (_tokenId.isLong(leg) == 1) { 1089 | | moved0 -= int256(amount0); 1090 | | moved1 -= int256(amount1); 1091 | | } else { 1092 | * | moved0 += int256(amount0); 1093 | * | moved1 += int256(amount1); 1094 | | } 1095 | | } 1096 | | 1097 | * | return (moved0, moved1); 1098 | | } 1099 | | 1100 | * | function _calculate_itm_amounts( 1101 | | uint256 tokenType, 1102 | | int256 moved0, 1103 | | int256 moved1 1104 | * | ) internal returns (int256 itm0, int256 itm1) { 1105 | * | if (tokenType == 0) { 1106 | * | itm1 += moved1; 1107 | | } else { 1108 | | // tt = 1 1109 | * | itm0 += moved0; 1110 | | } 1111 | | } 1112 | | 1113 | * | function _calculate_moved_and_ITM_amounts( 1114 | | TokenId tokenId, 1115 | | uint128 positionSize, 1116 | | bool roundUp 1117 | * | ) internal returns (int256, int256, int256, int256) { 1118 | | // 1119 | * | int256 moved0; 1120 | * | int256 moved1; 1121 | | 1122 | | // 1123 | * | int256 itm0; 1124 | * | int256 itm1; 1125 | | 1126 | * | uint128 _positionSize = positionSize; 1127 | * | TokenId _tokenId = tokenId; 1128 | * | bool _roundUp = roundUp; 1129 | | 1130 | | // update to latest current tick 1131 | * | (, currentTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 1132 | | 1133 | | // 1134 | * | uint256 numLegs = _tokenId.countLegs(); 1135 | * | for (uint256 leg = 0; leg < numLegs; leg++) { 1136 | | //create liquidity chunk object 1137 | * | LiquidityChunk currChunk = PanopticMath.getLiquidityChunk(_tokenId, leg, _positionSize); 1138 | | 1139 | * | (uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1) = Math.getAmountsForLiquidity( 1140 | * | currentTick, 1141 | * | currChunk 1142 | | ); 1143 | | 1144 | * | if (_tokenId.isLong(leg) == 1) { 1145 | | moved0 -= int256(amount0); 1146 | | moved1 -= int256(amount1); 1147 | | } else { 1148 | * | moved0 += int256(amount0); 1149 | * | moved1 += int256(amount1); 1150 | | } 1151 | | 1152 | * | if (_tokenId.tokenType(leg) == 0) { 1153 | * | itm1 += int256(amount1); 1154 | | } else { 1155 | | // tt = 1 1156 | * | itm0 += int256(amount0); 1157 | | } 1158 | | 1159 | | // 1160 | * | emit LogUint256("_tokenId.tokenType(leg)", _tokenId.tokenType(leg)); 1161 | | 1162 | | // amounts 1163 | * | emit LogUint256("amount0", amount0); 1164 | * | emit LogUint256("amount1", amount1); 1165 | | } 1166 | | 1167 | * | return (moved0, moved1, itm0, itm1); 1168 | | } 1169 | | 1170 | * | function getPremiaDeltasChecked( 1171 | | uint256 netLiquidity, 1172 | | uint256 removedLiquidity, 1173 | | uint128 collected0, 1174 | | uint128 collected1 1175 | * | ) external returns (LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumOwed, LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumGross) { 1176 | | // premia spread equations are graphed and documented here: https://www.desmos.com/calculator/mdeqob2m04 1177 | | // explains how we get from the premium per liquidity (calculated here) to the total premia collected and the multiplier 1178 | | // as well as how the value of VEGOID affects the premia 1179 | | // note that the "base" premium is just a common factor shared between the owed (long) and gross (short) 1180 | | // premia, and is only seperated to simplify the calculation 1181 | | // (the graphed equations include this factor without separating it) 1182 | * | uint256 totalLiquidity = netLiquidity + removedLiquidity; 1183 | | 1184 | * | uint256 premium0X64_base; 1185 | * | uint256 premium1X64_base; 1186 | | 1187 | * | emit LogUint256("inside premia deltas checked removed liq", removedLiquidity); 1188 | * | emit LogUint256("inside premia deltas checked netLiq", netLiquidity); 1189 | | 1190 | | { 1191 | | // compute the base premium as collected * total / net^2 (from Eqn 3) 1192 | * | premium0X64_base = Math.mulDiv(collected0, totalLiquidity * 2 ** 64, netLiquidity ** 2); 1193 | * | premium1X64_base = Math.mulDiv(collected1, totalLiquidity * 2 ** 64, netLiquidity ** 2); 1194 | | } 1195 | | 1196 | * | { 1197 | * | uint128 premium0X64_owed; 1198 | | uint128 premium1X64_owed; 1199 | * | { 1200 | | // compute the owed premium (from Eqn 3) 1201 | * | uint256 numerator = netLiquidity + (removedLiquidity / 2 ** 2); 1202 | | 1203 | * | premium0X64_owed = Math 1204 | * | .mulDiv(premium0X64_base, numerator, totalLiquidity) 1205 | | .toUint128Capped(); 1206 | * | premium1X64_owed = Math 1207 | * | .mulDiv(premium1X64_base, numerator, totalLiquidity) 1208 | | .toUint128Capped(); 1209 | | 1210 | * | deltaPremiumOwed = LeftRightUnsigned 1211 | * | .wrap(0) 1212 | * | .toRightSlot(premium0X64_owed) 1213 | | .toLeftSlot(premium1X64_owed); 1214 | | } 1215 | | } 1216 | | 1217 | * | { 1218 | * | uint128 premium0X64_gross; 1219 | * | uint128 premium1X64_gross; 1220 | * | { 1221 | | // compute the gross premium (from Eqn 4) 1222 | * | uint256 numerator = totalLiquidity ** 2 - 1223 | * | totalLiquidity * 1224 | * | removedLiquidity + 1225 | * | ((removedLiquidity ** 2) / 2 ** (2)); 1226 | | 1227 | * | premium0X64_gross = Math 1228 | * | .mulDiv(premium0X64_base, numerator, totalLiquidity ** 2) 1229 | | .toUint128Capped(); 1230 | * | premium1X64_gross = Math 1231 | * | .mulDiv(premium1X64_base, numerator, totalLiquidity ** 2) 1232 | | .toUint128Capped(); 1233 | | 1234 | * | deltaPremiumGross = LeftRightUnsigned 1235 | * | .wrap(0) 1236 | * | .toRightSlot(premium0X64_gross) 1237 | | .toLeftSlot(premium1X64_gross); 1238 | | } 1239 | | } 1240 | | } 1241 | | 1242 | | // takes a premia accumulator and adds the computed amounts 1243 | | // checks for freeze if one side is equivalent to uint128.max 1244 | | // or ensures there isn't an overflow if the amounts roll over 1245 | | function incrementPremiaAccumulator( 1246 | | uint256 premiumOwed0, 1247 | | uint256 premiumOwed1, 1248 | | uint256 deltaPremiumOwed0, 1249 | | uint256 deltaPremiumOwed1, 1250 | | uint256 premiumGross0, 1251 | | uint256 premiumGross1, 1252 | | uint256 deltaPremiumGross0, 1253 | | uint256 deltaPremiumGross1 1254 | | ) internal returns (uint256 owed0, uint256 owed1, uint256 gross0, uint256 gross1) { 1255 | | // add together the new owed premiums 1256 | | uint256 newOwed0 = premiumOwed0 + deltaPremiumOwed0; 1257 | | uint256 newOwed1 = premiumOwed1 + deltaPremiumOwed1; 1258 | | 1259 | | // add together the new gross premiums 1260 | | uint256 newGross0 = premiumGross0 + deltaPremiumGross0; 1261 | | uint256 newGross1 = premiumGross1 + deltaPremiumGross1; 1262 | | 1263 | | bool r_Enabled = !(newOwed0 > MAX_UINT128 || newGross0 > MAX_UINT128); 1264 | | bool l_Enabled = !(newOwed1 > MAX_UINT128 || newGross1 > MAX_UINT128); 1265 | | 1266 | | // assign final values and check for cap / overflow 1267 | | owed0 = newOwed0 > MAX_UINT128 ? MAX_UINT128 : newOwed0; 1268 | | owed1 = newOwed1 > MAX_UINT128 ? MAX_UINT128 : newOwed1; 1269 | | // 1270 | | gross0 = newGross0 > MAX_UINT128 ? MAX_UINT128 : newGross0; 1271 | | gross1 = newGross1 > MAX_UINT128 ? MAX_UINT128 : newGross1; 1272 | | } 1273 | | 1274 | | function _getSolvencyBalances( 1275 | | LeftRightUnsigned tokenData0, 1276 | | LeftRightUnsigned tokenData1, 1277 | | uint160 sqrtPriceX96, 1278 | | uint256 amountWithdrawn, 1279 | | bool isToken0 1280 | | ) internal pure returns (uint256 balanceCross, uint256 thresholdCross) { 1281 | | unchecked { 1282 | | // the cross-collateral balance, computed in terms of liquidity X*√P + Y/√P 1283 | | // We use mulDiv to compute Y/√P + X*√P while correctly handling overflows, round down 1284 | | balanceCross = 1285 | | Math.mulDiv( 1286 | | uint256(tokenData1.rightSlot()) - (isToken0 ? 0 : amountWithdrawn), 1287 | | 2 ** 96, 1288 | | sqrtPriceX96 1289 | | ) + 1290 | | Math.mulDiv96( 1291 | | tokenData0.rightSlot() - (isToken0 ? amountWithdrawn : 0), 1292 | | sqrtPriceX96 1293 | | ); 1294 | | // the amount of cross-collateral balance needed for the account to be solvent, computed in terms of liquidity 1295 | | // overestimate by rounding up 1296 | | thresholdCross = 1297 | | Math.mulDivRoundingUp(uint256(tokenData1.leftSlot()), 2 ** 96, sqrtPriceX96) + 1298 | | Math.mulDiv96RoundingUp(tokenData0.leftSlot(), sqrtPriceX96); 1299 | | } 1300 | | } 1301 | | 1302 | * | function _write_revert_due_solvency(address sUser, uint256 buffer) internal { 1303 | * | if ( 1304 | * | int256($colTicks[0] - $colTicks[1]) ** 2 + 1305 | * | int256($colTicks[1] - $colTicks[2]) ** 2 + 1306 | * | int256($colTicks[3] - $colTicks[2]) ** 2 > 1307 | * | 953 ** 2 1308 | | ) { 1309 | * | for (uint256 i = 0; i < $colTicks.length; i++) { 1310 | * | $tokenData0 = collToken0.getAccountMarginDetails( 1311 | * | sUser, 1312 | * | $colTicks[i], 1313 | * | $posBalanceArray, 1314 | * | $premia0 1315 | | ); 1316 | * | $tokenData1 = collToken1.getAccountMarginDetails( 1317 | * | sUser, 1318 | * | $colTicks[i], 1319 | * | $posBalanceArray, 1320 | * | $premia1 1321 | | ); 1322 | * | $balanceCross = 1323 | * | Math.mulDiv( 1324 | * | $balance1ExpectedP + uint128($premia1 > 0 ? $premia1 : int128(0)), 1325 | | 2 ** 96, 1326 | * | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick($colTicks[i]) 1327 | | ) + 1328 | * | Math.mulDiv96( 1329 | * | $balance0ExpectedP + uint128($premia0 > 0 ? $premia0 : int128(0)), 1330 | * | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick($colTicks[i]) 1331 | | ); 1332 | | 1333 | * | $thresholdCross = 1334 | * | Math.mulDivRoundingUp( 1335 | * | uint256($tokenData1.leftSlot()), 1336 | | 2 ** 96, 1337 | * | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick($colTicks[i]) 1338 | | ) + 1339 | * | Math.mulDiv96RoundingUp( 1340 | * | $tokenData0.leftSlot(), 1341 | * | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick($colTicks[i]) 1342 | | ); 1343 | * | $shouldRevert = $shouldRevert 1344 | * | ? $shouldRevert 1345 | | : ($thresholdCross * buffer) / 10_000 > $balanceCross; 1346 | | } 1347 | | } else { 1348 | | $tokenData0 = collToken0.getAccountMarginDetails( 1349 | | sUser, 1350 | | $colTicks[1], 1351 | | $posBalanceArray, 1352 | | $premia0 1353 | | ); 1354 | | $tokenData1 = collToken1.getAccountMarginDetails( 1355 | | sUser, 1356 | | $colTicks[1], 1357 | | $posBalanceArray, 1358 | | $premia1 1359 | | ); 1360 | | $balanceCross = 1361 | | Math.mulDiv( 1362 | | $balance1ExpectedP + uint128($premia1 > 0 ? $premia1 : int128(0)), 1363 | | 2 ** 96, 1364 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick($colTicks[1]) 1365 | | ) + 1366 | | Math.mulDiv96( 1367 | | $balance0ExpectedP + uint128($premia0 > 0 ? $premia0 : int128(0)), 1368 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick($colTicks[1]) 1369 | | ); 1370 | | 1371 | | $thresholdCross = 1372 | | Math.mulDivRoundingUp( 1373 | | uint256($tokenData1.leftSlot()), 1374 | | 2 ** 96, 1375 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick($colTicks[1]) 1376 | | ) + 1377 | | Math.mulDiv96RoundingUp( 1378 | | $tokenData0.leftSlot(), 1379 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick($colTicks[1]) 1380 | | ); 1381 | | $shouldRevert = $shouldRevert 1382 | | ? $shouldRevert 1383 | | : ($thresholdCross * buffer) / 10_000 > $balanceCross; 1384 | | } 1385 | | } 1386 | | 1387 | | // 1388 | * | function _increment_tokenBalance(uint256 positionSize) internal { 1389 | | // uint256 tokenId => mapping(address owner => uint256 positionSize 1390 | * | tokenBalances[$activeTokenId][$activeUser] += positionSize; 1391 | | 1392 | * | emit LogUint256("incrementing position size", positionSize); 1393 | | } 1394 | | 1395 | | function _decrement_tokenBalance(uint256 positionSize) internal { 1396 | | tokenBalances[$activeTokenId][$activeUser] -= positionSize; 1397 | | 1398 | | emit LogUint256("decrementing position size", positionSize); 1399 | | } 1400 | | 1401 | | // verifies the token balance of a user tracked externally matches internal accounting 1402 | * | function _check_tokenBalance() internal { 1403 | * | uint256 currBalanceReal = sfpm.balanceOf($activeUser, TokenId.unwrap($activeTokenId)); 1404 | | 1405 | * | uint256 currBalanceExternal = tokenBalances[$activeTokenId][$activeUser]; 1406 | | 1407 | * | emit LogAddress("query address ", $activeUser); 1408 | * | emit LogUint256("currBalanceReal", currBalanceReal); 1409 | * | emit LogUint256("currBalanceExternal", currBalanceExternal); 1410 | | 1411 | * | assertWithMsg(currBalanceReal == currBalanceExternal, "SFPM token balance invalid"); 1412 | | } 1413 | | 1414 | | function _get_effective_liq_factor( 1415 | | uint256 legTokenType, 1416 | | int24 tickLower, 1417 | | int24 tickUpper 1418 | | ) internal view returns (uint64 effectiveLiquidityFactorX32) { 1419 | | LeftRightUnsigned accountLiquidities = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 1420 | | address(pool), 1421 | | address(panopticPool), 1422 | | legTokenType, 1423 | | tickLower, 1424 | | tickUpper 1425 | | ); 1426 | | 1427 | | uint128 netLiquidity = accountLiquidities.rightSlot(); 1428 | | uint128 totalLiquidity = accountLiquidities.leftSlot(); 1429 | | // compute and return effective liquidity. Return if short=net=0, which is closing short position 1430 | | if (netLiquidity == 0) return 0; 1431 | | 1432 | | effectiveLiquidityFactorX32 = uint64((uint256(totalLiquidity) * 2 ** 32) / netLiquidity); 1433 | | } 1434 | | 1435 | | function _get_assets_in_token0(address who, int24 tick) internal view returns (uint256 assets) { 1436 | | assets = 1437 | | collToken0.convertToAssets(collToken0.balanceOf(who)) + 1438 | | PanopticMath.convert1to0( 1439 | | collToken1.convertToAssets(collToken1.balanceOf(who)), 1440 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick(tick) 1441 | | ); 1442 | | } 1443 | | 1444 | | function _get_assets_in_token1(address who, int24 tick) internal view returns (uint256 assets) { 1445 | | assets = 1446 | | collToken1.convertToAssets(collToken1.balanceOf(who)) + 1447 | | PanopticMath.convert0to1( 1448 | | collToken0.convertToAssets(collToken0.balanceOf(who)), 1449 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick(tick) 1450 | | ); 1451 | | } 1452 | | 1453 | | function _get_solvency_balances( 1454 | | address who, 1455 | | int24 tick 1456 | | ) internal view returns (uint256 balanceCross, uint256 thresholdCross) { 1457 | | (LeftRightUnsigned tokenData0, LeftRightUnsigned tokenData1) = _get_account_margin( 1458 | | who, 1459 | | tick 1460 | | ); 1461 | | uint160 sqrtPriceX96 = Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick(tick); 1462 | | unchecked { 1463 | | // the cross-collateral balance, computed in terms of liquidity X*√P + Y/√P 1464 | | // We use mulDiv to compute Y/√P + X*√P while correctly handling overflows, round down 1465 | | balanceCross = 1466 | | Math.mulDiv(uint256(tokenData1.rightSlot()), 2 ** 96, sqrtPriceX96) + 1467 | | Math.mulDiv96(tokenData0.rightSlot(), sqrtPriceX96); 1468 | | // the amount of cross-collateral balance needed for the account to be solvent, computed in terms of liquidity 1469 | | // overstimate by rounding up 1470 | | thresholdCross = 1471 | | Math.mulDivRoundingUp(uint256(tokenData1.leftSlot()), 2 ** 96, sqrtPriceX96) + 1472 | | Math.mulDiv96RoundingUp(tokenData0.leftSlot(), sqrtPriceX96); 1473 | | } 1474 | | } 1475 | | 1476 | | function _get_list_without_tokenid( 1477 | | TokenId[] memory list, 1478 | | TokenId target 1479 | | ) internal pure returns (TokenId[] memory out) { 1480 | | // Assumes target is in list 1481 | | 1482 | | uint256 l = list.length; 1483 | | out = new TokenId[](l - 1); 1484 | | uint256 out_idx = 0; 1485 | | 1486 | | for (uint i = 0; i < l; i++) { 1487 | | if (keccak256(abi.encode(list[i])) != keccak256(abi.encode(target))) { 1488 | | out[out_idx] = list[i]; 1489 | | out_idx++; 1490 | | } 1491 | | } 1492 | | } 1493 | | 1494 | | function _move_tokenid_to_end( 1495 | | TokenId[] memory list, 1496 | | TokenId target 1497 | | ) internal pure returns (TokenId[] memory out) { 1498 | | uint256 l = list.length; 1499 | | out = new TokenId[](l); 1500 | | 1501 | | uint256 idx = 0; 1502 | | for (uint i = 0; i < l; i++) { 1503 | | if (keccak256(abi.encode(list[i])) != keccak256(abi.encode(target))) { 1504 | | out[idx] = list[i]; 1505 | | idx++; 1506 | | } 1507 | | } 1508 | | 1509 | | out[l - 1] = target; 1510 | | } 1511 | | 1512 | | function convertToAssets(CollateralTracker ct, int256 amount) internal view returns (int256) { 1513 | | return (amount > 0 ? int8(1) : -1) * int256(ct.convertToAssets(uint256(Math.abs(amount)))); 1514 | | } 1515 | | 1516 | | ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 1517 | | // Liquidation calculation helpers 1518 | | ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 1519 | | 1520 | | function _calculate_protocol_loss_0(int24 tick) internal { 1521 | | uint256 delegated0 = burnSimResults.delegated0; 1522 | | uint256 delegated1 = burnSimResults.delegated1; 1523 | | uint256 totalSupply0 = burnSimResults.totalSupply0; 1524 | | uint256 totalSupply1 = burnSimResults.totalSupply1; 1525 | | uint256 totalAssets0 = burnSimResults.totalAssets0; 1526 | | uint256 totalAssets1 = burnSimResults.totalAssets1; 1527 | | 1528 | | unchecked { 1529 | | liqResults.protocolLoss0Actual = int256( 1530 | | (collToken0.convertToAssets( 1531 | | (collToken0.totalSupply() - totalSupply0) - 1532 | | ((collToken0.totalAssets() - totalAssets0) * totalSupply0) / 1533 | | totalAssets0 1534 | | ) * (totalSupply0 - delegated0)) / 1535 | | (totalSupply0 - (collToken0.totalSupply() - totalSupply0)) + 1536 | | PanopticMath.convert1to0( 1537 | | (collToken1.convertToAssets( 1538 | | (collToken1.totalSupply() - totalSupply1) - 1539 | | ((collToken1.totalAssets() - totalAssets1) * totalSupply1) / 1540 | | totalAssets1 1541 | | ) * (totalSupply1 - delegated1)) / 1542 | | (totalSupply1 - (collToken1.totalSupply() - totalSupply1)), 1543 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick(tick) 1544 | | ) 1545 | | ); 1546 | | } 1547 | | } 1548 | | 1549 | | function _calculate_protocol_loss_expected_0(int24 twaptick, int24 curtick) internal { 1550 | | int256 balanceCombined0CT = int256( 1551 | | liqResults.margin0.rightSlot() + 1552 | | PanopticMath.convert1to0( 1553 | | liqResults.margin1.rightSlot(), 1554 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick(twaptick) 1555 | | ) 1556 | | ); 1557 | | 1558 | | int256 balance0CombinedPostBurn = int256(uint256(liqResults.margin0.rightSlot())) - 1559 | | Math.max(liqResults.premia.rightSlot(), 0) + 1560 | | burnSimResults.burnDelta0 + 1561 | | int256( 1562 | | PanopticMath.convert1to0( 1563 | | int256(uint256(liqResults.margin1.rightSlot())) - 1564 | | Math.max(liqResults.premia.leftSlot(), 0) + 1565 | | burnSimResults.burnDelta1, 1566 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick(curtick) 1567 | | ) 1568 | | ); 1569 | | 1570 | | liqResults.protocolLoss0Expected = Math.max( 1571 | | -(balance0CombinedPostBurn - 1572 | | Math.min( 1573 | | balanceCombined0CT / 2, 1574 | | int256( 1575 | | liqResults.margin0.leftSlot() + 1576 | | PanopticMath.convert1to0( 1577 | | liqResults.margin1.leftSlot(), 1578 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick(twaptick) 1579 | | ) 1580 | | ) - balanceCombined0CT 1581 | | )), 1582 | | 0 1583 | | ); 1584 | | } 1585 | | 1586 | | function _calculate_settled_tokens( 1587 | | TokenId[] memory positions, 1588 | | int24 tick 1589 | | ) internal view returns (uint256, bytes memory) { 1590 | | uint256 settledTokens0; 1615 | | } 1616 | | 1617 | * | function simulate_burning(address who, address liquidator) external { 1618 | *r | require(msg.sender == address(this)); 1619 | | 1620 | | uint128 delegated0 = uint128(collToken0.convertToAssets(collToken0.balanceOf(liquidator))); 1621 | | uint128 delegated1 = uint128(collToken1.convertToAssets(collToken1.balanceOf(liquidator))); 1622 | | LeftRightUnsigned delegated = LeftRightUnsigned.wrap(0).toLeftSlot(delegated0).toRightSlot( 1623 | | delegated1 1624 | | ); 1630 | | 1631 | | int256[2] memory shareDeltasLiquidatee = [ 1632 | | int256(collToken0.balanceOf(who)), 1633 | | int256(collToken1.balanceOf(who)) 1634 | | ]; 1635 | | 1636 | | LeftRightSigned[4][] memory premiasByLeg; 1643 | | (, currentTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 1644 | | 1645 | | shareDeltasLiquidatee = [ 1646 | | int256(collToken0.balanceOf(who)) - shareDeltasLiquidatee[0], 1647 | | int256(collToken1.balanceOf(who)) - shareDeltasLiquidatee[1] 1648 | | ]; 1649 | | 1650 | | (uint256 settledTokens0, bytes memory settledTokens) = _calculate_settled_tokens( 1651 | | userPositions[who], 1652 | | currentTick 1653 | | ); 1654 | | 1655 | | int256 longPremium0; 1656 | | for (uint256 i = 0; i < userPositions[who].length; ++i) { 1657 | | for (uint256 j = 0; j < userPositions[who][i].countLegs(); ++j) { 1658 | | longPremium0 += premiasByLeg[i][j].rightSlot() < 0 1659 | | ? -premiasByLeg[i][j].rightSlot() 1660 | | : int128(0); 1661 | | longPremium0 += PanopticMath.convert1to0( 1662 | | premiasByLeg[i][j].leftSlot() < 0 ? -premiasByLeg[i][j].leftSlot() : int128(0), 1663 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick(currentTick) 1664 | | ); 1665 | | } 1666 | | } 1667 | | 1668 | | LeftRightUnsigned supply = LeftRightUnsigned 1669 | | .wrap(0) 1670 | | .toLeftSlot(uint128(collToken0.totalSupply())) 1671 | | .toRightSlot(uint128(collToken1.totalSupply())); 1672 | | LeftRightUnsigned assets = LeftRightUnsigned 1673 | | .wrap(0) 1674 | | .toLeftSlot(uint128(collToken0.totalAssets())) 1675 | | .toRightSlot(uint128(collToken1.totalAssets())); 1676 | | LeftRightSigned shareDelta = LeftRightSigned 1677 | | .wrap(0) 1678 | | .toLeftSlot(int128(shareDeltasLiquidatee[0])) 1679 | | .toRightSlot(int128(shareDeltasLiquidatee[1])); 1690 | | 1691 | | revert SimulationResults( 1692 | | supply, 1693 | | assets, 1694 | | delegated, 1695 | | shareDelta, 1696 | | burnDelta0C, 1697 | | burnDelta, 1698 | | netExchanged, 1699 | | settledTokens0, 1700 | | longPremium0, 1701 | | settledTokens 1702 | | ); 1703 | | } 1704 | | 1705 | | function _execute_burn_simulation(address liquidatee, address liquidator) internal { 1706 | | try this.simulate_burning(liquidatee, liquidator) {} catch (bytes memory results) { 1707 | | bytes4 selector = bytes4(results); 1708 | | require(selector == SimulationResults.selector); 1709 | | emit LogBytes("r", results); 1710 | | 1711 | | LeftRightUnsigned totalSupply; 1712 | | LeftRightUnsigned totalAssets; 1713 | | LeftRightUnsigned delegated;
