1720 | | 1721 | | assembly ("memory-safe") { 1722 | | totalSupply := mload(add(results, 0x24)) 1723 | | totalAssets := mload(add(results, 0x44)) 1724 | | delegated := mload(add(results, 0x64)) 1725 | | shareDelta := mload(add(results, 0x84)) 1726 | | burnDelta0C := mload(add(results, 0xa4)) 1727 | | burnDelta := mload(add(results, 0xc4)) 1728 | | netExchanged := mload(add(results, 0xe4)) 1729 | | settledTokens0 := mload(add(results, 0x104)) 1730 | | longPremium0 := mload(add(results, 0x124)) 1731 | | results := mload(add(results, 0x144)) 1732 | | } 1733 | | 1734 | | burnSimResults.totalSupply0 = totalSupply.leftSlot(); 1735 | | burnSimResults.totalSupply1 = totalSupply.rightSlot(); 1736 | | burnSimResults.totalAssets0 = totalAssets.leftSlot(); 1737 | | burnSimResults.totalAssets1 = totalAssets.rightSlot(); 1738 | | burnSimResults.delegated0 = delegated.leftSlot(); 1739 | | burnSimResults.delegated1 = delegated.rightSlot(); 1740 | | burnSimResults.shareDelta0 = shareDelta.leftSlot(); 1741 | | burnSimResults.shareDelta1 = shareDelta.rightSlot(); 1742 | | burnSimResults.settledTokens0 = settledTokens0; 1743 | | burnSimResults.longPremium0 = longPremium0; 1744 | | burnSimResults.burnDelta0C = burnDelta0C; 1745 | | burnSimResults.burnDelta0 = burnDelta.leftSlot(); 1746 | | burnSimResults.burnDelta1 = burnDelta.rightSlot(); 1747 | | burnSimResults.netExchanged = netExchanged; 1748 | | burnSimResults.settledTokens = abi.decode(results, (uint256[2][4][32])); 1749 | | } 1750 | | } 1751 | | 1752 | | function _calculate_margins_and_premia(address who, int24 tick) internal { 1753 | | (int128 expectedP0, int128 expectedP1, uint256[2][] memory posBal) = panopticPool 1754 | | .calculateAccumulatedFeesBatch(who, false, userPositions[who]); 1755 | | 1756 | | liqResults.margin0 = collToken0.getAccountMarginDetails(who, tick, posBal, expectedP0); 1757 | | liqResults.margin1 = collToken1.getAccountMarginDetails(who, tick, posBal, expectedP1); 1758 | | liqResults.premia = LeftRightSigned.wrap(0).toRightSlot(expectedP0).toLeftSlot(expectedP1); 1759 | | } 1760 | | 1761 | | function _calculate_liquidation_bonus(int24 twaptick, int24 curtick) internal { 1762 | | (liqResults.bonus0, liqResults.bonus1, ) = PanopticMath.getLiquidationBonus( 1763 | | liqResults.margin0, 1764 | | liqResults.margin1, 1765 | | Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick(twaptick), 1766 | | Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick(curtick), 1767 | | burnSimResults.netExchanged, 1768 | | liqResults.premia 1769 | | ); 1770 | | } 1771 | | 1772 | | function _calculate_bonus(int24 tick) internal { 1773 | | int256 combinedBalance0Premium = int256( 1774 | | (liqResults.margin0.rightSlot()) + 1775 | | PanopticMath.convert1to0( 1776 | | liqResults.margin1.rightSlot(), 1777 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick(tick) 1778 | | ) 1779 | | ); 1780 | | liqResults.bonusCombined0 = Math.min( 1781 | | combinedBalance0Premium / 2, 1782 | | int256( 1783 | | liqResults.margin0.leftSlot() + 1784 | | PanopticMath.convert1to0( 1785 | | liqResults.margin1.leftSlot(), 1786 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick(tick) 1787 | | ) 1788 | | ) - combinedBalance0Premium 1789 | | ); 1790 | | } 1791 | | 1792 | * | function getContext( 1793 | | uint256 ts_, 1794 | | int24 _currentTick, 1795 | | int24 _width, 1796 | | bool distribution 1797 | * | ) internal pure returns (int24 strikeOffset, int24 minTick, int24 maxTick) { 1798 | * | int256 ts = int256(ts_); 1799 | | 1800 | * | strikeOffset = int24(_width % 2 == 0 ? int256(0) : ts / 2); 1801 | | 1802 | * | if (distribution) { 1803 | * | minTick = int24((TickMath.MIN_TICK / ts) * ts); 1804 | * | maxTick = int24((TickMath.MAX_TICK / ts) * ts); 1805 | | } else { 1806 | * | minTick = int24(((_currentTick - 4096) / ts) * ts); 1807 | * | maxTick = int24(((_currentTick + 4096) / ts) * ts); 1808 | | } 1809 | | } 1810 | | 1811 | * | function getValidSW( 1812 | | uint256 _widthSeed, 1813 | | int256 _strikeSeed, 1814 | | uint256 ts_, 1815 | | int24 _currentTick, 1816 | | bool distribution 1817 | * | ) internal returns (int24 width, int24 strike) { 1818 | * | int256 ts = int256(ts_); 1819 | | 1820 | * | width = distribution 1821 | | ? int24( 1822 | | int256( 1823 | * | bound( 1824 | * | _widthSeed, 1825 | * | ts_, 1826 | * | uint256((TickMath.MAX_TICK - TickMath.MIN_TICK) / ts / 10) 1827 | | ) 1828 | | ) 1829 | | ) 1830 | * | : int24(int256(bound(_widthSeed, ts_, 4096 / ts_))); 1831 | | 1832 | * | int24 rangeDown; 1833 | * | int24 rangeUp; 1834 | * | (rangeDown, rangeUp) = PanopticMath.getRangesFromStrike(width, int24(ts)); 1835 | | 1836 | * | emit LogInt256("rangeDown", rangeDown); 1837 | * | emit LogInt256("rangeUp", rangeUp); 1838 | * | (int24 strikeOffset, int24 minTick, int24 maxTick) = getContext( 1839 | * | ts_, 1840 | * | _currentTick, 1841 | * | width, 1842 | * | distribution 1843 | | ); 1844 | | 1845 | * | emit LogInt256("minTick", minTick); 1846 | * | emit LogInt256("maxTick", maxTick); 1847 | * | emit LogInt256("strikeOffset", strikeOffset); 1848 | | 1849 | * | int24 lowerBound = int24(minTick + rangeDown - strikeOffset); 1850 | * | int24 upperBound = int24(maxTick - rangeUp - strikeOffset); 1851 | | 1852 | * | emit LogInt256("lowerBound", lowerBound); 1853 | * | emit LogInt256("upperBound", upperBound); 1854 | | 1855 | * | emit LogInt256("lowerBound / ts", lowerBound / ts); 1856 | * | emit LogInt256("upperBound / ts", upperBound / ts); 1857 | | 1858 | | // strike MUST be defined as a multiple of tickSpacing because the range extends out equally on both sides, 1859 | | // based on the width being divisibly by 2, it is then offset by either ts or ts / 2 1860 | * | strike = int24(bound(_strikeSeed, lowerBound / ts, upperBound / ts)); 1861 | | 1862 | * | emit LogInt256("strike", strike); 1863 | | 1864 | * | strike = int24(strike * ts + strikeOffset); 1865 | | } 1866 | | 1867 | * | function size_for_collateral_solo( 1868 | | uint256 multiplierX64, 1869 | | uint256 collateral0, 1870 | | uint256 collateral1 1871 | * | ) public returns (uint256) { 1872 | | // position size * 2**128 / colReq 1873 | | uint256 sizeMultiplierX128; 1874 | | 1875 | | uint256 size_long = type(uint256).max; 1876 | * | for (uint256 i = 0; i < $numLegs; i++) { 1877 | * | emit LogInt256("$strikes[i]", $strikes[i]); 1878 | * | emit LogInt256("$widths[i]", $widths[i]); 1879 | * | emit LogInt256("poolTickSpacing", poolTickSpacing); 1880 | | 1881 | * | ($tickLower, $tickUpper) = PanopticMath.getTicks( 1882 | * | $strikes[i], 1883 | * | $widths[i], 1884 | * | poolTickSpacing 1885 | | ); 1886 | * | emit LogUint256("1", 1); 1887 | * | emit LogUint256( 1888 | | "Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($strikes[i])", 1889 | * | Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($strikes[i]) 1890 | | ); 1891 | * | uint256 baseCR = uint256($isLongs[i] == 0 ? 2_000 : 1_000) * 2 ** 117; 1892 | | 1893 | * | emit LogUint256("baseCR", baseCR); 1894 | * | if ($assets[i] != $tokenTypes[i]) { 1895 | * | baseCR = $tokenTypes[i] == 0 1896 | * | ? PanopticMath.convert1to0(baseCR, Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($strikes[i])) 1897 | * | : PanopticMath.convert0to1(baseCR, Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($strikes[i])); 1898 | | } 1899 | * | emit LogUint256("11", 11); 1900 | | 1901 | * | emit LogUint256("baseCR", baseCR); 1902 | | 1903 | * | emit LogInt256("fastOracleTick", $fastOracleTick); 1904 | * | emit LogUint256("tokenTypes[i]", $tokenTypes[i]); 1905 | | 1906 | * | if ($riskPartners[i] != i) { 1907 | * | if ( 1908 | * | $riskPartners[$riskPartners[i]] != i && $ratios[i] == $ratios[$riskPartners[i]] 1909 | | ) { 1910 | * | $shouldRevert = true; 1911 | * | } else if ( 1912 | * | $isLongs[i] == $isLongs[$riskPartners[i]] && 1913 | * | $tokenTypes[i] == $tokenTypes[$riskPartners[i]] 1914 | | ) { 1915 | | if ($isLongs[i] == 1) $shouldRevert = true; 1916 | | baseCR /= 2; 1917 | * | } else if ($isLongs[i] == 0 && $tokenTypes[i] != $tokenTypes[$riskPartners[i]]) { 1918 | | // spreads are complicated to get collateral multipliers for, and should be covered by the default sizing range (as a small efficiency improvement) 1919 | | } else { 1920 | * | $shouldRevert = true; 1921 | | } 1922 | | } 1923 | | 1924 | * | sizeMultiplierX128 += Math.mulDiv( 1925 | | 10_000 * 2 ** 117, 1926 | | 2 ** 128, 1927 | * | ((( 1928 | * | (($tokenTypes[i] == 0 && $fastOracleTick > 0) || 1929 | * | ($tokenTypes[i] == 1 && $fastOracleTick <= 0)) 1930 | * | ? baseCR 1931 | * | : $tokenTypes[i] == 0 1932 | * | ? PanopticMath.convert0to1( 1933 | * | baseCR, 1934 | * | Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($fastOracleTick) 1935 | | ) 1936 | * | : PanopticMath.convert1to0( 1937 | | baseCR, 1938 | | Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($fastOracleTick) 1939 | | ) 1940 | * | ) * 13_333) / 10_000) * $ratios[i] 1941 | | ); 1942 | * | emit LogUint256("2", 2); 1943 | | 1944 | * | $netLiquidity = sfpm 1945 | | .getAccountLiquidity( 1946 | * | address(pool), 1947 | * | address(panopticPool), 1948 | * | $tokenTypes[i], 1949 | * | $tickLower, 1950 | * | $tickUpper 1951 | | ) 1952 | | .rightSlot(); 1953 | | 1954 | * | if ($netLiquidity > 0 && $isLongs[i] == 1) { 1955 | * | size_long = Math.min( 1956 | | size_long, 1957 | | $assets[i] == 0 1958 | | ? LiquidityAmounts.getAmount0ForLiquidity( 1959 | | Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($tickLower), 1960 | | Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($tickUpper), 1961 | | uint128(Math.mulDiv($netLiquidity, multiplierX64, 2 ** 64) / $ratios[i]) 1962 | | ) 1963 | * | : LiquidityAmounts.getAmount1ForLiquidity( 1964 | | Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($tickLower), 1965 | | Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($tickUpper), 1966 | | uint128(Math.mulDiv($netLiquidity, multiplierX64, 2 ** 64) / $ratios[i]) 1967 | | ) 1968 | | ); 1969 | | } 1970 | | 1971 | * | if ( 1972 | * | $isLongs[i] == 0 && 1973 | * | !((($fastOracleTick >= $tickUpper) && ($tokenTypes[i] == 1)) || 1974 | * | (($fastOracleTick < $tickLower) && ($tokenTypes[i] == 0))) 1975 | * | ) { 1976 | | // amountMoved for 2k posSize 1977 | * | uint256 ITMCR = baseCR; 1978 | | 1979 | * | uint160 ratio = $tokenTypes[i] == 1 1980 | * | ? Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick( 1981 | * | Math.max24(2 * ($fastOracleTick - $strikes[i]), Constants.MIN_V3POOL_TICK) 1982 | | ) 1983 | * | : Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick( 1984 | * | Math.max24(2 * ($strikes[i] - $fastOracleTick), Constants.MIN_V3POOL_TICK) 1985 | | ); 1986 | | 1987 | * | if ( 1988 | * | (($fastOracleTick < $tickLower) && ($tokenTypes[i] == 1)) || 1989 | * | (($fastOracleTick >= $tickUpper) && ($tokenTypes[i] == 0)) 1990 | * | ) { 1991 | * | uint256 c2 = Constants.FP96 - ratio; 1992 | | 1993 | * | ITMCR = Math.mulDiv96RoundingUp(ITMCR, c2); 1994 | | } else { 1995 | | uint160 scaleFactor = Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick( 1996 | | ($tickUpper - $strikes[i]) + ($strikes[i] - $tickLower) 1997 | | ); 1998 | | ITMCR = Math.mulDivRoundingUp( 1999 | | ITMCR, 2000 | | scaleFactor - ratio, 2001 | | scaleFactor + Constants.FP96 2002 | | ); 2003 | | } 2004 | * | emit LogUint256("3", 4); 2005 | | 2006 | * | sizeMultiplierX128 += Math.mulDiv( 2007 | | 2_000 * 2 ** 117, 2008 | | 2 ** 128, 2009 | * | ((( 2010 | * | (($tokenTypes[i] == 0 && $fastOracleTick > 0) || 2011 | * | ($tokenTypes[i] == 1 && $fastOracleTick <= 0)) 2012 | * | ? ITMCR 2013 | * | : $tokenTypes[i] == 0 2014 | * | ? PanopticMath.convert0to1( 2015 | * | ITMCR, 2016 | * | Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($fastOracleTick) 2017 | | ) 2018 | | : PanopticMath.convert1to0( 2019 | | ITMCR, 2020 | | Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($fastOracleTick) 2021 | | ) 2022 | * | ) * 13_333) / 10_000) * $ratios[i] 2023 | | ); 2024 | | } 2025 | | } 2026 | * | emit LogUint256("4", 4); 2027 | | 2028 | * | uint256 targetCross = Math.mulDiv64( 2029 | * | $fastOracleTick > 0 2030 | * | ? collateral0 + 2031 | | PanopticMath.convert1to0(collateral1, Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($fastOracleTick)) 2032 | * | : PanopticMath.convert0to1(collateral0, Math.getSqrtRatioAtTick($fastOracleTick)) + 2033 | * | collateral1, 2034 | * | multiplierX64 2035 | | ); 2036 | * | emit LogUint256("5", 5); 2037 | | 2038 | * | emit LogUint256("targetCross", targetCross); 2039 | * | emit LogUint256("sizeMultiplierX128", sizeMultiplierX128); 2040 | | 2041 | * | emit LogUint256("size_collat", Math.mulDiv(targetCross, 2 ** 128, sizeMultiplierX128)); 2042 | * | emit LogUint256("size_long", size_long); 2043 | | 2044 | | // desired_collateral * 2**128 / (position_size * 2**128 / colReq) 2045 | | // or, bound it to the long position size (based on available liq) 2046 | * | return Math.min(size_long, Math.mulDiv(targetCross, 2 ** 128, sizeMultiplierX128)); 2047 | | } 2048 | | 2049 | * | function write_mintburn_transfer_amts() internal { 2050 | * | for (uint256 i = 0; i < $tokenIdActive.countLegs(); ++i) { 2051 | * | LiquidityChunk liquidityChunk = PanopticMath.getLiquidityChunk( 2052 | * | $tokenIdActive, 2053 | * | i, 2054 | * | $positionSizeActive 2055 | | ); 2056 | | 2057 | * | emit LogUint256("$positionSizeActive", $positionSizeActive); 2058 | * | emit LogInt256("liquidityChunk.tickLower()", liquidityChunk.tickLower()); 2059 | * | emit LogInt256("liquidityChunk.tickUpper()", liquidityChunk.tickUpper()); 2060 | * | emit LogUint256("liquidityChunk.liquidity()", liquidityChunk.liquidity()); 2061 | | 2062 | * | $tickLower = liquidityChunk.tickLower(); 2063 | * | $tickUpper = liquidityChunk.tickUpper(); 2064 | | 2065 | * | (uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1) = Math.getAmountsForLiquidity( 2066 | * | currentTick, 2067 | * | liquidityChunk 2068 | | ); 2069 | | 2070 | * | emit LogUint256("amount0", amount0); 2071 | * | emit LogUint256("amount1", amount1); 2072 | | 2073 | * | $netLiquidity = sfpm 2074 | | .getAccountLiquidity( 2075 | * | address(pool), 2076 | * | address(panopticPool), 2077 | * | $tokenTypes[i], 2078 | | $tickLower, 2079 | | $tickUpper 2080 | | ) 2081 | | .rightSlot(); 2082 | | 2083 | * | $removedLiquidity = sfpm 2084 | | .getAccountLiquidity( 2085 | * | address(pool), 2086 | * | address(panopticPool), 2087 | * | $tokenTypes[i], 2088 | * | $tickLower, 2089 | * | $tickUpper 2090 | | ) 2091 | | .leftSlot(); 2092 | | 2093 | * | if ($tokenIdActive.isLong(i) == 0) { 2094 | * | $shouldRevert = $shouldRevert ? $shouldRevert : liquidityChunk.liquidity() == 0; 2095 | | 2096 | * | emit LogBool("should revert due to 0 liquidity", $shouldRevert); 2097 | | 2098 | * | $netTokenTransfers0 += int256(amount0); 2099 | * | $netTokenTransfers1 += int256(amount1); 2100 | * | $spreadRatio = 2101 | * | ($removedLiquidity * 100_000_000) / 2102 | * | uint256(Math.max(1, $netLiquidity + liquidityChunk.liquidity())); 2103 | * | emit LogUint256("$spreadRatioS", $spreadRatio); 2104 | | } else { 2105 | * | $netTokenTransfers0 -= int256(amount0); 2106 | * | $netTokenTransfers0 -= int256(amount1); 2107 | * | $spreadRatio = 2108 | * | (($removedLiquidity + liquidityChunk.liquidity()) * (2 ** 32)) / 2109 | | uint256( 2110 | * | Math.max( 2111 | * | 1, 2112 | | uint256( 2113 | * | int256($netLiquidity) - int256(uint256(liquidityChunk.liquidity())) 2114 | | ) 2115 | | ) 2116 | | ); 2117 | * | emit LogUint256("$spreadRatioL", $spreadRatio); 2118 | | 2119 | * | $shouldRevert = $shouldRevert 2120 | * | ? $shouldRevert 2121 | * | : int256($netLiquidity) - int256(uint256(liquidityChunk.liquidity())) == 0; 2122 | * | $shouldRevert = $shouldRevert ? $shouldRevert : $spreadRatio > 9 * (2 ** 32); 2123 | * | emit LogBool("should revert due to spread ratio", $shouldRevert); 2124 | | } 2125 | | 2126 | * | $maxTransfer0 = Math.max($maxTransfer0, $netTokenTransfers0); 2127 | * | $maxTransfer1 = Math.max($maxTransfer1, $netTokenTransfers1); 2128 | | } 2129 | | } 2130 | | 2131 | * | function quote_sfpm_mint() internal { 2132 | * | try this.sfpm_mint_sim() {} catch (bytes memory results) { 2133 | * | emit LogBytes("r", results); 2134 | | assembly ("memory-safe") { 2135 | * | results := add(results, 0x04) 2136 | | } 2137 | * | bool sRevert; 2138 | * | ($collectedByLeg, $totalSwapped, $colTicks, sRevert) = abi.decode( 2139 | * | results, 2140 | | (LeftRightUnsigned[4], LeftRightSigned, int24[4], bool) 2141 | | ); 2142 | | 2143 | * | $shouldRevert = $shouldRevert || sRevert; 2144 | * | $sfpmRevert = sRevert; 2145 | | } 2146 | | } 2147 | | 2148 | | function quote_pp_burn() internal { 2149 | | try this.pp_burn_sim() {} catch (bytes memory results) { 2150 | | emit LogBytes("r", results); 2151 | | assembly ("memory-safe") { 2152 | | results := add(results, 0x04) 2153 | | } 2154 | | bool sRevert; 2155 | | ($colDelta0, $colDelta1, sRevert) = abi.decode(results, (int256, int256, bool)); 2156 | | 2157 | | $shouldRevert = $shouldRevert || sRevert; 2158 | | } 2159 | | } 2160 | | 2161 | * | function pp_burn_sim() external { 2162 | * | hevm.prank($exercisee); 2163 | * | try 2164 | * | panopticPool.burnOptions( 2165 | * | $tokenIdActive, 2166 | * | $positionListExercisee, 2167 | | TickMath.MIN_TICK, 2168 | | TickMath.MAX_TICK 2169 | | ) 2170 | | { 2171 | | revert PPBurnSimResError( 2172 | | int256(collToken0.balanceOf($exercisee)) - $balance0Exercisee, 2173 | | int256(collToken1.balanceOf($exercisee)) - $balance1Exercisee, 2174 | | false 2175 | | ); 2176 | | } catch (bytes memory reason) { 2177 | * | if (keccak256(reason) == keccak256(abi.encodeWithSignature("Panic(uint256)", 0x11))) { 2178 | | hevm.prank(address(panopticPool)); 2179 | | collToken0.delegate($exercisee, (2 ** 104 - 1) * 10_000); 2180 | | hevm.prank(address(panopticPool)); 2181 | | collToken1.delegate($exercisee, (2 ** 104 - 1) * 10_000); 2182 | | int256 balExerciseeOrig0 = int256(collToken0.balanceOf($exercisee)); 2183 | | int256 balExerciseeOrig1 = int256(collToken1.balanceOf($exercisee)); 2184 | | 2185 | | hevm.prank($exercisee); 2186 | | try 2187 | | panopticPool.burnOptions( 2188 | | $tokenIdActive, 2189 | | $positionListExercisee, 2190 | | TickMath.MIN_TICK, 2191 | | TickMath.MAX_TICK 2192 | | ) 2193 | | { 2194 | | revert PPBurnSimResError( 2195 | | int256(collToken0.balanceOf($exercisee)) - balExerciseeOrig0, 2196 | | int256(collToken1.balanceOf($exercisee)) - balExerciseeOrig1, 2197 | | false 2198 | | ); 2199 | | } catch { 2200 | *r | revert PPBurnSimResError(0, 0, true); 2201 | | } 2202 | | } else { 2203 | * | revert PPBurnSimResError(0, 0, true); 2204 | | } 2205 | | } 2206 | | } 2207 | | 2208 | * | function sfpm_mint_sim() external { 2209 | * | hevm.prank(address(panopticPool)); 2210 | * | try 2211 | * | sfpm.mintTokenizedPosition( 2212 | * | $tokenIdActive, 2213 | * | $positionSizeActive, 2214 | * | $tickLimitLow, 2215 | * | $tickLimitHigh 2216 | | ) 2217 | | returns (LeftRightUnsigned[4] memory collectedByLeg, LeftRightSigned totalSwapped) { 2218 | | int24[4] memory __colTicks; 2219 | | (__colTicks[0], __colTicks[1], __colTicks[2], __colTicks[3], ) = PanopticMath 2220 | | .getOracleTicks( 2221 | | pool, 2222 | | uint256(hevm.load(address(panopticPool), bytes32(uint256(1)))) 2223 | | ); 2224 | | 2225 | | revert SFPMMintResError(collectedByLeg, totalSwapped, __colTicks, false); 2226 | | } catch { 2227 | * | LeftRightUnsigned[4] memory collectedByLeg; 2228 | * | LeftRightSigned totalSwapped; 2229 | | 2230 | * | int24[4] memory __colTicks; 2231 | * | (__colTicks[0], __colTicks[1], __colTicks[2], __colTicks[3], ) = PanopticMath 2232 | | .getOracleTicks( 2233 | * | pool, 2234 | * | uint256(hevm.load(address(panopticPool), bytes32(uint256(1)))) 2235 | | ); 2236 | | 2237 | * | revert SFPMMintResError(collectedByLeg, totalSwapped, __colTicks, true); 2238 | | } 2239 | | } 2240 | | 2241 | | function validate_exercisable_ext(TokenId eid, int24 tickEat) external pure { 2242 | | eid.validateIsExercisable(tickEat); 2243 | | } 2244 | | 2245 | | function _perform_swap_with_delay(uint160 target_sqrt_price, uint256 delay) internal { 2246 | | // bound the price between 10 and 500000 2247 | | target_sqrt_price = uint160( 2248 | | bound( 2249 | | target_sqrt_price, 2250 | | 112028621795169773357271145775104, 2251 | | 25054084147398268684193622782902272 2252 | | ) 2253 | | ); 2254 | | 2255 | | uint160 price; 2256 | | 2257 | | (price, currentTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 2258 | | 2259 | | emit LogInt256("tick before swap", currentTick); 2260 | | emit LogUint256("price before swap", uint256(price)); 2261 | | 2262 | | uint256 delay_on = (delay % 2 == 0) ? 1 : 0; 2263 | | uint256 delay_block = bound(delay, 0, 150); 2264 | | 2265 | | emit LogUint256("number of block delayed", delay_block); 2266 | | 2267 | | hevm.prank(pool_manipulator); 2268 | | swapperc.swapTo(pool, target_sqrt_price); 2269 | | hevm.warp(block.timestamp + delay_on * delay_block * 12); 2270 | | hevm.roll(block.number + delay_on * delay_block); 2271 | | 2272 | | // Do another random mint+burn 2273 | | delay_on = ((delay >> 4) % 2) == 0 ? 1 : 0; 2274 | | if (delay_on == 1) { 2275 | | hevm.prank(pool_manipulator); 2276 | | swapperc.mint(pool, -10, 10, 10 ** 18); 2277 | | hevm.prank(pool_manipulator); 2278 | | swapperc.burn(pool, -10, 10, 10 ** 18); 2279 | | } 2280 | | 2281 | | (price, currentTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 2282 | | emit LogInt256("tick after swap", currentTick); 2283 | | emit LogUint256("price after swap", uint256(price)); 2284 | | } 2285 | | 2286 | | function editCollateral(CollateralTracker ct, address owner, uint256 newShares) internal { 2287 | | int256 shareDelta = int256(newShares) - int256(ct.balanceOf(owner)); 2288 | | int256 assetDelta = convertToAssets(ct, shareDelta); 2289 | | hevm.store( 2290 | | address(ct), 2291 | | bytes32(uint256(7)), 2292 | | bytes32( 2293 | | uint256( 2294 | | LeftRightSigned.unwrap( 2295 | | LeftRightSigned 2296 | | .wrap(int256(uint256(hevm.load(address(ct), bytes32(uint256(7)))))) 2297 | | .add(LeftRightSigned.wrap(assetDelta)) 2298 | | ) 2299 | | ) 2300 | | ) 2301 | | ); 2302 | | 2303 | | if (ct.asset() == address(USDC)) { 2304 | | alter_USDC( 2305 | | address(ct), 2306 | | uint256(int256(IERC20(ct.asset()).balanceOf(address(ct))) + assetDelta) 2307 | | ); 2308 | | } else { 2309 | | alter_WETH( 2310 | | address(ct), 2311 | | uint256(int256(IERC20(ct.asset()).balanceOf(address(ct))) + assetDelta) 2312 | | ); 2313 | | } 2314 | | 2315 | | deal_Generic(address(ct), 1, owner, newShares, true, 0); // deal(address(ct), owner, newShares, true); 2316 | | } 2317 | | 2318 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////// 2319 | | // Loggers 2320 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////// 2321 | | 2322 | * | function log_tokenid_leg(TokenId t, uint256 leg) internal { 2323 | * | emit LogString("TokenId"); 2324 | * | emit LogUint256(" Asset", t.asset(leg)); 2325 | * | emit LogUint256(" Option ratio", t.optionRatio(leg)); 2326 | * | emit LogUint256(" Is long", t.isLong(leg)); 2327 | * | emit LogUint256(" Token type", t.tokenType(leg)); 2328 | * | emit LogUint256(" Risk partner", t.riskPartner(leg)); 2329 | * | emit LogInt256(" Strike tick", t.strike(leg)); 2330 | * | emit LogInt256(" Width", t.width(leg)); 2331 | | } 2332 | | 2333 | | function log_account_collaterals(address account) internal { 2334 | | uint c0s = collToken0.balanceOf(account); 2335 | | uint c1s = collToken1.balanceOf(account); 2336 | | uint c0a = collToken0.convertToAssets(collToken0.balanceOf(account)); 2337 | | uint c1a = collToken1.convertToAssets(collToken1.balanceOf(account)); 2338 | | 2339 | | emit LogAddress("Collaterals for address", account); 2340 | | emit LogUint256(" Token0 (shares)", c0s); 2341 | | emit LogUint256(" Token0 (assets)", c0a); 2342 | | emit LogUint256(" Token1 (shares)", c1s); 2343 | | emit LogUint256(" Token1 (assets)", c1a); 2344 | | } 2345 | | 2346 | | function log_trackers_status() internal { 2347 | | uint ts0 = collToken0.totalSupply(); 2348 | | uint ta0 = collToken0.totalAssets(); 2349 | | uint ts1 = collToken1.totalSupply(); 2350 | | uint ta1 = collToken1.totalAssets(); 2351 | | emit LogUint256("Total shares collateral 0:", ts0); 2352 | | emit LogUint256("Total assets collateral 0:", ta0); 2353 | | emit LogUint256("Total shares collateral 1:", ts1); 2354 | | emit LogUint256("Total assets collateral 1:", ta1); 2355 | | } 2356 | | 2357 | | function log_burn_simulation_results() internal { 2358 | | emit LogString("Burn simulation results"); 2359 | | emit LogUint256(" delegated0", burnSimResults.delegated0); 2360 | | emit LogUint256(" delegated1", burnSimResults.delegated1); 2361 | | emit LogUint256(" totalSupply0", burnSimResults.totalSupply0); 2362 | | emit LogUint256(" totalSupply1", burnSimResults.totalSupply1); 2363 | | emit LogUint256(" totalAssets0", burnSimResults.totalAssets0); 2364 | | emit LogUint256(" totalAssets1", burnSimResults.totalAssets1); 2365 | | emit LogUint256(" settledTokens0", burnSimResults.settledTokens0); 2366 | | emit LogInt256(" shareDelta0", burnSimResults.shareDelta0); 2367 | | emit LogInt256(" shareDelta1", burnSimResults.shareDelta1); 2368 | | emit LogInt256(" longPremium0", burnSimResults.longPremium0); 2369 | | emit LogInt256(" burnDelta0C", burnSimResults.burnDelta0C); 2370 | | emit LogInt256(" burnDelta0", burnSimResults.burnDelta0); 2371 | | emit LogInt256(" burnDelta1", burnSimResults.burnDelta1); 2372 | | emit LogInt256(" netExchanged L", burnSimResults.netExchanged.leftSlot()); 2373 | | emit LogInt256(" netExchanged R", burnSimResults.netExchanged.rightSlot()); 2374 | | emit LogUint256(" chunk", burnSimResults.settledTokens[0][0][0]); 2375 | | } 2376 | | 2377 | | function log_liquidation_results() internal { 2378 | | emit LogString("Liquidation results"); 2379 | | emit LogUint256(" margin0 L", liqResults.margin0.leftSlot()); 2380 | | emit LogUint256(" margin0 R", liqResults.margin0.rightSlot()); 2381 | | emit LogUint256(" margin1 L", liqResults.margin1.leftSlot()); 2382 | | emit LogUint256(" margin1 R", liqResults.margin1.rightSlot()); 2383 | | emit LogInt256(" bonus0", liqResults.bonus0); 2384 | | emit LogInt256(" bonus1", liqResults.bonus1); 2385 | | emit LogInt256(" sharesD0", liqResults.sharesD0); 2386 | | emit LogInt256(" sharesD1", liqResults.sharesD1); 2387 | | emit LogUint256(" liquidatorValueBefore0", liqResults.liquidatorValueBefore0); 2388 | | emit LogUint256(" liquidatorValueAfter0", liqResults.liquidatorValueAfter0); 2389 | | emit LogUint256(" settledTokens0", liqResults.settledTokens0); 2390 | | emit LogInt256(" premia L", liqResults.premia.leftSlot()); 2391 | | emit LogInt256(" premia R", liqResults.premia.rightSlot()); 2392 | | emit LogInt256(" bonusCombined0", liqResults.bonusCombined0); 2393 | | emit LogInt256(" protocolLoss0Actual", liqResults.protocolLoss0Actual); 2394 | | emit LogInt256(" protocolLoss0Expected", liqResults.protocolLoss0Expected); 2395 | | } 2396 | | } 2397 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/fuzz/echidna/GeneralActions.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: UNLICENSED 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.12; 3 | | 4 | | import "./FuzzHelpers.sol"; 5 | | 6 | | // (misc non-Panoptic-contract actions) 7 | | contract GeneralActions is FuzzHelpers { 8 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////// 9 | | // General mint functions 10 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////// 11 | | /// @dev Generate a single leg 12 | * | function _generate_single_leg_tokenid( 13 | | bool asset_in, 14 | | bool is_call_in, 15 | | bool is_long_in, 16 | | bool is_otm_in, 17 | | bool is_atm, 18 | | uint24 width_in, 19 | | int256 strike_in 20 | * | ) internal returns (TokenId out) { 21 | * | out = TokenId.wrap(poolId); 22 | | 23 | | // Rest of the parameters come from the function parameters 24 | * | uint256 asset = asset_in == true ? 1 : 0; 25 | * | uint256 call_put = is_call_in == true ? 1 - asset : asset; 26 | * | uint256 long_short = is_long_in == true ? 1 : 0; 27 | | 28 | * | int24 width; 29 | * | int24 strike; 30 | | 31 | * | (, currentTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 32 | | 33 | * | if (is_atm) { 34 | * | (width, strike) = getATMSW( 35 | | width_in, 36 | * | strike_in, 37 | * | uint24(poolTickSpacing), 38 | * | currentTick, 39 | * | call_put 40 | | ); 41 | * | } else if (is_otm_in) { 42 | * | (width, strike) = getOTMSW( 43 | | width_in, 44 | * | strike_in, 45 | * | uint24(poolTickSpacing), 46 | * | currentTick, 47 | * | call_put 48 | | ); 49 | | } else { 50 | * | (width, strike) = getITMSW( 51 | | width_in, 52 | * | strike_in, 53 | * | uint24(poolTickSpacing), 54 | * | currentTick, 55 | * | call_put 56 | | ); 57 | | } 58 | | 59 | * | out = out.addLeg(0, 1, asset, long_short, call_put, 0, strike, width); 60 | * | log_tokenid_leg(out, 0); 61 | | } 62 | | 63 | * | function _generate_multiple_leg_tokenid( 64 | | uint256 numLegs, 65 | | bool[4] memory asset_in, 66 | | bool[4] memory is_call_in, 67 | | bool[4] memory is_long_in, 68 | | bool[4] memory is_otm_in, 69 | | bool[4] memory is_atm_in, 70 | | uint24[4] memory width_in, 71 | | int256[4] memory strike_in 72 | | ) internal returns (TokenId out) { 73 | * | out = TokenId.wrap(poolId); 74 | | 75 | * | (, currentTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 76 | | 77 | | // The parameters come from the function parameters 78 | * | for (uint256 i = 0; i < numLegs; i++) { 79 | * | uint256 asset = asset_in[i] == true ? 1 : 0; 80 | * | uint256 call_put = is_call_in[i] == true ? 1 - asset : asset; 81 | * | uint256 long_short = is_long_in[i] == true ? 1 : 0; 82 | | 83 | * | int24 width; 84 | * | int24 strike; 85 | | 86 | * | if (is_atm_in[i]) { 87 | * | (width, strike) = getATMSW( 88 | * | width_in[i], 89 | * | strike_in[i], 90 | * | uint24(poolTickSpacing), 91 | * | currentTick, 92 | * | call_put 93 | | ); 94 | * | } else if (is_otm_in[i]) { 95 | * | (width, strike) = getOTMSW( 96 | * | width_in[i], 97 | * | strike_in[i], 98 | * | uint24(poolTickSpacing), 99 | * | currentTick, 100 | * | call_put 101 | | ); 102 | | } else { 103 | * | (width, strike) = getITMSW( 104 | * | width_in[i], 105 | * | strike_in[i], 106 | * | uint24(poolTickSpacing), 107 | * | currentTick, 108 | * | call_put 109 | | ); 110 | | } 111 | | 112 | * | out = out.addLeg(i, 1, asset, long_short, call_put, i, strike, width); 113 | * | log_tokenid_leg(out, i); 114 | | } 115 | | } 116 | | 117 | | ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 118 | | // Imported functions 119 | | ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 120 | | 121 | * | function getContext( 122 | | uint256 ts_, 123 | | int24 _currentTick, 124 | | int24 _width 125 | * | ) internal pure returns (int24 strikeOffset, int24 minTick, int24 maxTick) { 126 | * | int256 ts = int256(ts_); 127 | | 128 | * | strikeOffset = int24(_width % 2 == 0 ? int256(0) : ts / 2); 129 | | 130 | * | if (ts_ == 1) { 131 | | minTick = int24(((_currentTick - 4096) / ts) * ts); 132 | | maxTick = int24(((_currentTick + 4096) / ts) * ts); 133 | | } else { 134 | * | minTick = int24(((_currentTick - 4096 * 10) / ts) * ts); 135 | * | maxTick = int24(((_currentTick + 4096 * 10) / ts) * ts); 136 | | } 137 | | } 138 | | 139 | * | function getOTMSW( 140 | | uint256 _widthSeed, 141 | | int256 _strikeSeed, 142 | | uint256 ts_, 143 | | int24 _currentTick, 144 | | uint256 _tokenType 145 | * | ) internal view returns (int24 width, int24 strike) { 146 | * | int256 ts = int256(ts_); 147 | | 148 | * | width = ts == 1 149 | | ? width = int24(int256(bound(_widthSeed, 1, 1000))) 150 | * | : int24(int256(bound(_widthSeed, 1, (1000 * 10) / uint256(ts)))); 151 | * | int24 oneSidedRange = int24((width * ts) / 2); 152 | | 153 | * | int24 rangeDown; 154 | * | int24 rangeUp; 155 | * | (rangeDown, rangeUp) = PanopticMath.getRangesFromStrike(width, int24(ts)); 156 | | 157 | * | (int24 strikeOffset, int24 minTick, int24 maxTick) = getContext(ts_, _currentTick, width); 158 | | 159 | * | int24 lowerBound = _tokenType == 0 160 | * | ? int24(_currentTick + ts + oneSidedRange - strikeOffset) 161 | * | : int24(minTick + oneSidedRange - strikeOffset); 162 | * | int24 upperBound = _tokenType == 0 163 | * | ? int24(maxTick - oneSidedRange - strikeOffset) 164 | * | : int24(_currentTick - oneSidedRange - strikeOffset); 165 | | 166 | * | if (ts == 1) { 167 | | lowerBound = _tokenType == 0 168 | | ? int24(_currentTick + ts + rangeDown - strikeOffset) 169 | | : int24(minTick + rangeDown - strikeOffset); 170 | | upperBound = _tokenType == 0 171 | | ? int24(maxTick - rangeUp - strikeOffset) 172 | | : int24(_currentTick - rangeUp - strikeOffset); 173 | | } 174 | | 175 | | // strike MUST be defined as a multiple of tickSpacing because the range extends out equally on both sides, 176 | | // based on the width being divisibly by 2, it is then offset by either ts or ts / 2 177 | | strike = int24(int256(bound(_strikeSeed, lowerBound / ts, upperBound / ts))); 178 | | 179 | | strike = int24(strike * ts + strikeOffset); 180 | | } 181 | | 182 | * | function getITMSW( 183 | | uint256 _widthSeed, 184 | | int256 _strikeSeed, 185 | | uint256 ts_, 186 | | int24 _currentTick, 187 | | uint256 _tokenType 188 | * | ) internal view returns (int24 width, int24 strike) { 189 | * | int256 ts = int256(ts_); 190 | | 191 | * | width = ts == 1 192 | | ? width = int24(int256(bound(_widthSeed, 1, 1000))) 193 | * | : int24(int256(bound(_widthSeed, 1, (1000 * 10) / uint256(ts)))); 194 | * | int24 oneSidedRange = int24((width * ts) / 2); 195 | | 196 | * | int24 rangeDown; 197 | * | int24 rangeUp; 198 | * | (rangeDown, rangeUp) = PanopticMath.getRangesFromStrike(width, int24(ts)); 199 | | 200 | * | (int24 strikeOffset, int24 minTick, int24 maxTick) = getContext(ts_, _currentTick, width); 201 | | 202 | * | int24 lowerBound = _tokenType == 0 203 | * | ? int24(minTick + oneSidedRange - strikeOffset) 204 | * | : int24(_currentTick + oneSidedRange - strikeOffset); 205 | * | int24 upperBound = _tokenType == 0 206 | * | ? int24(_currentTick + ts - oneSidedRange - strikeOffset) 207 | * | : int24(maxTick - oneSidedRange - strikeOffset); 208 | | 209 | * | if (ts == 1) { 210 | | lowerBound = _tokenType == 0 211 | | ? int24(minTick + rangeDown - strikeOffset) 212 | | : int24(_currentTick + rangeDown - strikeOffset); 213 | | upperBound = _tokenType == 0 214 | | ? int24(_currentTick + ts - rangeUp - strikeOffset) 215 | | : int24(maxTick - rangeUp - strikeOffset); 216 | | } 217 | | 218 | | // strike MUST be defined as a multiple of tickSpacing because the range extends out equally on both sides, 219 | | // based on the width being divisibly by 2, it is then offset by either ts or ts / 2 220 | | strike = int24(bound(_strikeSeed, lowerBound / ts, upperBound / ts)); 221 | | 222 | | strike = int24(strike * ts + strikeOffset); 223 | | } 224 | | 225 | * | function getATMSW( 226 | | uint256 _widthSeed, 227 | | int256 _strikeSeed, 228 | | uint256 ts_, 229 | | int24 _currentTick, 230 | | uint256 _tokenType 231 | * | ) internal view returns (int24 width, int24 strike) { 232 | * | int256 ts = int256(ts_); 233 | | 234 | * | width = ts == 1 235 | | ? width = int24(int256(bound(_widthSeed, 1, 1000))) 236 | * | : int24(int256(bound(_widthSeed, 1, (1000 * 10) / uint256(ts)))); 237 | * | int24 oneSidedRange = int24((width * ts) / 2); 238 | | 239 | * | int24 rangeDown; 240 | * | int24 rangeUp; 241 | * | (rangeDown, rangeUp) = PanopticMath.getRangesFromStrike(width, int24(ts)); 242 | | 243 | * | (int24 strikeOffset, int24 minTick, int24 maxTick) = getContext(ts_, _currentTick, width); 244 | | 245 | * | int24 lowerBound = int24(_currentTick + ts - oneSidedRange - strikeOffset); 246 | * | int24 upperBound = int24(_currentTick + oneSidedRange - strikeOffset); 247 | | 248 | * | if (ts == 1) { 249 | | lowerBound = int24(_currentTick + rangeDown - strikeOffset); 250 | | upperBound = int24(_currentTick + ts - rangeUp - strikeOffset); 251 | | } 252 | | 253 | | // strike MUST be defined as a multiple of tickSpacing because the range extends out equally on both sides, 254 | | // based on the width being divisibly by 2, it is then offset by either ts or ts / 2 255 | * | strike = int24(bound(_strikeSeed, lowerBound / ts, upperBound / ts)); 256 | | 257 | * | strike = int24(strike * ts + strikeOffset); 258 | | } 259 | | 260 | | function getValidSW( 261 | | uint256 _widthSeed, 262 | | int256 _strikeSeed, 263 | | uint256 ts_, 264 | | int24 _currentTick 265 | | ) internal view returns (int24 width, int24 strike) { 266 | | int256 ts = int256(ts_); 267 | | 268 | | width = ts == 1 269 | | ? width = int24(int256(bound(_widthSeed, 1, 1000))) 270 | | : int24(int256(bound(_widthSeed, 1, 1000))); 271 | | 272 | | int24 rangeDown; 273 | | int24 rangeUp; 274 | | (rangeDown, rangeUp) = PanopticMath.getRangesFromStrike(width, int24(ts)); 275 | | 276 | | (int24 strikeOffset, int24 minTick, int24 maxTick) = getContext(ts_, _currentTick, width); 277 | | 278 | | int24 lowerBound = int24(minTick + rangeDown - strikeOffset); 279 | | int24 upperBound = int24(maxTick - rangeUp - strikeOffset); 280 | | 281 | | // strike MUST be defined as a multiple of tickSpacing because the range extends out equally on both sides, 282 | | // based on the width being divisibly by 2, it is then offset by either ts or ts / 2 283 | | strike = int24(bound(_strikeSeed, lowerBound / ts, upperBound / ts)); 284 | | 285 | | strike = int24(strike * ts + strikeOffset); 286 | | } 287 | | 288 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////// 289 | | // Funds and pool manipulation 290 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////// 291 | | 292 | | /// @dev Mint USDC and WETH to the sender and approve all the system contracts 293 | * | function fund_and_approve() public { 294 | * | deal_USDC(msg.sender, 10000000 ether); 295 | * | deal_WETH(msg.sender, 10000 ether); 296 | | 297 | * | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 298 | * | IERC20(USDC).approve(address(router), type(uint256).max); 299 | * | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 300 | * | IERC20(WETH).approve(address(router), type(uint256).max); 301 | * | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 302 | * | IERC20(USDC).approve(address(panopticPool), type(uint256).max); 303 | * | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 304 | * | IERC20(WETH).approve(address(panopticPool), type(uint256).max); 305 | * | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 306 | * | IERC20(USDC).approve(address(collToken0), type(uint256).max); 307 | * | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 308 | * | IERC20(WETH).approve(address(collToken1), type(uint256).max); 309 | * | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 310 | * | IERC20(USDC).approve(address(sfpm), type(uint256).max); 311 | * | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 312 | * | IERC20(WETH).approve(address(sfpm), type(uint256).max); 313 | | } 314 | | 315 | * | function perform_swap(uint160 target_sqrt_price) public { 316 | * | uint160 price; 317 | | 318 | * | (price, , , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 319 | | 320 | | // bound the price between 10 and 500000 and 50% of the current price 321 | * | target_sqrt_price = uint160( 322 | * | bound( 323 | | price, 324 | | uint256( 325 | * | Math.max( 326 | * | int256(Math.mulDiv(price, 7_071, 10_000)), 327 | | 112028621795169773357271145775104 328 | | ) 329 | | ), 330 | | uint256( 331 | * | Math.min( 332 | * | int256(Math.mulDiv(price, 14_142, 10_000)), 333 | | 25054084147398268684193622782902272 334 | | ) 335 | | ) 336 | | ) 337 | | ); 338 | | 339 | * | emit LogUint256("price before swap", uint256(price)); 340 | | 341 | * | hevm.prank(pool_manipulator); 342 | * | swapperc.swapTo(pool, target_sqrt_price); 343 | | 344 | * | (price, , , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 345 | * | emit LogUint256("price after swap", uint256(price)); 346 | | } 347 | | } 348 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/fuzz/echidna/PanopticPoolActions.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: UNLICENSED 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.12; 3 | | 4 | | import "./FuzzHelpers.sol"; 5 | | import {CollateralActions} from "./CollateralActions.sol"; 6 | | 7 | *r | contract PanopticPoolActions is CollateralActions { 8 | | /*////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 9 | | OPTION MINTING 10 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/ 11 | | 12 | * | function mint_option( 13 | | uint256[4] memory isLongs, 14 | | uint256[4] memory tokenTypes, 15 | | uint256[4] memory widthSeeds, 16 | | int256[4] memory strikeSeeds, 17 | | uint256[4] memory ratioSeeds, 18 | | uint256[4] memory riskPartnerSeeds, 19 | | uint256[4] memory assets, 20 | | bool[5] memory distributions, 21 | | int24[2] memory tickLimitSeeds, 22 | | uint256 positionSize, 23 | | uint256 numLegs 24 | | ) public { 25 | * | emit LogAddress("actor", msg.sender); 26 | | 27 | * | ($tickLimitLow, $tickLimitHigh) = (tickLimitSeeds[0], tickLimitSeeds[1]); 28 | | 29 | * | $numLegs = bound(numLegs, 1, 4); 30 | | 31 | * | $posIdListOld = userPositions[msg.sender]; 32 | | 33 | * | userPositions[msg.sender].push(TokenId.wrap(poolId)); 34 | | 35 | * | (, currentTick, observationIndex, observationCardinality, , , ) = pool.slot0(); 36 | | 37 | * | ($slowOracleTick, ) = panopticHelper.computeInternalMedian( 38 | * | 60, 39 | * | uint256(hevm.load(address(panopticPool), bytes32(uint256(1)))), 40 | * | pool 41 | | ); 42 | | 43 | * | $safeMode = Math.abs($slowOracleTick - currentTick) > 953; 44 | | 45 | * | if ($safeMode) { 46 | * | if ($tickLimitLow > $tickLimitHigh) { 47 | * | ($tickLimitLow, $tickLimitHigh) = ($tickLimitHigh, $tickLimitLow); 48 | | } 49 | | } 50 | | 51 | * | $found = false; 52 | * | for (uint256 i = 0; i < $numLegs; ++i) { 53 | * | $tokenTypes[i] = bound(tokenTypes[i], 0, 1); 54 | * | $isLongs[i] = bound(isLongs[i], 0, 4); 55 | * | $isLongs[i] = $isLongs[i] > 1 ? 0 : $isLongs[i]; 56 | * | $assets[i] = bound(assets[i], 0, 1); 57 | * | $ratios[i] = distributions[4] ? 1 : bound(ratioSeeds[i], 1, 127); 58 | * | $riskPartners[i] = distributions[2] ? i : bound(riskPartnerSeeds[i], 0, $numLegs - 1); 59 | | 60 | * | if ($isLongs[i] == 0) { 61 | * | ($widths[i], $strikes[i]) = getValidSW( 62 | * | widthSeeds[i], 63 | * | strikeSeeds[i], 64 | * | uint24(poolTickSpacing), 65 | * | currentTick, 66 | * | distributions[0] 67 | | ); 68 | | 69 | * | touchedPanopticChunks.push( 70 | * | ChunkWithTokenType($strikes[i], $widths[i], $tokenTypes[i]) 71 | | ); 72 | | } else { 73 | | // pick a random chunk -- very likely to fail due to no liquidity 74 | * | if (touchedPanopticChunks.length == 0) { 75 | * | ($widths[i], $strikes[i]) = getValidSW( 76 | * | widthSeeds[i], 77 | | strikeSeeds[i], 78 | | uint24(poolTickSpacing), 79 | | currentTick, 80 | | distributions[0] 81 | | ); 82 | | } 83 | | // pick a chunk that has already been interacted with before -- reasonable probability of success 84 | * | else if (distributions[3] && false) { 85 | | ChunkWithTokenType memory __chunk = touchedPanopticChunks[ 86 | | bound( 87 | * | uint256(keccak256(abi.encodePacked(positionSize))), 88 | | 0, 89 | * | touchedPanopticChunks.length - 1 90 | | ) 91 | | ]; 92 | | 93 | | $widths[i] = __chunk.width; 94 | | $strikes[i] = __chunk.strike; 95 | | } 96 | | // pick a chunk with some liquidity and reverse the position size to it 97 | * | else { 98 | * | bool found; 99 | | // look through all chunks starting at a random index until one with liquidity is found 100 | * | for ( 101 | * | uint256 j = bound( 102 | * | uint256(keccak256(abi.encodePacked(positionSize))), 103 | | 0, 104 | | touchedPanopticChunks.length - 1 105 | | ); 106 | * | j < touchedPanopticChunks.length; 107 | * | j++ 108 | | ) { 109 | * | ChunkWithTokenType memory __chunk = touchedPanopticChunks[j]; 110 | | 111 | * | emit LogInt256("chunk strike", __chunk.strike); 112 | * | emit LogInt256("chunk width", __chunk.width); 113 | * | emit LogUint256("chunk token type", __chunk.tokenType); 114 | * | ($tickLower, $tickUpper) = PanopticMath.getTicks( 115 | * | __chunk.strike, 116 | * | __chunk.width, 117 | * | poolTickSpacing 118 | | ); 119 | | 120 | * | if ( 121 | * | sfpm 122 | | .getAccountLiquidity( 123 | * | address(pool), 124 | * | address(panopticPool), 125 | * | __chunk.tokenType, 126 | * | $tickLower, 127 | * | $tickUpper 128 | | ) 129 | | .rightSlot() > 0 130 | | ) { 131 | | $widths[i] = __chunk.width; 132 | | $strikes[i] = __chunk.strike; 133 | | found = true; 134 | | $found = true; 135 | | break; 136 | | } 137 | | } 138 | | 139 | * | if (!found) { 140 | * | ($widths[i], $strikes[i]) = getValidSW( 141 | * | widthSeeds[i], 142 | * | strikeSeeds[i], 143 | * | uint24(poolTickSpacing), 144 | * | currentTick, 145 | * | distributions[0] 146 | | ); 147 | | } 148 | | } 149 | | } 150 | | 151 | * | userPositions[msg.sender][userPositions[msg.sender].length - 1] = userPositions[ 152 | * | msg.sender 153 | * | ][userPositions[msg.sender].length - 1].addLeg( 154 | * | i, 155 | * | $ratios[i], 156 | * | $assets[i], 157 | * | $isLongs[i], 158 | * | $tokenTypes[i], 159 | * | $riskPartners[i], 160 | * | $strikes[i], 161 | * | $widths[i] 162 | | ); 163 | | } 164 | | 165 | * | uint256 userCollateral0 = collToken0.convertToAssets(collToken0.balanceOf(msg.sender)); 166 | * | uint256 userCollateral1 = collToken1.convertToAssets(collToken1.balanceOf(msg.sender)); 167 | | 168 | * | positionSize = uint128( 169 | * | distributions[1] 170 | * | ? bound(positionSize, 0, 1_000_000_000 * 2 ** 64) 171 | * | : bound(positionSize, 0, 2 * 2 ** 64) 172 | | ); 173 | | 174 | * | try this.size_for_collateral_solo(positionSize, userCollateral0, userCollateral1) {} catch ( 175 | | bytes memory reason 176 | | ) { 177 | * | emit LogBytes("Reason", reason); 178 | | } 179 | | 180 | * | positionSize = uint128( 181 | * | size_for_collateral_solo(positionSize, userCollateral0, userCollateral1) 182 | | ); 183 | | 184 | * | $positionSizeActive = uint128(positionSize); 185 | | 186 | * | $tokenIdActive = userPositions[msg.sender][userPositions[msg.sender].length - 1]; 187 | | 188 | * | $sfpmBal = sfpm.balanceOf(address(panopticPool), TokenId.unwrap($tokenIdActive)); 189 | | 190 | * | $maxTransfer0 = 0; 191 | * | $maxTransfer1 = 0; 192 | | 193 | * | $netTokenTransfers0 = 0; 194 | * | $netTokenTransfers1 = 0; 195 | | 196 | * | $shouldRevert = false; 197 | | 198 | | // and check if should revert due to 0 liquidity 199 | * | write_mintburn_transfer_amts(); 200 | | 201 | | // pool has insufficient tokens to mint the option 202 | * | $shouldRevert = $shouldRevert 203 | * | ? $shouldRevert 204 | | : $maxTransfer0 > int256(USDC.balanceOf(address(panopticPool))) || 205 | | $maxTransfer1 > int256(WETH.balanceOf(address(panopticPool))); 206 | | 207 | * | emit LogUint256("maxTransfer0", uint256($maxTransfer0)); 208 | * | emit LogUint256("maxTransfer1", uint256($maxTransfer1)); 209 | * | emit LogInt256("pool balance 0", int256(USDC.balanceOf(address(panopticPool)))); 210 | * | emit LogInt256("pool balance 1", int256(WETH.balanceOf(address(panopticPool)))); 211 | * | emit LogBool("should revert due to insufficient pool tokens", $shouldRevert); 212 | | 213 | | // position has already been minted 214 | * | for (uint256 i = 0; i < userPositions[msg.sender].length - 1; ++i) { 215 | | $shouldRevert = $shouldRevert 216 | | ? $shouldRevert 217 | | : TokenId.unwrap($tokenIdActive) == TokenId.unwrap(userPositions[msg.sender][i]); 218 | | emit LogBool("should revert due to position already minted", $shouldRevert); 219 | | } 220 | | 221 | * | emit LogInt256("Net token transfers 0", $maxTransfer0); 222 | * | emit LogInt256("Net token transfers 1", $maxTransfer1); 223 | * | emit LogInt256("pool balance 0", int256(USDC.balanceOf(address(panopticPool)))); 224 | * | emit LogInt256("pool balance 1", int256(WETH.balanceOf(address(panopticPool)))); 225 | | 226 | | // get SFPM swapped/premium collect amounts and expected fast/slow oracle ticks post-mint 227 | * | quote_sfpm_mint(); 228 | * | emit LogInt256("$totalSwapped.rs", $totalSwapped.rightSlot()); 229 | * | emit LogInt256("$totalSwapped.ls", $totalSwapped.leftSlot()); 230 | | 231 | * | ($longAmounts, $shortAmounts) = PanopticMath.computeExercisedAmounts( 232 | * | $tokenIdActive, 233 | * | $positionSizeActive 234 | | ); 235 | | 236 | | //checked 237 | | 238 | | // intrinsic val 239 | * | $colDelta0 = -($totalSwapped.rightSlot() - 240 | * | ($shortAmounts.rightSlot() - $longAmounts.rightSlot())); 241 | * | emit LogInt256("intrinsicDelta0", $colDelta0); 242 | * | $colDelta1 = -($totalSwapped.leftSlot() - 243 | * | ($shortAmounts.leftSlot() - $longAmounts.leftSlot())); 244 | * | emit LogInt256("intrinsicDelta1", $colDelta1); 245 | | 246 | * | $intrinsicDelta0 = $colDelta0; 247 | * | $intrinsicDelta1 = $colDelta1; 248 | | 249 | | // ITM spread + commission 250 | * | $commission0 = int256( 251 | * | Math.unsafeDivRoundingUp( 252 | * | (uint256(Math.abs($colDelta0)) * pool.fee() * 2), 253 | * | (10_000 * 100) 254 | | ) + 255 | * | Math.unsafeDivRoundingUp( 256 | * | (uint256(uint128($shortAmounts.rightSlot())) + 257 | * | uint128($longAmounts.rightSlot())) * 10, 258 | * | 10_000 259 | | ) 260 | | ); 261 | * | $commission1 = int256( 262 | * | Math.unsafeDivRoundingUp( 263 | * | (uint256(Math.abs($colDelta1)) * pool.fee() * 2), 264 | | (10_000 * 100) 265 | | ) + 266 | * | Math.unsafeDivRoundingUp( 267 | * | (uint256(uint128($shortAmounts.leftSlot())) + 268 | * | uint128($longAmounts.leftSlot())) * 10, 269 | | 10_000 270 | | ) 271 | | ); 272 | | 273 | * | $colDelta0 -= $commission0; 274 | * | $colDelta1 -= $commission1; 275 | | 276 | | // checked, NOFAIL 277 | | 278 | * | ($premia0, $premia1, $posBalanceArray) = panopticPool.calculateAccumulatedFeesBatch( 279 | * | msg.sender, 280 | | false, 281 | * | $posIdListOld 282 | | ); 283 | | 284 | * | ($poolAssets0, $inAMM0, ) = collToken0.getPoolData(); 285 | * | ($poolAssets1, $inAMM1, ) = collToken1.getPoolData(); 286 | | 287 | * | $poolAssets0 = uint256(int256($poolAssets0) - $totalSwapped.rightSlot()); 288 | * | $poolAssets1 = uint256(int256($poolAssets1) - $totalSwapped.leftSlot()); 289 | | 290 | * | $inAMM0 = uint256(int256($inAMM0) + $shortAmounts.rightSlot() - $longAmounts.rightSlot()); 291 | * | $inAMM1 = uint256(int256($inAMM1) + $shortAmounts.leftSlot() - $longAmounts.leftSlot()); 292 | | 293 | * | $poolUtil0 = ($inAMM0 * 10_000) / ($poolAssets0 + $inAMM0); 294 | * | emit LogUint256("poolUtil0", $poolUtil0); 295 | * | $poolUtil1 = ($inAMM1 * 10_000) / ($poolAssets1 + $inAMM1); 296 | | 297 | * | if ($safeMode) ($poolUtil0, $poolUtil1) = (10_000, 10_000); 298 | | 299 | * | emit LogUint256("poolUtil1", $poolUtil1); 300 | | 301 | | // checked, FAIL 302 | | unchecked { 303 | * | $posBalanceArray.push( 304 | | [ 305 | * | TokenId.unwrap($tokenIdActive), 306 | | LeftRightUnsigned.unwrap( 307 | * | LeftRightUnsigned.wrap(0).toRightSlot($positionSizeActive).toLeftSlot( 308 | * | uint128($poolUtil0 + uint128($poolUtil1 << 64)) 309 | | ) 310 | | ) 311 | | ] 312 | | ); 313 | | } 314 | | 315 | * | $totalAssets0 = collToken0.totalAssets(); 316 | * | $totalAssets1 = collToken1.totalAssets(); 317 | * | $totalSupply0 = collToken0.totalSupply(); 318 | * | $totalSupply1 = collToken1.totalSupply(); 319 | | 320 | * | if ( 321 | * | !(-(($colDelta0 > 0 ? int8(1) : -1) * 322 | | int256( 323 | * | Math.mulDivRoundingUp( 324 | * | uint256(Math.abs($colDelta0)), 325 | * | $totalSupply0, 326 | * | $totalAssets0 327 | | ) 328 | | )) > 329 | * | int256(collToken0.balanceOf(msg.sender)) || 330 | * | -(($colDelta1 > 0 ? int8(1) : -1) * 331 | | int256( 332 | * | Math.mulDivRoundingUp( 333 | * | uint256(Math.abs($colDelta1)), 334 | * | $totalSupply1, 335 | * | $totalAssets1 336 | | ) 337 | | )) > 338 | * | int256(collToken1.balanceOf(msg.sender))) 339 | | ) { 340 | * | $balance0ExpectedP = Math.mulDiv( 341 | | uint256( 342 | * | int256(collToken0.balanceOf(msg.sender)) + 343 | * | ($colDelta0 * int256($totalSupply0)) / 344 | * | int256($totalAssets0) 345 | | ), 346 | * | uint256(int256($totalAssets0) + $colDelta0 + $commission0), 347 | | uint256( 348 | * | int256($totalSupply0) + 349 | * | ($colDelta0 * int256($totalSupply0)) / 350 | * | int256($totalAssets0) 351 | | ) 352 | | ); 353 | * | $balance1ExpectedP = Math.mulDiv( 354 | | uint256( 355 | * | int256(collToken1.balanceOf(msg.sender)) + 356 | * | ($colDelta1 * int256($totalSupply1)) / 357 | * | int256($totalAssets1) 358 | | ), 359 | * | uint256(int256($totalAssets1) + $colDelta1 + $commission1), 360 | | uint256( 361 | * | int256($totalSupply1) + 362 | * | ($colDelta1 * int256($totalSupply1)) / 363 | * | int256($totalAssets1) 364 | | ) 365 | | ); 366 | | 367 | * | _write_revert_due_solvency(msg.sender, 13_333); 368 | | 369 | * | emit LogInt256("colDelta0", $colDelta0); 370 | * | emit LogInt256("colDelta1", $colDelta1); 371 | * | emit LogUint256("bal0", $balance0ExpectedP); 372 | * | emit LogUint256("bal1", $balance1ExpectedP); 373 | * | emit LogUint256("balCross", $balanceCross); 374 | * | emit LogUint256("thresholdCross", $thresholdCross); 375 | * | emit LogInt256("fast tick", $fastOracleTick); 376 | * | emit LogBool("revert due to collateral shortfall", $shouldRevert); 377 | | } else { 378 | | $shouldRevert = true; 379 | | 380 | | emit LogUint256("$tokenData0.rightSlot()", $tokenData0.rightSlot()); 381 | | emit LogUint256("$tokenData1.rightSlot()", $tokenData1.rightSlot()); 382 | | emit LogInt256("$colDelta0", $colDelta0); 383 | | emit LogInt256("$colDelta1", $colDelta1); 384 | | emit LogBool("revert due to insufficient collateral to cover delta", $shouldRevert); 385 | | } 386 | | 387 | * | $balance0Origin = int256(collToken0.convertToAssets(collToken0.balanceOf(msg.sender))); 388 | * | $balance1Origin = int256(collToken1.convertToAssets(collToken1.balanceOf(msg.sender))); 389 | | 390 | | // assert(!($found && $positionSizeActive != 0)); 391 | * | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 392 | * | try 393 | * | panopticPool.mintOptions( 394 | * | userPositions[msg.sender], 395 | * | uint128($positionSizeActive), 396 | * | type(uint64).max, 397 | * | $tickLimitLow, 398 | * | $tickLimitHigh 399 | | ) 400 | | { 401 | | $allPositionCount++; 402 | | assertWithMsg(!$shouldRevert, "mintOptions: missing revert"); 403 | | } catch (bytes memory reason) { 404 | * | emit LogBytes("Reason", reason); 405 | | 406 | * | assertWithMsg($shouldRevert, "mintOptions: unexpected revert"); 407 | * | $failedPositionCount++; 408 | | // reverse test state changes (i.e. positionidlist) 409 | *r | revert(); 410 | | } 411 | | 412 | | assertWithMsg( 413 | | sfpm.balanceOf(address(panopticPool), TokenId.unwrap($tokenIdActive)) - $sfpmBal == 414 | | $positionSizeActive, 415 | | "mintOptions: incorrect amount of SFPM tokens minted" 416 | | ); 417 | | 418 | | $balance0Final = int256( 419 | | Math.mulDiv(collToken0.balanceOf(msg.sender), $totalAssets0, $totalSupply0) 420 | | ); 421 | | $balance1Final = int256( 422 | | Math.mulDiv(collToken1.balanceOf(msg.sender), $totalAssets1, $totalSupply1) 423 | | ); 424 | | 425 | | emit LogInt256("Balance 0 expected", $balance0Origin + $colDelta0); 426 | | emit LogInt256("deltaE0", $colDelta0); 427 | | emit LogInt256("Balance 0", $balance0Final); 428 | | assertWithMsg( 429 | | Math.abs(int256($balance0Final) - int256($balance0Origin + $colDelta0)) <= 10, 430 | | "Balance 0 mismatch" 431 | | ); 432 | | 433 | | emit LogInt256("Balance 1 expected", $balance1Origin + $colDelta1); 434 | | emit LogInt256("deltaE1", $colDelta1); 435 | | emit LogInt256("Balance 1", $balance1Final); 436 | | assertWithMsg( 437 | | Math.abs(int256($balance1Final) - int256($balance1Origin + $colDelta1)) <= 10, 438 | | "Balance 1 mismatch" 439 | | ); 440 | | } 441 | | 442 | | /*////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 443 | | OPTION BURNING 444 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/ 445 | | 446 | | /*////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 447 | | SETTLE LONG PREMIUM 448 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/ 449 | | 450 | * | function try_settle_long(uint256 position, bool search) public { 451 | * | $allPositionOwners = new address[](0); 452 | * | $allPositions = new TokenId[](0); 453 | * | for (uint256 i = 0; i < actors.length; ++i) { 454 | * | for (uint256 j = 0; j < userPositions[actors[i]].length; ++j) { 455 | | $allPositionOwners.push(actors[i]); 456 | | $allPositions.push(userPositions[actors[i]][j]); 457 | | } 458 | | } 459 | | 460 | | // find a position with at least one long leg 461 | * | if (search) { 462 | * | bool isLong; 463 | | for ( 464 | * | uint256 i = bound(position, 0, $allPositions.length - 1); 465 | | i < $allPositions.length; 466 | | ++i 467 | | ) { 468 | | for (uint256 j = 0; j < $allPositions[i].countLegs(); ++j) { 469 | | if ($allPositions[i].isLong(j) == 1) { 470 | | $tokenIdActive = $allPositions[i]; 471 | | $settlee = $allPositionOwners[i]; 472 | | 473 | | // pick a random leg 474 | | $settleIndex = bound(position, 0, $allPositions[i].countLegs() - 1); 475 | | isLong = true; 476 | | break; 477 | | } 478 | | } 479 | | } 480 | | if (!isLong) { 481 | | ($settlee, $tokenIdActive, $settleIndex) = ( 482 | | $allPositionOwners[bound(position, 0, $allPositions.length - 1)], 483 | | $allPositions[bound(position, 0, $allPositions.length - 1)], 484 | | bound( 485 | | position, 486 | | 0, 487 | | $allPositions[bound(position, 0, $allPositions.length - 1)].countLegs() - 1 488 | | ) 489 | | ); 490 | | } 491 | | } else { 492 | | ($settlee, $tokenIdActive, $settleIndex) = ( 493 | * | $allPositionOwners[bound(position, 0, $allPositions.length - 1)], 494 | | $allPositions[bound(position, 0, $allPositions.length - 1)], 495 | | bound( 496 | | position, 497 | | 0, 498 | | $allPositions[bound(position, 0, $allPositions.length - 1)].countLegs() - 1 499 | | ) 500 | | ); 501 | | } 502 | | $shouldRevert = false; 503 | | 504 | | if ($tokenIdActive.isLong($settleIndex) != 1) $shouldRevert = true; 505 | | emit LogBool( 506 | | "revert due to position not being long", 507 | | $tokenIdActive.isLong($settleIndex) != 1 508 | | ); 509 | | 510 | | // 1. calculate what the premium settled out to settlee _should_ be 511 | | // NOTE: this is basically trying to get re-calc a value in s_options - 512 | | // probably derived from logic in closePosition / getPremium 513 | | (uint128 premium0, uint128 premium1) = _calc_premium_for_each_token( 514 | | $settlee, 515 | | $tokenIdActive, 516 | | $settleIndex 517 | | ); 518 | | 519 | | $totalAssets0 = collToken0.totalAssets(); 520 | | $totalAssets1 = collToken1.totalAssets(); 521 | | $totalSupply0 = collToken0.totalSupply(); 522 | | $totalSupply1 = collToken1.totalSupply(); 523 | | if ( 524 | | !(Math.mulDivRoundingUp(premium0, $totalSupply0, $totalAssets0) > 525 | | collToken0.balanceOf($settlee) || 526 | | Math.mulDivRoundingUp(premium1, $totalSupply1, $totalAssets1) > 527 | | collToken1.balanceOf($settlee)) 528 | | ) { 529 | | ($colTicks[0], $colTicks[1], $colTicks[2], $colTicks[3], ) = PanopticMath 530 | | .getOracleTicks( 531 | | pool, 532 | | uint256(hevm.load(address(panopticPool), bytes32(uint256(1)))) 533 | | ); 534 | | 535 | | $balance0ExpectedP = collToken0.convertToAssets(collToken0.balanceOf($settlee)); 536 | | $balance1ExpectedP = collToken1.convertToAssets(collToken1.balanceOf($settlee)); 537 | | 538 | | _write_revert_due_solvency($settlee, 10_000); 539 | | 540 | | emit LogBool("revert due to collateral shortfall", $shouldRevert); 541 | | } else { 542 | | $shouldRevert = true; 543 | | 544 | | emit LogBool("revert due to insufficient collateral to cover delta", true); 545 | | } 546 | | 547 | | // 2. get users balance in CT before any settling occurs 548 | | $balance0Origin = int256(collToken0.convertToAssets(collToken0.balanceOf($settlee))); 549 | | $balance1Origin = int256(collToken1.convertToAssets(collToken1.balanceOf($settlee))); 550 | | 551 | | (uint128 settledForChunkBefore0, uint128 settledForChunkBefore1, , ) = panopticPool 552 | | .premiaSettlementData($tokenIdActive, $settleIndex); 553 | | 554 | | // 3. trigger a settlement of long premium 555 | | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 556 | | try 557 | | panopticPool.settleLongPremium( 558 | | _move_tokenid_to_end(userPositions[$settlee], $tokenIdActive), 559 | | $settlee, 560 | | $settleIndex 561 | | ) 562 | | { 563 | | assertWithMsg(!$shouldRevert, "SettleLongPremium: missing revert"); 564 | | } catch { 565 | | assertWithMsg($shouldRevert, "SettleLongPremium: unexpected revert"); 566 | | revert(); 567 | | } 568 | | 569 | | // 4. get accumulated settledTokens for each CT and ensure it increased by calc'ed premium amount 570 | | (uint128 settledForChunkAfter0, uint128 settledForChunkAfter1, , ) = panopticPool 571 | | .premiaSettlementData($tokenIdActive, $settleIndex); 572 | | 573 | | assertWithMsg( 574 | | settledForChunkAfter0 == (settledForChunkBefore0 + premium0) && 575 | | settledForChunkAfter1 == (settledForChunkBefore1 + premium1), 576 | | "Settled tokens for chunk recorded in CT did not increase by calculated premium" 577 | | ); 578 | | 579 | | // 5. get users balance in CT after, and assert it reduced by appropriate amounts 580 | | assertWithMsg( 581 | | ($balance0Origin - int256(collToken0.convertToAssets(collToken0.balanceOf($settlee))) == 582 | | int256(uint256(premium0))) && 583 | | ($balance1Origin - 584 | | int256(collToken1.convertToAssets(collToken1.balanceOf($settlee))) == 585 | | int256(uint256(premium1))), 586 | | "User receiving settled long premia had their assets in the CT decrease by an amount other than the calculated premiums" 587 | | ); 588 | | } 589 | | 590 | | function _calc_premium_for_each_token( 591 | | address settlee, 592 | | TokenId position, 593 | | uint256 longIndex 594 | | ) internal returns (uint128 premium0, uint128 premium1) { 595 | | (uint128 numContractsOfPosition, , ) = panopticPool.optionPositionBalance( 596 | | settlee, 597 | | position 598 | | ); 599 | | uint128 liquidity = PanopticMath 600 | | .getLiquidityChunk(position, longIndex, numContractsOfPosition) 601 | | .liquidity(); 602 | | 603 | | (uint128 optionData0, uint128 optionData1) = panopticPool.optionData( 604 | | position, 605 | | settlee, 606 | | longIndex 607 | | ); 608 | | 609 | | (, currentTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 610 | | uint256 tokenType = position.tokenType(longIndex); 611 | | (int24 tickLower, int24 tickUpper) = position.asTicks(longIndex); 612 | | (uint128 premiumAccumulator0, uint128 premiumAccumulator1) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 613 | | address(pool), 614 | | address(panopticPool), 615 | | tokenType, 616 | | tickLower, 617 | | tickUpper, 618 | | currentTick, 619 | | 1 620 | | ); 621 | | premium0 = ((premiumAccumulator0 - optionData0) * liquidity) >> 64; 622 | | premium1 = ((premiumAccumulator1 - optionData1) * liquidity) >> 64; 623 | | emit LogUint256("premium0-calc", premium0); 624 | | emit LogUint256("premium1-calc", premium1); 625 | | } 626 | | 627 | | /*////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 628 | | FORCE EXERCISE 629 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/ 630 | | 631 | * | function force_exercise(uint256 position, bool search) public { 632 | * | $allPositionOwners = new address[](0); 633 | * | $allPositions = new TokenId[](0); 634 | * | for (uint256 i = 0; i < actors.length; ++i) { 635 | * | for (uint256 j = 0; j < userPositions[actors[i]].length; ++j) { 636 | | $allPositionOwners.push(actors[i]); 637 | | $allPositions.push(userPositions[actors[i]][j]); 638 | | } 639 | | } 640 | | 641 | | // find a position with at least one long leg - reasonably high probability of being exercisable 642 | * | if (search) { 643 | * | bool isLong; 644 | | for ( 645 | * | uint256 i = bound(position, 0, $allPositions.length - 1); 646 | | i < $allPositions.length; 647 | | ++i 648 | | ) { 649 | | for (uint256 j = 0; j < $allPositions[i].countLegs(); ++j) { 650 | | if ($allPositions[i].isLong(j) == 1) { 651 | | $tokenIdActive = $allPositions[i]; 652 | | $exercisee = $allPositionOwners[i]; 653 | | isLong = true; 654 | | break; 655 | | } 656 | | } 657 | | if (isLong) break; 658 | | } 659 | | if (!isLong) { 660 | | ($exercisee, $tokenIdActive) = ( 661 | | $allPositionOwners[bound(position, 0, $allPositions.length - 1)], 662 | | $allPositions[bound(position, 0, $allPositions.length - 1)] 663 | | ); 664 | | } 665 | | } else { 666 | | ($exercisee, $tokenIdActive) = ( 667 | * | $allPositionOwners[bound(position, 0, $allPositions.length - 1)], 668 | | $allPositions[bound(position, 0, $allPositions.length - 1)] 669 | | ); 670 | | } 671 | | 672 | | ($positionSizeActive, , ) = panopticPool.optionPositionBalance($exercisee, $tokenIdActive); 673 | | 674 | | $touchedId = [$tokenIdActive]; 675 | | $positionListExercisor = userPositions[msg.sender]; 676 | | $positionListExercisee = _get_list_without_tokenid( 677 | | userPositions[$exercisee], 678 | | $tokenIdActive 679 | | ); 680 | | 681 | | userPositions[$exercisee] = $positionListExercisee; 682 | | 683 | | (, currentTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 684 | | $twapTick = PanopticMath.twapFilter(pool, 600); 685 | | 686 | | $shouldRevert = false; 687 | | 688 | | try this.validate_exercisable_ext($tokenIdActive, $twapTick) { 689 | | $shouldRevert = $shouldRevert ? $shouldRevert : false; 690 | | } catch { 691 | | $shouldRevert = $shouldRevert ? $shouldRevert : true; 692 | | } 693 | | 694 | | $balance0Origin = int256(collToken0.balanceOf(msg.sender)); 695 | | $balance1Origin = int256(collToken1.balanceOf(msg.sender)); 696 | | 697 | | $balance0Exercisee = int256(collToken0.balanceOf($exercisee)); 698 | | $balance1Exercisee = int256(collToken1.balanceOf($exercisee)); 699 | | 700 | | quote_pp_burn(); 701 | | 702 | | // it is impossible for a user to force exercise themselves - position list validation will fail 703 | | if (msg.sender == $exercisee) $shouldRevert = true; 704 | | 705 | | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 706 | | try 707 | | panopticPool.forceExercise( 708 | | $exercisee, 709 | | $touchedId, 710 | | $positionListExercisee, 711 | | $positionListExercisor 712 | | ) 713 | | { 714 | | assertWithMsg(!$shouldRevert, "ForceExercise: missing revert"); 715 | | } catch (bytes memory reason) { 716 | | emit LogBytes("Reason", reason); 717 | | 718 | | // check if the revert is due to an insufficient amount of tokens from the exercisor or the exercisor is insolvent 719 | | if ( 720 | | keccak256(reason) == keccak256(abi.encodeWithSignature("Panic(uint256)", 0x11)) || 721 | | bytes4(reason) == Errors.AccountInsolvent.selector 722 | | ) { 723 | | hevm.prank(address(panopticPool)); 724 | | collToken0.delegate(msg.sender, (2 ** 104 - 1) * 10_000); 725 | | hevm.prank(address(panopticPool)); 726 | | collToken1.delegate(msg.sender, (2 ** 104 - 1) * 10_000); 727 | | 728 | | $balance0Origin = int256(collToken0.balanceOf(msg.sender)); 729 | | $balance1Origin = int256(collToken1.balanceOf(msg.sender)); 730 | | 731 | | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 732 | | try 733 | | panopticPool.forceExercise( 734 | | $exercisee, 735 | | $touchedId, 736 | | $positionListExercisee, 737 | | $positionListExercisor 738 | | ) 739 | | { 740 | | assertWithMsg(!$shouldRevert, "ForceExercise: missing revert"); 741 | | revert(); 742 | | } catch { 743 | | assertWithMsg($shouldRevert, "ForceExercise: unexpected revert"); 744 | | revert(); 745 | | } 746 | | } else { 747 | | assertWithMsg($shouldRevert, "ForceExercise: unexpected revert"); 748 | | revert(); 749 | | } 750 | | } 751 | | 752 | | try 753 | | panopticPool.validateCollateralWithdrawable(msg.sender, $positionListExercisor) 754 | | {} catch { 755 | | assertWithMsg(false, "ForceExercise: Exercisor left insolvent after force exercise"); 756 | | } 757 | | 758 | | ($longAmounts, $shortAmounts) = PanopticMath.computeExercisedAmounts( 759 | | $tokenIdActive, 760 | | $positionSizeActive 761 | | ); 762 | | 763 | | LeftRightSigned exerciseCost = collToken0.exerciseCost( 764 | | currentTick, 765 | | $twapTick, 766 | | $tokenIdActive, 767 | | $positionSizeActive, 768 | | $longAmounts 769 | | ); 770 | | 771 | | // exercise cost (in terms of token0) 772 | | int256 exerciseCostToken0 = exerciseCost.rightSlot() + 773 | | PanopticMath.convert1to0( 774 | | exerciseCost.leftSlot(), 775 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick($twapTick) 776 | | ); 777 | | // token0 - diff from burn 778 | | int256 cDelta0 = ( 779 | | int256(collToken0.balanceOf($exercisee)) - $balance0Exercisee - $colDelta0 > 0 780 | | ? int8(1) 781 | | : -1 782 | | ) * 783 | | int256( 784 | | collToken0.convertToAssets( 785 | | uint256( 786 | * | Math.abs( 787 | * | int256(collToken0.balanceOf($exercisee)) - 788 | | $balance0Exercisee - 789 | | $colDelta0 790 | | ) 791 | | ) 792 | | ) 793 | | ); 794 | | // token1 - diff from burn 795 | | cDelta0 += PanopticMath.convert1to0( 796 | | ( 797 | | int256(collToken1.balanceOf($exercisee)) - $balance1Exercisee - $colDelta1 > 0 798 | | ? int8(1) 799 | | : -1 800 | | ) * 801 | | int256( 802 | | collToken1.convertToAssets( 803 | | uint256( 804 | | Math.abs( 805 | | int256(collToken1.balanceOf($exercisee)) - 806 | | $balance1Exercisee - 807 | | $colDelta1 808 | | ) 809 | | ) 810 | | ) 811 | | ), 812 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick($twapTick) 813 | | ); 814 | | 815 | | emit LogInt256( 816 | | "exercisor delegation", 817 | | int256(collToken0.balanceOf(msg.sender)) - $balance0Origin 818 | | ); 819 | | emit LogInt256("exercisor balance", int256(collToken0.balanceOf(msg.sender))); 820 | | emit LogInt256("exercisor origin", $balance0Origin); 821 | | emit LogInt256( 822 | | "exercisee delegation", 823 | | int256(collToken0.balanceOf($exercisee)) - $balance0Exercisee - $colDelta0 824 | | ); 825 | | emit LogInt256("exercisee balance", int256(collToken0.balanceOf($exercisee))); 826 | | emit LogInt256("exercisee origin", $balance0Exercisee); 827 | | emit LogInt256("$colDelta0", $colDelta0); 828 | | // ensure that any differences from post-burn balances in the exercisee are: 829 | | // a) matched exactly by a change in the exercisor's balance 830 | | // b) roughly equivalent in value to the force exercise fee 831 | | assertWithMsg( 832 | | (int256(collToken0.balanceOf($exercisee)) - $balance0Exercisee) - $colDelta0 == 833 | | -(int256(collToken0.balanceOf(msg.sender)) - $balance0Origin), 834 | | "ForceExercise: Exercisor delegation does not match exercisee's token0 delta compared to burn" 835 | | ); 836 | | assertWithMsg( 837 | | (int256(collToken1.balanceOf($exercisee)) - $balance1Exercisee) - $colDelta1 == 838 | | -(int256(collToken1.balanceOf(msg.sender)) - $balance1Origin), 839 | | "ForceExercise: Exercisor delegation does not match exercisee's token1 delta compared to burn" 840 | | ); 841 | | 842 | | emit LogInt256("cDelta0", cDelta0); 843 | | 844 | | emit LogInt256( 845 | | "cDeltaToken0", 846 | | ( 847 | | int256(collToken0.balanceOf($exercisee)) - $balance0Exercisee - $colDelta0 > 0 848 | | ? int8(1) 849 | | : -1 850 | | ) * 851 | | int256( 852 | | collToken0.convertToAssets( 853 | | uint256( 854 | | Math.abs( 855 | | int256(collToken0.balanceOf($exercisee)) - 856 | | $balance0Exercisee - 857 | | $colDelta0 858 | | ) 859 | | ) 860 | | ) 861 | | ) 862 | | ); 863 | | emit LogInt256( 864 | | "cDeltaToken1", 865 | | ( 866 | | int256(collToken1.balanceOf($exercisee)) - $balance1Exercisee - $colDelta1 > 0 867 | | ? int8(1) 868 | | : -1 869 | | ) * 870 | | int256( 871 | | collToken1.convertToAssets( 872 | | uint256( 873 | | Math.abs( 874 | | int256(collToken1.balanceOf($exercisee)) - 875 | | $balance1Exercisee - 876 | | $colDelta1 877 | | ) 878 | | ) 879 | | ) 880 | | ) 881 | | ); 882 | | assertWithMsg( 883 | | cDelta0 >= 0, 884 | | "ForceExercise: Sanity check - Exercisee token value is lower than before" 885 | | ); 886 | | 887 | | assertWithMsg( 888 | | Math.abs(-cDelta0 - exerciseCostToken0) <= 1, 889 | | "ForceExercise: Token deltas do not match exercise cost" 890 | | ); 891 | | } 892 | | 893 | | /*////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 894 | | LIQUIDATION 895 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/ 896 | | 897 | | /// @custom:property PANO-LIQ-001 The position to liquidate must have a balance below the threshold 898 | | /// @custom:property PANO-LIQ-002 After liquidation, user must have zero open positions 899 | | /// @custom:precondition The liquidatee has a liquidatable position open 900 | * | function try_liquidate_option(uint256 i_liquidated) public { 901 | * | i_liquidated = bound(i_liquidated, 0, 4); 902 | * | address liquidatee = actors[i_liquidated]; 903 | * | address liquidator = msg.sender; 904 | | 905 | * | if (userPositions[liquidatee].length < 1) { 906 | * | emit LogString("No current positions"); 907 | *r | revert(); 908 | | } 909 | | 910 | | // Make sure the liquidator has tokens to delegate 911 | | { 912 | | hevm.prank(liquidator); 913 | | fund_and_approve(); 914 | | 915 | | uint256 lb0 = IERC20(USDC).balanceOf(liquidator); 916 | | uint256 lb1 = IERC20(WETH).balanceOf(liquidator); 917 | | hevm.prank(liquidator); 918 | | deposit_to_ct(true, lb0, false); 919 | | hevm.prank(liquidator); 920 | | deposit_to_ct(false, lb1, false); 921 | | } 922 | | 923 | | require(liquidatee != liquidator); 924 | | 925 | | TokenId[] memory liquidated_positions = userPositions[liquidatee]; 926 | | TokenId[] memory liquidator_positions = userPositions[liquidator]; 927 | | 928 | | emit LogUint256("liquidator positions length", liquidator_positions.length); 929 | | emit LogUint256("liquidated positions length", liquidated_positions.length); 930 | | emit LogAddress("liquidator", liquidator); 931 | | emit LogAddress("liquidated", liquidatee); 932 | | 933 | | int24 TWAPtick = PanopticMath.twapFilter(pool, 600); 934 | | (, currentTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 935 | | emit LogInt256("TWAP tick", TWAPtick); 936 | | emit LogInt256("Current tick", currentTick); 937 | | 938 | | log_account_collaterals(liquidator); 939 | | log_account_collaterals(liquidatee); 940 | | log_trackers_status(); 941 | | 942 | | require(liquidated_positions.length > 0); 943 | | 944 | | (uint256 balanceCross, uint256 thresholdCross) = _get_solvency_balances( 945 | | liquidatee, 946 | | TWAPtick 947 | | ); 948 | | emit LogUint256("Balance cross", balanceCross); 949 | | emit LogUint256("Threshold cross", thresholdCross); 950 | | 951 | | LeftRightUnsigned delegations = LeftRightUnsigned 952 | | .wrap(uint96(collToken0.convertToAssets(collToken0.balanceOf(liquidator)))) 953 | | .toLeftSlot(uint96(collToken1.convertToAssets(collToken1.balanceOf(liquidator)))); 954 | | 955 | | // If the position is not liquidatable, liquidation call must revert 956 | | if (balanceCross > thresholdCross) { 957 | | try 958 | | panopticPool.liquidate( 959 | | liquidator_positions, 960 | | liquidatee, 961 | | delegations, 962 | | liquidated_positions 963 | | ) 964 | | { 965 | | assertWithMsg( 966 | | false, 967 | | "A non-liquidatable position (balanceCross >= thresholdCross) was liquidated" 968 | | ); 969 | | } catch { 970 | | revert(); 971 | | } 972 | | } 973 | | 974 | | _calculate_margins_and_premia(liquidatee, TWAPtick); 975 | | 976 | | liqResults.sharesD0 = int256(collToken0.balanceOf(liquidatee)); 977 | | liqResults.sharesD1 = int256(collToken1.balanceOf(liquidatee)); 978 | | 979 | | _execute_burn_simulation(liquidatee, liquidator); 980 | | 981 | | liqResults.liquidatorValueBefore0 = _get_assets_in_token0(liquidator, currentTick); 982 | | { 983 | | (int128 p0, int128 p1, ) = panopticPool.calculateAccumulatedFeesBatch( 984 | | liquidatee, 985 | | false, 986 | | liquidated_positions 987 | | ); 988 | * | liqResults.premia = LeftRightSigned.wrap(0).toRightSlot(p0).toLeftSlot(p1); 989 | | emit LogInt256("Premium in token 0", p0); 990 | | emit LogInt256("Premium in token 1", p1); 991 | | } 992 | | 993 | | _calculate_liquidation_bonus(TWAPtick, currentTick); 994 | | 995 | | burnSimResults.delegated0 = uint256( 996 | | int256( 997 | | collToken0.convertToShares( 998 | | uint256( 999 | | int256( 1000 | | uint256( 1001 | | uint96(collToken0.convertToAssets(collToken0.balanceOf(liquidator))) 1002 | | ) 1003 | | ) + liqResults.bonus0 1004 | | ) 1005 | | ) 1006 | | ) 1007 | | ); 1008 | | burnSimResults.delegated1 = uint256( 1009 | | int256( 1010 | | collToken1.convertToShares( 1011 | | uint256( 1012 | | int256( 1013 | | uint256( 1014 | | uint96(collToken1.convertToAssets(collToken1.balanceOf(liquidator))) 1015 | | ) 1016 | | ) + liqResults.bonus1 1017 | | ) 1018 | | ) 1019 | | ) 1020 | | ); 1021 | | 1022 | | hevm.prank(liquidator); 1023 | | panopticPool.liquidate(liquidator_positions, liquidatee, delegations, liquidated_positions); 1024 | | 1025 | | log_burn_simulation_results(); 1026 | | log_liquidation_results(); 1053 | | assertWithMsg( 1054 | | panopticPool.numberOfPositions(liquidatee) == 0, 1055 | | "Liquidation did not close all positions" 1056 | | ); 1057 | | 1058 | | if ( 1059 | | (collToken0.totalSupply() - burnSimResults.totalSupply0 <= 1) && 1060 | | (collToken1.totalSupply() - burnSimResults.totalSupply1 <= 1) 1061 | | ) { 1062 | | int256 assets = convertToAssets(collToken0, liqResults.sharesD0) + 1063 | | PanopticMath.convert1to0( 1064 | | convertToAssets(collToken1, liqResults.sharesD1), 1065 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick(currentTick) 1066 | | ); 1067 | | emit LogInt256("Assets", assets); 1068 | | emit LogInt256("Bonus combined", liqResults.bonusCombined0); 1069 | | 1070 | | assertLt( 1071 | | abs(int256(assets) - int256(liqResults.bonusCombined0)), 1072 | | 10, 1073 | | "Liquidatee was debited incorrect bonus value (funds leftover)" 1074 | | ); 1075 | | } else { 1076 | | int256 assets = convertToAssets(collToken0, liqResults.sharesD0) + 1077 | | PanopticMath.convert1to0( 1078 | | convertToAssets(collToken1, liqResults.sharesD1), 1079 | | TickMath.getSqrtRatioAtTick(currentTick) 1080 | | ); 1081 | | emit LogInt256("Assets", assets); 1082 | | emit LogInt256("Bonus combined", liqResults.bonusCombined0); 1083 | | 1084 | | assertWithMsg( 1085 | | assets <= liqResults.bonusCombined0, 1086 | | "Liquidatee was debited incorrectly high bonus value (no funds leftover)" 1087 | | ); 1088 | | } 1089 | | 1090 | | emit LogInt256( 1091 | | "Delta liquidator value", 1092 | | int256(liqResults.liquidatorValueAfter0) - int256(liqResults.liquidatorValueBefore0) 1093 | | ); 1094 | | emit LogInt256("Bonus combined", liqResults.bonusCombined0); 1095 | | assertLt( 1096 | | abs( 1097 | | (int256(liqResults.liquidatorValueAfter0) - 1098 | | int256(liqResults.liquidatorValueBefore0)) - liqResults.bonusCombined0 1099 | | ), 1100 | | 10, 1101 | | "Liquidator did not receive correct bonus" 1102 | | ); 1103 | | 1104 | | emit LogInt256( 1105 | | "Delta settled tokens", 1106 | | int256(burnSimResults.settledTokens0) - int256(liqResults.settledTokens0) 1107 | | ); 1108 | | emit LogInt256( 1109 | | "Expected value", 1110 | | Math.min(burnSimResults.longPremium0, liqResults.protocolLoss0Expected) 1111 | | ); 1112 | | assertWithMsg( 1113 | | int256(burnSimResults.settledTokens0) - int256(liqResults.settledTokens0) == 1114 | | Math.min(burnSimResults.longPremium0, liqResults.protocolLoss0Expected), 1115 | | "Incorrect amount of premium was haircut" 1116 | | ); 1117 | | 1118 | | emit LogInt256("Protocol loss actual", liqResults.protocolLoss0Actual); 1119 | | emit LogInt256( 1120 | | "Expected value", 1121 | | liqResults.protocolLoss0Expected - 1122 | | Math.min(burnSimResults.longPremium0, liqResults.protocolLoss0Expected) 1123 | | ); 1124 | | assertWithMsg( 1125 | | liqResults.protocolLoss0Actual == 1126 | | liqResults.protocolLoss0Expected - 1127 | | Math.min(burnSimResults.longPremium0, liqResults.protocolLoss0Expected), 1128 | | "Not all premium was haircut during protocol loss" 1129 | | ); 1130 | | 1131 | | log_account_collaterals(liquidator); 1132 | | log_account_collaterals(liquidatee); 1133 | | log_trackers_status(); 1134 | | } 1135 | | 1136 | | /// @dev Liquidate by manually editing the storage. This function is not currently used, but we keep it for 1137 | | /// potential future usages 1138 | | function liquidate_option_via_edit(uint256 i_liquidated) internal { 1139 | | i_liquidated = bound(i_liquidated, 0, 4); 1140 | | if (userPositions[actors[i_liquidated]].length < 1) { 1141 | | emit LogString("No current positions"); 1142 | | revert(); 1143 | | } 1144 | | address liquidatee = actors[i_liquidated]; 1145 | | address liquidator = msg.sender; 1146 | | 1147 | | int24 TWAPtick = PanopticMath.twapFilter(pool, 600); 1148 | | (, int24 curTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 1149 | | emit LogInt256("TWAP tick", TWAPtick); 1150 | | emit LogInt256("Current tick", curTick); 1151 | | 1152 | | require(liquidatee != msg.sender); 1153 | | 1154 | | TokenId[] memory liquidated_positions = userPositions[liquidatee]; 1155 | | TokenId[] memory liquidator_positions = userPositions[liquidator];
