1156 | | 1157 | | require(liquidated_positions.length > 0); 1158 | | 1159 | | (, currentTick, , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 1160 | | LeftRightUnsigned lru = LeftRightUnsigned 1161 | | .wrap(uint96(collToken0.convertToAssets(collToken0.balanceOf(liquidator)))) 1162 | | .toLeftSlot(uint96(collToken1.convertToAssets(collToken1.balanceOf(liquidator)))); 1163 | | 1164 | | editCollateral(collToken0, liquidatee, 0); 1165 | | editCollateral(collToken1, liquidatee, 0); 1166 | | 1167 | | (uint256 balanceCross, uint256 thresholdCross) = _get_solvency_balances( 1168 | | liquidatee, 1169 | | TWAPtick 1170 | | ); 1171 | | emit LogUint256("Balance cross after edit", balanceCross); 1172 | | emit LogUint256("Threshold cross after edit", thresholdCross); 1173 | | 1174 | | if (balanceCross >= thresholdCross) { 1175 | | hevm.prank(liquidator); 1176 | | try 1177 | | panopticPool.liquidate(liquidator_positions, liquidatee, lru, liquidated_positions) 1178 | | { 1179 | | assertWithMsg( 1180 | | false, 1181 | | "A non-liquidatable position (balanceCross >= thresholdCross) was liquidated" 1182 | | ); 1183 | | } catch {} 1184 | | return; 1185 | | } 1186 | | 1187 | | emit LogUint256("liquidator positions length", liquidator_positions.length); 1188 | | emit LogUint256("liquidated positions length", liquidated_positions.length); 1189 | | emit LogAddress("liquidator", liquidator); 1190 | | emit LogAddress("liquidated", liquidatee); 1191 | | 1192 | | hevm.prank(liquidator); 1193 | | panopticPool.liquidate(liquidator_positions, liquidatee, lru, liquidated_positions); 1194 | | } 1195 | | 1196 | | /*////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 1197 | | GLOBAL 1198 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/ 1199 | | 1200 | | /// @custom:property PANO-SYS-006 Users can't have an open position but no collateral 1201 | | /// @custom:precondition The user has a position open 1202 | * | function invariant_collateral_for_positions() public { 1203 | | // If user has positions open, the collateral must be greater than zero 1204 | * | uint256 numOfPositions = panopticPool.numberOfPositions(msg.sender); 1205 | * | emit LogAddress("Caller", msg.sender); 1206 | * | emit LogUint256("Positions opened for user", numOfPositions); 1207 | | 1208 | * | int128 premium0; 1209 | | int128 premium1; 1210 | | 1211 | * | if (numOfPositions > 0) { 1212 | | uint256 bal0 = collToken0.balanceOf(msg.sender); 1213 | | uint256 bal1 = collToken1.balanceOf(msg.sender); 1214 | | emit LogUint256("Balance in token0", bal0); 1215 | | emit LogUint256("Balance in token1", bal1); 1216 | | 1217 | | bal0 = collToken0.convertToAssets(bal0); 1218 | | bal1 = collToken1.convertToAssets(bal1); 1219 | | emit LogUint256("Balance in token0 to assets", bal0); 1220 | | emit LogUint256("Balance in token1 to assets", bal1); 1221 | | 1222 | | (premium0, premium1, ) = panopticPool.calculateAccumulatedFeesBatch( 1223 | | msg.sender, 1224 | | true, 1225 | | userPositions[msg.sender] 1226 | | ); 1227 | | emit LogInt256("Premia in token0", premium0); 1228 | | emit LogInt256("Premia in token1", premium1); 1229 | | 1230 | | assertWithMsg( 1231 | | ((int256(bal0) + premium0) > 0) || ((int256(bal1) + premium1) > 0), 1232 | | "User has open positions but zero collateral" 1233 | | ); 1234 | | } 1235 | | } 1236 | | 1237 | | /// @custom:property PANO-SYS-007 The owed premia is not less than the available premia 1238 | | /// @custom:precondition The user has a position open 1239 | * | function invariant_unsettled_premium() public { 1240 | | // Owed premia 1241 | * | (int128 p0o, int128 p1o, ) = panopticPool.calculateAccumulatedFeesBatch( 1242 | * | msg.sender, 1243 | | true, 1244 | * | userPositions[msg.sender] 1245 | | ); 1246 | | // Available premia 1247 | * | (int128 p0a, int128 p1a, ) = panopticPool.calculateAccumulatedFeesBatch( 1248 | * | msg.sender, 1249 | | false, 1250 | * | userPositions[msg.sender] 1251 | | ); 1252 | | 1253 | * | emit LogAddress("Sender:", msg.sender); 1254 | * | assertWithMsg(p0o >= p0a, "Token 0 owed premia is less than available premia"); 1255 | * | assertWithMsg(p1o >= p1a, "Token 1 owed premia is less than available premia"); 1256 | | } 1257 | | } 1258 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/fuzz/echidna/PropertiesHelper.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: UNLICENSED 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.0; 3 | | 4 | | abstract contract PropertiesAsserts { 5 | | event LogUint256(string, uint256); 6 | | event LogInt256(string, int256); 7 | | event LogAddress(string, address); 8 | | event LogString(string); 9 | | event LogBool(string, bool); 10 | | event LogBytes(string, bytes); 11 | | 12 | | event AssertFail(string); 13 | | event AssertEqFail(string); 14 | | event AssertNeqFail(string); 15 | | event AssertGteFail(string); 16 | | event AssertGtFail(string); 17 | | event AssertLteFail(string); 18 | | event AssertLtFail(string); 19 | | 20 | * | function assertWithMsg(bool b, string memory reason) internal { 21 | * | if (!b) { 22 | * | emit AssertFail(reason); 23 | * | assert(false); 24 | | } 25 | | } 26 | | 27 | | /// @notice asserts that a is equal to b. Violations are logged using reason. 28 | | function assertEq(uint256 a, uint256 b, string memory reason) internal { 29 | | if (a != b) { 30 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 31 | | string memory bStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(b); 32 | | bytes memory assertMsg = abi.encodePacked( 33 | | "Invalid: ", 34 | | aStr, 35 | | "!=", 36 | | bStr, 37 | | ", reason: ", 38 | | reason 39 | | ); 40 | | emit AssertEqFail(string(assertMsg)); 41 | | assert(false); 42 | | } 43 | | } 44 | | 45 | | /// @notice int256 version of assertEq 46 | | function assertEq(int256 a, int256 b, string memory reason) internal { 47 | | if (a != b) { 48 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 49 | | string memory bStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(b); 50 | | bytes memory assertMsg = abi.encodePacked( 51 | | "Invalid: ", 52 | | aStr, 53 | | "!=", 54 | | bStr, 55 | | ", reason: ", 56 | | reason 57 | | ); 58 | | emit AssertEqFail(string(assertMsg)); 59 | | assert(false); 60 | | } 61 | | } 62 | | 63 | | /// @notice asserts that a is not equal to b. Violations are logged using reason. 64 | | function assertNeq(uint256 a, uint256 b, string memory reason) internal { 65 | | if (a == b) { 66 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 67 | | string memory bStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(b); 68 | | bytes memory assertMsg = abi.encodePacked( 69 | | "Invalid: ", 70 | | aStr, 71 | | "==", 72 | | bStr, 73 | | ", reason: ", 74 | | reason 75 | | ); 76 | | emit AssertNeqFail(string(assertMsg)); 77 | | assert(false); 78 | | } 79 | | } 80 | | 81 | | /// @notice int256 version of assertNeq 82 | | function assertNeq(int256 a, int256 b, string memory reason) internal { 83 | | if (a == b) { 84 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 85 | | string memory bStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(b); 86 | | bytes memory assertMsg = abi.encodePacked( 87 | | "Invalid: ", 88 | | aStr, 89 | | "==", 90 | | bStr, 91 | | ", reason: ", 92 | | reason 93 | | ); 94 | | emit AssertNeqFail(string(assertMsg)); 95 | | assert(false); 96 | | } 97 | | } 98 | | 99 | | /// @notice asserts that a is greater than or equal to b. Violations are logged using reason. 100 | | function assertGte(uint256 a, uint256 b, string memory reason) internal { 101 | | if (!(a >= b)) { 102 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 103 | | string memory bStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(b); 104 | | bytes memory assertMsg = abi.encodePacked( 105 | | "Invalid: ", 106 | | aStr, 107 | | "<", 108 | | bStr, 109 | | " failed, reason: ", 110 | | reason 111 | | ); 112 | | emit AssertGteFail(string(assertMsg)); 113 | | assert(false); 114 | | } 115 | | } 116 | | 117 | | /// @notice int256 version of assertGte 118 | | function assertGte(int256 a, int256 b, string memory reason) internal { 119 | | if (!(a >= b)) { 120 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 121 | | string memory bStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(b); 122 | | bytes memory assertMsg = abi.encodePacked( 123 | | "Invalid: ", 124 | | aStr, 125 | | "<", 126 | | bStr, 127 | | " failed, reason: ", 128 | | reason 129 | | ); 130 | | emit AssertGteFail(string(assertMsg)); 131 | | assert(false); 132 | | } 133 | | } 134 | | 135 | | /// @notice asserts that a is greater than b. Violations are logged using reason. 136 | | function assertGt(uint256 a, uint256 b, string memory reason) internal { 137 | | if (!(a > b)) { 138 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 139 | | string memory bStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(b); 140 | | bytes memory assertMsg = abi.encodePacked( 141 | | "Invalid: ", 142 | | aStr, 143 | | "<=", 144 | | bStr, 145 | | " failed, reason: ", 146 | | reason 147 | | ); 148 | | emit AssertGtFail(string(assertMsg)); 149 | | assert(false); 150 | | } 151 | | } 152 | | 153 | | /// @notice int256 version of assertGt 154 | | function assertGt(int256 a, int256 b, string memory reason) internal { 155 | | if (!(a > b)) { 156 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 157 | | string memory bStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(b); 158 | | bytes memory assertMsg = abi.encodePacked( 159 | | "Invalid: ", 160 | | aStr, 161 | | "<=", 162 | | bStr, 163 | | " failed, reason: ", 164 | | reason 165 | | ); 166 | | emit AssertGtFail(string(assertMsg)); 167 | | assert(false); 168 | | } 169 | | } 170 | | 171 | | /// @notice asserts that a is less than or equal to b. Violations are logged using reason. 172 | | function assertLte(uint256 a, uint256 b, string memory reason) internal { 173 | | if (!(a <= b)) { 174 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 175 | | string memory bStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(b); 176 | | bytes memory assertMsg = abi.encodePacked( 177 | | "Invalid: ", 178 | | aStr, 179 | | ">", 180 | | bStr, 181 | | " failed, reason: ", 182 | | reason 183 | | ); 184 | | emit AssertLteFail(string(assertMsg)); 185 | | assert(false); 186 | | } 187 | | } 188 | | 189 | | /// @notice int256 version of assertLte 190 | | function assertLte(int256 a, int256 b, string memory reason) internal { 191 | | if (!(a <= b)) { 192 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 193 | | string memory bStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(b); 194 | | bytes memory assertMsg = abi.encodePacked( 195 | | "Invalid: ", 196 | | aStr, 197 | | ">", 198 | | bStr, 199 | | " failed, reason: ", 200 | | reason 201 | | ); 202 | | emit AssertLteFail(string(assertMsg)); 203 | | assert(false); 204 | | } 205 | | } 206 | | 207 | | /// @notice asserts that a is less than b. Violations are logged using reason. 208 | | function assertLt(uint256 a, uint256 b, string memory reason) internal { 209 | | if (!(a < b)) { 210 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 211 | | string memory bStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(b); 212 | | bytes memory assertMsg = abi.encodePacked( 213 | | "Invalid: ", 214 | | aStr, 215 | | ">=", 216 | | bStr, 217 | | " failed, reason: ", 218 | | reason 219 | | ); 220 | | emit AssertLtFail(string(assertMsg)); 221 | | assert(false); 222 | | } 223 | | } 224 | | 225 | | /// @notice int256 version of assertLt 226 | | function assertLt(int256 a, int256 b, string memory reason) internal { 227 | | if (!(a < b)) { 228 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 229 | | string memory bStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(b); 230 | | bytes memory assertMsg = abi.encodePacked( 231 | | "Invalid: ", 232 | | aStr, 233 | | ">=", 234 | | bStr, 235 | | " failed, reason: ", 236 | | reason 237 | | ); 238 | | emit AssertLtFail(string(assertMsg)); 239 | | assert(false); 240 | | } 241 | | } 242 | | 243 | | /// @notice Clamps value to be between low and high, both inclusive 244 | | function clampBetween(uint256 value, uint256 low, uint256 high) internal returns (uint256) { 245 | | if (value < low || value > high) { 246 | | uint ans = low + (value % (high - low + 1)); 247 | | string memory valueStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(value); 248 | | string memory ansStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(ans); 249 | | bytes memory message = abi.encodePacked("Clamping value ", valueStr, " to ", ansStr); 250 | | emit LogString(string(message)); 251 | | return ans; 252 | | } 253 | | return value; 254 | | } 255 | | 256 | | /// @notice int256 version of clampBetween 257 | | function clampBetween(int256 value, int256 low, int256 high) internal returns (int256) { 258 | | if (value < low || value > high) { 259 | | int range = high - low + 1; 260 | | int clamped = (value - low) % (range); 261 | | if (clamped < 0) clamped += range; 262 | | int ans = low + clamped; 263 | | string memory valueStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(value); 264 | | string memory ansStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(ans); 265 | | bytes memory message = abi.encodePacked("Clamping value ", valueStr, " to ", ansStr); 266 | | emit LogString(string(message)); 267 | | return ans; 268 | | } 269 | | return value; 270 | | } 271 | | 272 | | /// @notice clamps a to be less than b 273 | | function clampLt(uint256 a, uint256 b) internal returns (uint256) { 274 | | if (!(a < b)) { 275 | | assertNeq( 276 | | b, 277 | | 0, 278 | | "clampLt cannot clamp value a to be less than zero. Check your inputs/assumptions." 279 | | ); 280 | | uint256 value = a % b; 281 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 282 | | string memory valueStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(value); 283 | | bytes memory message = abi.encodePacked("Clamping value ", aStr, " to ", valueStr); 284 | | emit LogString(string(message)); 285 | | return value; 286 | | } 287 | | return a; 288 | | } 289 | | 290 | | /// @notice int256 version of clampLt 291 | | function clampLt(int256 a, int256 b) internal returns (int256) { 292 | | if (!(a < b)) { 293 | | int256 value = b - 1; 294 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 295 | | string memory valueStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(value); 296 | | bytes memory message = abi.encodePacked("Clamping value ", aStr, " to ", valueStr); 297 | | emit LogString(string(message)); 298 | | return value; 299 | | } 300 | | return a; 301 | | } 302 | | 303 | | /// @notice clamps a to be less than or equal to b 304 | | function clampLte(uint256 a, uint256 b) internal returns (uint256) { 305 | | if (!(a <= b)) { 306 | | uint256 value = a % (b + 1); 307 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 308 | | string memory valueStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(value); 309 | | bytes memory message = abi.encodePacked("Clamping value ", aStr, " to ", valueStr); 310 | | emit LogString(string(message)); 311 | | return value; 312 | | } 313 | | return a; 314 | | } 315 | | 316 | | /// @notice int256 version of clampLte 317 | | function clampLte(int256 a, int256 b) internal returns (int256) { 318 | | if (!(a <= b)) { 319 | | int256 value = b; 320 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 321 | | string memory valueStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(value); 322 | | bytes memory message = abi.encodePacked("Clamping value ", aStr, " to ", valueStr); 323 | | emit LogString(string(message)); 324 | | return value; 325 | | } 326 | | return a; 327 | | } 328 | | 329 | | /// @notice clamps a to be greater than b 330 | | function clampGt(uint256 a, uint256 b) internal returns (uint256) { 331 | | if (!(a > b)) { 332 | | assertNeq( 333 | | b, 334 | | type(uint256).max, 335 | | "clampGt cannot clamp value a to be larger than uint256.max. Check your inputs/assumptions." 336 | | ); 337 | | uint256 value = b + 1; 338 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 339 | | string memory valueStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(value); 340 | | bytes memory message = abi.encodePacked("Clamping value ", aStr, " to ", valueStr); 341 | | emit LogString(string(message)); 342 | | return value; 343 | | } else { 344 | | return a; 345 | | } 346 | | } 347 | | 348 | | /// @notice int256 version of clampGt 349 | | function clampGt(int256 a, int256 b) internal returns (int256) { 350 | | if (!(a > b)) { 351 | | int256 value = b + 1; 352 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 353 | | string memory valueStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(value); 354 | | bytes memory message = abi.encodePacked("Clamping value ", aStr, " to ", valueStr); 355 | | emit LogString(string(message)); 356 | | return value; 357 | | } else { 358 | | return a; 359 | | } 360 | | } 361 | | 362 | | /// @notice clamps a to be greater than or equal to b 363 | | function clampGte(uint256 a, uint256 b) internal returns (uint256) { 364 | | if (!(a > b)) { 365 | | uint256 value = b; 366 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 367 | | string memory valueStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(value); 368 | | bytes memory message = abi.encodePacked("Clamping value ", aStr, " to ", valueStr); 369 | | emit LogString(string(message)); 370 | | return value; 371 | | } 372 | | return a; 373 | | } 374 | | 375 | | /// @notice int256 version of clampGte 376 | | function clampGte(int256 a, int256 b) internal returns (int256) { 377 | | if (!(a > b)) { 378 | | int256 value = b; 379 | | string memory aStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(a); 380 | | string memory valueStr = PropertiesLibString.toString(value); 381 | | bytes memory message = abi.encodePacked("Clamping value ", aStr, " to ", valueStr); 382 | | emit LogString(string(message)); 383 | | return value; 384 | | } 385 | | return a; 386 | | } 387 | | } 388 | | 389 | | /// @notice Efficient library for creating string representations of integers. 390 | | /// @author Solmate (https://github.com/transmissions11/solmate/blob/main/src/utils/LibString.sol) 391 | | /// @author Modified from Solady (https://github.com/Vectorized/solady/blob/main/src/utils/LibString.sol) 392 | | /// @dev Name of the library is modified to prevent collisions with contract-under-test uses of LibString 393 | | library PropertiesLibString { 394 | | function toString(int256 value) internal pure returns (string memory str) { 395 | | uint256 absValue = value >= 0 ? uint256(value) : uint256(-value); 396 | | str = toString(absValue); 397 | | 398 | | if (value < 0) { 399 | | str = string(abi.encodePacked("-", str)); 400 | | } 401 | | } 402 | | 403 | | function toString(uint256 value) internal pure returns (string memory str) { 404 | | /// @solidity memory-safe-assembly 405 | | assembly { 406 | | // The maximum value of a uint256 contains 78 digits (1 byte per digit), but we allocate 160 bytes 407 | | // to keep the free memory pointer word aligned. We'll need 1 word for the length, 1 word for the 408 | | // trailing zeros padding, and 3 other words for a max of 78 digits. In total: 5 * 32 = 160 bytes. 409 | | let newFreeMemoryPointer := add(mload(0x40), 160) 410 | | 411 | | // Update the free memory pointer to avoid overriding our string. 412 | | mstore(0x40, newFreeMemoryPointer) 413 | | 414 | | // Assign str to the end of the zone of newly allocated memory. 415 | | str := sub(newFreeMemoryPointer, 32) 416 | | 417 | | // Clean the last word of memory it may not be overwritten. 418 | | mstore(str, 0) 419 | | 420 | | // Cache the end of the memory to calculate the length later. 421 | | let end := str 422 | | 423 | | // We write the string from rightmost digit to leftmost digit. 424 | | // The following is essentially a do-while loop that also handles the zero case. 425 | | // prettier-ignore 426 | | for { let temp := value } 1 {} { 427 | | // Move the pointer 1 byte to the left. 428 | | str := sub(str, 1) 429 | | 430 | | // Write the character to the pointer. 431 | | // The ASCII index of the '0' character is 48. 432 | | mstore8(str, add(48, mod(temp, 10))) 433 | | 434 | | // Keep dividing temp until zero. 435 | | temp := div(temp, 10) 436 | | 437 | | // prettier-ignore 438 | | if iszero(temp) { break } 439 | | } 440 | | 441 | | // Compute and cache the final total length of the string. 442 | | let length := sub(end, str) 443 | | 444 | | // Move the pointer 32 bytes leftwards to make room for the length. 445 | | str := sub(str, 32) 446 | | 447 | | // Store the string's length at the start of memory allocated for our string. 448 | | mstore(str, length) 449 | | } 450 | | } 451 | | 452 | | function toString(address value) internal pure returns (string memory str) { 453 | | bytes memory s = new bytes(40); 454 | | for (uint i = 0; i < 20; i++) { 455 | | bytes1 b = bytes1(uint8(uint(uint160(value)) / (2 ** (8 * (19 - i))))); 456 | | bytes1 hi = bytes1(uint8(b) / 16); 457 | | bytes1 lo = bytes1(uint8(b) - 16 * uint8(hi)); 458 | | s[2 * i] = char(hi); 459 | | s[2 * i + 1] = char(lo); 460 | | } 461 | | return string(s); 462 | | } 463 | | 464 | | function char(bytes1 b) internal pure returns (bytes1 c) { 465 | | if (uint8(b) < 10) return bytes1(uint8(b) + 0x30); 466 | | else return bytes1(uint8(b) + 0x57); 467 | | } 468 | | } 469 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/fuzz/echidna/SFPMActions.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: UNLICENSED 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.12; 3 | | 4 | | import "./FuzzHelpers.sol"; 5 | | import {GeneralActions} from "./GeneralActions.sol"; 6 | | 7 | | contract SFPMActions is GeneralActions { 8 | | /// SFPM direct interactions 9 | | 10 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////// 11 | | // Mint 12 | | //////////////////////////////////////////////////// 13 | | 14 | | // mint option sfpm standard mint of full shorts (store this position in mapping) 15 | | // ** add moved amts check 16 | * | function mint_option_SFPM_multiShort( 17 | | uint256 numLegs, 18 | | bool[4] memory asset_in, 19 | | bool[4] memory is_call_in, 20 | | bool[4] memory is_otm_in, 21 | | bool[4] memory is_atm_in, 22 | | uint24[4] memory width_in, 23 | | int256[4] memory strike_in, 24 | | uint128 positionSize, 25 | | bool swapAtMint 26 | * | ) public { 27 | * | $shouldRevertSFPM = false; 28 | | 29 | | // store the current actor 30 | * | $activeUser = msg.sender; 31 | | 32 | | // generate a random number of legs 33 | * | $activeNumLegs = numLegs = bound(numLegs, 1, 4); 34 | | 35 | * | $activeTokenId = _generate_multiple_leg_tokenid( 36 | | numLegs, 37 | * | asset_in, 38 | * | is_call_in, 39 | | [false, false, false, false], // generate short 40 | * | is_otm_in, 41 | * | is_atm_in, 42 | * | width_in, 43 | * | strike_in 44 | | ); 45 | | 46 | | // pre-mint calculations/actions for storage 47 | * | for (uint i; i < $activeNumLegs; i++) { 48 | * | $activeLegIndex = i; 49 | | 50 | * | emit LogUint256("active leg index: ", $activeLegIndex); 51 | | 52 | | { 53 | | // get the amount of liquidity being deposited 54 | * | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex] = PanopticMath.getLiquidityChunk( 55 | * | $activeTokenId, 56 | * | $activeLegIndex, 57 | * | positionSize 58 | | ); 59 | | 60 | * | $sTickLower[$activeLegIndex] = $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(); 61 | * | $sTickUpper[$activeLegIndex] = $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper(); 62 | * | $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] = $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].liquidity(); 63 | | 64 | | // *** if liquidity amounts is zero then execution should revert *** 65 | | { 66 | * | if ($sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] == 0) $shouldRevertSFPM = true; 67 | | } 68 | | 69 | | // store the active position details 70 | | { 71 | * | $tickLowerActive = $sTickLower[$activeLegIndex]; 72 | * | $tickUpperActive = $sTickUpper[$activeLegIndex]; 73 | * | $LiqAmountActive = $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex]; 74 | | } 75 | | 76 | | // emit positional bounds and liquidity 77 | * | emit LogInt256("tick lower", $tickLowerActive); 78 | * | emit LogInt256("tick upper", $tickUpperActive); 79 | * | emit LogUint256("liquidity amounts", $LiqAmountActive); 80 | | } 81 | | 82 | | // poke if there is pre-existing liq for the user at the positional bounds 83 | | { 84 | * | hevm.prank(address(sfpm)); 85 | * | try pool.burn($tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive, 0) {} catch {} 86 | | } 87 | | 88 | | { 89 | | // get the amount of liquidity within that range present in uniswap already 90 | * | $positionKey[$activeLegIndex] = keccak256( 91 | * | abi.encodePacked(address(sfpm), $tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive) 92 | | ); 93 | * | (uniLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], , , , ) = pool.positions( 94 | * | $positionKey[$activeLegIndex] 95 | | ); 96 | | 97 | | // get SFPM stored account liquidity before 98 | * | LeftRightUnsigned accountLiquiditiesBefore = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 99 | * | address(pool), 100 | * | $activeUser, 101 | * | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 102 | * | $tickLowerActive, 103 | * | $tickUpperActive 104 | | ); 105 | | 106 | | // store the removed and net liquidity for the chunk 107 | | // before mint 108 | * | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesBefore.leftSlot(); 109 | * | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesBefore.rightSlot(); 110 | | } 111 | | 112 | | { 113 | | // s_accountFeesBase before 114 | | // check s_accountFeesBase is updated correctly 115 | * | ($oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]) = sfpm 116 | | .getAccountFeesBase( 117 | * | address(pool), 118 | * | $activeUser, 119 | * | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 120 | * | $tickLowerActive, 121 | * | $tickUpperActive 122 | | ); 123 | | 124 | * | emit LogInt256("pre-mint feesbase 0", $oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex]); 125 | * | emit LogInt256("pre-mint feesbase 1", $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]); 126 | | } 127 | | 128 | | { 129 | * | ( 130 | | , 131 | * | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex], 132 | * | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex], 133 | | , 134 | | 135 | * | ) = pool.positions( 136 | * | keccak256(abi.encodePacked(address(sfpm), $tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive)) 137 | | ); 138 | | 139 | | // after touch 140 | * | emit LogUint256( 141 | | "pre-mint feeGrowthInside0LastX128", 142 | * | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex] 143 | | ); 144 | * | emit LogUint256( 145 | | "pre-mint feeGrowthInside1LastX128", 146 | * | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex] 147 | | ); 148 | | } 149 | | 150 | | { 151 | * | $newFeesBaseRoundDown0[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 152 | | int256( 153 | * | Math.mulDiv128( 154 | * | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex], 155 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] 156 | | ) 157 | | ) 158 | | ); 159 | * | $newFeesBaseRoundDown1[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 160 | | int256( 161 | * | Math.mulDiv128( 162 | * | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex], 163 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] 164 | | ) 165 | | ) 166 | | ); 167 | | 168 | * | emit LogInt256("newFeesBaseRoundDown0", $newFeesBaseRoundDown0[$activeLegIndex]); 169 | * | emit LogInt256("newFeesBaseRoundDown1", $newFeesBaseRoundDown1[$activeLegIndex]); 170 | | 171 | | // 172 | * | $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 173 | * | Math.max( 174 | * | $newFeesBaseRoundDown0[$activeLegIndex] - $oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], 175 | | 0 176 | | ) 177 | | ); 178 | * | $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 179 | * | Math.max( 180 | * | $newFeesBaseRoundDown1[$activeLegIndex] - $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex], 181 | | 0 182 | | ) 183 | | ); 184 | | 185 | * | emit LogInt256("$amountToCollect0", $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex]); 186 | * | emit LogInt256("$amountToCollect1", $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex]); 187 | | 188 | | // ensure amountToCollect is always positive 189 | * | assertWithMsg($amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] >= 0, "amountToCollect0 invalid"); 190 | * | assertWithMsg($amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] >= 0, "amountToCollect1 invalid"); 191 | | 192 | | // get the minted amounts (true moved amounts) 193 | | // also get the true collected amounts 194 | * | quote_uni_CollectAndMint(); 195 | | } 196 | | 197 | | // get premium gross/owed before (compute with max tick to get value stored in sfpm currently) 198 | | // after check if stored value matches this value 199 | | { 200 | * | ( 201 | * | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 202 | * | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 203 | * | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 204 | * | address(pool), 205 | * | $activeUser, 206 | * | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 207 | * | $tickLowerActive, 208 | * | $tickUpperActive, 209 | * | type(int24).max, 210 | | 0 // short to check gross 211 | | ); 212 | | 213 | | // get gross premium 214 | * | emit LogUint256( 215 | | "$accountPremiumGrossBefore0", 216 | * | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex] 217 | | ); 218 | * | emit LogUint256( 219 | | "$accountPremiumGrossBefore1", 220 | * | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 221 | | ); 222 | | 223 | | // owed premium 224 | * | ( 225 | * | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 226 | * | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 227 | * | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 228 | * | address(pool), 229 | * | $activeUser, 230 | * | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 231 | * | $tickLowerActive, 232 | * | $tickUpperActive, 233 | * | type(int24).max, 234 | | 1 // long to check owed 235 | | ); 236 | | 237 | | // get owed premium 238 | * | emit LogUint256( 239 | | "$accountPremiumOwedBefore0", 240 | * | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex] 241 | | ); 242 | * | emit LogUint256( 243 | | "$accountPremiumOwedBefore1", 244 | * | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 245 | | ); 246 | | } 247 | | } 248 | | 249 | | // reverse tick order if swap at mint 250 | * | int24 tickLimitLow = swapAtMint ? int24(887272) : int24(-887272); 251 | * | int24 tickLimitHigh = swapAtMint ? int24(-887272) : int24(887272); 252 | | 253 | * | hevm.prank($activeUser); 254 | * | try 255 | * | sfpm.mintTokenizedPosition($activeTokenId, positionSize, tickLimitLow, tickLimitHigh) 256 | | returns (LeftRightUnsigned[4] memory collectedByLeg, LeftRightSigned totalSwapped) { 257 | * | emit LogString("mint was successful"); 258 | | 259 | | // copy return into storage 260 | * | $sCollectedByLeg = collectedByLeg; 261 | * | $sTotalSwapped = totalSwapped; 262 | | 263 | | // preform post-mint invariant checks per leg 264 | * | for (uint i; i < $activeNumLegs; i++) { 265 | * | $activeLegIndex = i; 266 | | 267 | * | emit LogUint256("active leg index: ", $activeLegIndex); 268 | | 269 | | { 270 | * | $tickLowerActive = $sTickLower[$activeLegIndex]; 271 | * | $tickUpperActive = $sTickUpper[$activeLegIndex]; 272 | * | $LiqAmountActive = $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex]; 273 | | 274 | * | emit LogInt256("$tickLowerActive", $tickLowerActive); 275 | * | emit LogInt256("$tickUpperActive", $tickUpperActive); 276 | * | emit LogUint256("$LiqAmountActive", $LiqAmountActive); 277 | | } 278 | | 279 | | // check the liquidity deposited within uniswap 280 | | // ** make netting change 281 | | // { 282 | | // (uniLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex], , , , ) = pool.positions( 283 | | // $positionKey[$activeLegIndex] 284 | | // ); 285 | | 286 | | // emit LogUint256("uni liquidity before", uniLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex]); 287 | | // emit LogUint256("$LiqAmountActive", $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex]); 288 | | // emit LogUint256("uni liquidity after", uniLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex]); 289 | | 290 | | // // if multiple chunks touch the same leg the account for this difference 291 | | // // in the final returned amounts 292 | | // assertWithMsg( 293 | | // uniLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] + $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] == 294 | | // uniLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex], 295 | | // "invalid uniswap liq" 296 | | // ); 297 | | // } 298 | | 299 | | // check the net liquidity added 300 | | { 301 | * | LeftRightUnsigned accountLiquiditiesAfter = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 302 | * | address(pool), 303 | * | $activeUser, 304 | * | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 305 | * | $tickLowerActive, 306 | * | $tickUpperActive 307 | | ); 308 | | 309 | * | $removedLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesAfter.leftSlot(); 310 | * | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesAfter.rightSlot(); 311 | | 312 | * | emit LogUint256( 313 | | "removedLiquidityBefore", 314 | * | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] 315 | | ); 316 | * | emit LogUint256("netLiquidityBefore", $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex]); 317 | | 318 | * | emit LogUint256( 319 | | "removedLiquidityAfter", 320 | * | $removedLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] 321 | | ); 322 | * | emit LogUint256("netLiquidityAfter", $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex]); 323 | | 324 | | // check the liquidity tracked is the same as the liquidity computed 325 | * | assertWithMsg( 326 | | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] == 327 | * | $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] + $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], 328 | | "invalid net liquidity" 329 | | ); 330 | | 331 | | // ensure the removed liquidity remains the same 332 | * | assertWithMsg( 333 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] == 334 | * | $removedLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex], 335 | | "invalid removed liquidity" 336 | | ); 337 | | } 338 | | 339 | | // check stored fees base for this position 340 | | { 341 | * | ( 342 | | , 343 | * | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128After[$activeLegIndex], 344 | * | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128After[$activeLegIndex], 345 | | , 346 | | 347 | * | ) = pool.positions( 348 | * | keccak256( 349 | * | abi.encodePacked(address(sfpm), $tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive) 350 | | ) 351 | | ); 352 | | 353 | * | emit LogUint256( 354 | | "feeGrowthInside0LastX128After", 355 | * | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128After[$activeLegIndex] 356 | | ); 357 | * | emit LogUint256( 358 | | "feeGrowthInside1LastX128After", 359 | * | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128After[$activeLegIndex] 360 | | ); 361 | | 362 | | // new fees base 363 | * | $newFeesBaseRoundUp0[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 364 | | int256( 365 | * | Math.mulDiv128RoundingUp( 366 | * | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128After[$activeLegIndex], 367 | | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] 368 | | ) 369 | | ) 370 | | ); 371 | * | $newFeesBaseRoundUp1[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 372 | | int256( 373 | * | Math.mulDiv128RoundingUp( 374 | * | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128After[$activeLegIndex], 375 | | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] 376 | | ) 377 | | ) 378 | | ); 379 | | 380 | | // check newly stored feesBase 381 | | 382 | * | ($newFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], $newFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]) = sfpm 383 | | .getAccountFeesBase( 384 | * | address(pool), 385 | * | $activeUser, 386 | * | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 387 | * | $tickLowerActive, 388 | * | $tickUpperActive 389 | | ); 390 | | 391 | * | emit LogInt256("oldFeesBase0", $oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex]); 392 | * | emit LogInt256("oldFeesBase1", $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]); 393 | | 394 | * | emit LogInt256("newFeesBase0", $newFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex]); 395 | * | emit LogInt256("newFeesBase1", $newFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]); 396 | | 397 | * | emit LogInt256("$newFeesBaseRoundUp0", $newFeesBaseRoundUp0[$activeLegIndex]); 398 | * | emit LogInt256("$newFeesBaseRoundUp1", $newFeesBaseRoundUp1[$activeLegIndex]); 399 | | 400 | * | assertWithMsg( 401 | * | $newFeesBaseRoundUp0[$activeLegIndex] == $newFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], 402 | | "invalid fees base 0" 403 | | ); 404 | * | assertWithMsg( 405 | * | $newFeesBaseRoundUp1[$activeLegIndex] == $newFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex], 406 | | "invalid fees base 1" 407 | | ); 408 | | } 409 | | 410 | | /// compute and verify the amounts to collect 411 | | { 412 | * | $collected0[$activeLegIndex] = $recievedAmount0[$activeLegIndex]; 413 | * | $collected1[$activeLegIndex] = $recievedAmount1[$activeLegIndex]; 414 | | 415 | * | emit LogInt256("amountToCollect0", $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex]); 416 | * | emit LogInt256("amountToCollect1", $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex]); 417 | | 418 | * | emit LogUint256("receivedAmount0", $recievedAmount0[$activeLegIndex]); 419 | * | emit LogUint256("receivedAmount1", $recievedAmount1[$activeLegIndex]); 420 | | 421 | * | emit LogUint256("amountMinted0", $amountMinted0[$activeLegIndex]); 422 | * | emit LogUint256("amountMinted1", $amountMinted1[$activeLegIndex]); 423 | | 424 | * | emit LogUint256("collected0", $collected0[$activeLegIndex]); 425 | * | emit LogUint256("collected1", $collected1[$activeLegIndex]); 426 | | 427 | * | emit LogUint256( 428 | | "collectedByLeg token 0", 429 | * | $sCollectedByLeg[$activeLegIndex].rightSlot() 430 | | ); 431 | * | emit LogUint256( 432 | | "collectedByLeg token 1", 433 | * | $sCollectedByLeg[$activeLegIndex].leftSlot() 434 | | ); 435 | | 436 | * | assertWithMsg( 437 | | $collected0[$activeLegIndex] == 438 | * | $sCollectedByLeg[$activeLegIndex].rightSlot(), 439 | | "invalid collected 0" 440 | | ); 441 | * | assertWithMsg( 442 | | $collected1[$activeLegIndex] == 443 | * | $sCollectedByLeg[$activeLegIndex].leftSlot(), 444 | | "invalid collected 1" 445 | | ); 446 | | 447 | | { 448 | | // get premium gross 449 | * | ( 450 | * | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 451 | * | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 452 | * | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 453 | * | address(pool), 454 | * | $activeUser, 455 | * | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 456 | * | $tickLowerActive, 457 | * | $tickUpperActive, 458 | * | type(int24).max, 459 | | 0 // to query gross 460 | | ); 461 | | 462 | | // get premium owed 463 | * | ( 464 | * | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 465 | * | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 466 | * | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 467 | * | address(pool), 468 | * | $activeUser, 469 | * | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 470 | * | $tickLowerActive, 471 | * | $tickUpperActive, 472 | * | type(int24).max, 473 | | 1 // to query owed 474 | | ); 475 | | 476 | | // gross 477 | * | emit LogUint256( 478 | | "$accountPremiumGrossAfter0", 479 | * | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex] 480 | | ); 481 | * | emit LogUint256( 482 | | "$accountPremiumGrossAfter1", 483 | * | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 484 | | ); 485 | | // owed 486 | * | emit LogUint256( 487 | | "$accountPremiumOwedAfter0", 488 | * | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex] 489 | | ); 490 | * | emit LogUint256( 491 | | "$accountPremiumOwedAfter1", 492 | * | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 493 | | ); 494 | | 495 | * | if ( 496 | * | $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] != 0 || 497 | * | $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] != 0 498 | | ) { 499 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumOwed; 500 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumGross; 501 | | 502 | | /// assert premia values before and after 503 | | // add previous s_accountPremiumOwed by new amounts (if previously uint128 max ensure it doesn't overflow) 504 | | try 505 | | this.getPremiaDeltasChecked( 506 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], 507 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], 508 | | $collected0[$activeLegIndex], 509 | | $collected1[$activeLegIndex] 510 | | ) 511 | | returns ( 512 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumOwedR, 513 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumGrossR 514 | | ) { 515 | | // pass 516 | | deltaPremiumOwed = deltaPremiumOwedR; 517 | | deltaPremiumGross = deltaPremiumGrossR; 518 | | } catch { 519 | | assertWithMsg(false, "fail in premia calc"); 520 | | } 521 | | 522 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumOwed 0", deltaPremiumOwed.rightSlot()); 523 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumOwed 1", deltaPremiumOwed.leftSlot()); 524 | | // 525 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumGross 0", deltaPremiumGross.rightSlot()); 526 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumGross 1", deltaPremiumGross.leftSlot()); 527 | | 528 | | // ensure getAccountPremium up to the current touch(max tick) vals match 529 | | // against the externally computed premia values 530 | | ( 531 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated0[$activeLegIndex], 532 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated1[$activeLegIndex], 533 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated0[$activeLegIndex], 534 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] 535 | | ) = incrementPremiaAccumulator( 536 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 537 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex], 538 | | // 539 | | deltaPremiumGross.rightSlot(), 540 | | deltaPremiumGross.leftSlot(), 541 | | // 542 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 543 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex], 544 | | // 545 | | deltaPremiumOwed.rightSlot(), 546 | | deltaPremiumOwed.leftSlot() 547 | | ); 548 | | 549 | | emit LogUint256( 550 | | "$accountPremiumGrossCalculated0", 551 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] 552 | | ); 553 | | emit LogUint256( 554 | | "$accountPremiumGrossCalculated1", 555 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] 556 | | ); 557 | | // 558 | | emit LogUint256( 559 | | "$accountPremiumOwedCalculated0", 560 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] 561 | | ); 562 | | emit LogUint256( 563 | | "$accountPremiumOwedCalculated1", 564 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] 565 | | ); 566 | | 567 | | // check calculated gross matches up with stored 568 | | assertWithMsg( 569 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] == 570 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 571 | | "invalid gross 0" 572 | | ); 573 | | assertWithMsg( 574 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] == 575 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 576 | | "invalid gross 1" 577 | | ); 578 | | 579 | | // check owed matches up with stored 580 | | assertWithMsg( 581 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] == 582 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 583 | | "invalid owed 0" 584 | | ); 585 | | assertWithMsg( 586 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] == 587 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 588 | | "invalid owed 1" 589 | | ); 590 | | } else { 591 | | // gross checks 592 | * | assertWithMsg( 593 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex] == 594 | * | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 595 | | "invalid gross 0 -> no collect" 596 | | ); 597 | * | assertWithMsg( 598 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex] == 599 | * | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 600 | | "invalid gross 1 -> no collect" 601 | | ); 602 | | 603 | | // owed checks 604 | * | assertWithMsg( 605 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex] == 606 | * | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 607 | | "invalid owed 0 -> no collect" 608 | | ); 609 | * | assertWithMsg( 610 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex] == 611 | * | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 612 | | "invalid owed 1 -> no collect" 613 | | ); 614 | | } 615 | | } 616 | | } 617 | | 618 | | // check the balance of their ERC1155 id increased by position size 619 | | { 620 | | // adjust balances and verify 621 | * | _increment_tokenBalance(positionSize); 622 | * | _check_tokenBalance(); 623 | | } 624 | | } 625 | | 626 | | // add minted option to mapping of minted SFPM positions (to grab for burn) 627 | * | userPositionsSFPMShort[msg.sender].push($activeTokenId); 628 | | 629 | | // reset the activeTokenId for next iteration 630 | * | $activeTokenId = TokenId.wrap(uint256(0)); 631 | | } catch Error(string memory reason) { 632 | | emit LogString(reason); 633 | | 634 | | emit LogBool("should revert ?", $shouldRevertSFPM); 635 | | 636 | | assertWithMsg($shouldRevertSFPM, "non-expected revert"); 637 | | } 638 | | } 639 | | 640 | * | function mint_option_SFPM_multiLong( 641 | | uint8 numLegs, 642 | | uint8 randNumber, 643 | | uint128 positionSize, 644 | | bool swapAtMint 645 | * | ) public { 646 | * | $shouldRevertSFPM = false; 647 | | 648 | | // store the current actor 649 | * | $activeUser = msg.sender; 650 | | 651 | | // generate a random number of legs 652 | * | $activeNumLegs = bound(numLegs, 1, 4); 653 | | 654 | | // initialize tokenId 655 | * | $activeTokenId = TokenId.wrap(poolId); 656 | | 657 | | { 658 | | // search for a tokenId that the current actor has sold 659 | * | uint256 totalPosLen = userPositionsSFPMShort[$activeUser].length; 660 | | 661 | * | if (totalPosLen == 0) { 662 | | // if no short positions exist for the user then pass 663 | *r | revert(); 664 | | } 665 | | 666 | | // either bound to the max amount of short tokenId's or active number of legs 667 | * | uint256 maxIndex = totalPosLen - 1; 668 | * | uint256 maxLoop = maxIndex > $activeNumLegs ? maxIndex : $activeNumLegs; 669 | | 670 | * | for (uint i; i < maxLoop; i++) { 671 | * | TokenId currTokenId = userPositionsSFPMLong[$activeUser][maxLoop - i]; 672 | | 673 | | // grab random leg from random tokenId 674 | | uint256 legIndex = bound(randNumber, 0, currTokenId.countLegs() - 1); 675 | | 676 | | // append the leg to the constructed long leg 677 | | $activeTokenId.addLeg( 678 | | i, 679 | | currTokenId.optionRatio(i), 680 | | currTokenId.asset(i), 681 | | 1, // flip long 682 | | currTokenId.tokenType(i), 683 | | currTokenId.riskPartner(i), 684 | | currTokenId.strike(i), 685 | | currTokenId.width(i) 686 | | ); 687 | | } 688 | | } 689 | | 690 | | // pre-mint calculations/actions for storage 691 | | for (uint i; i < $activeNumLegs; i++) { 692 | | $activeLegIndex = i; 693 | | 694 | | emit LogUint256("active leg index: ", $activeLegIndex); 695 | | 696 | | { 697 | | // get the amount of liquidity being deposited 698 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex] = PanopticMath.getLiquidityChunk( 699 | | $activeTokenId, 700 | | $activeLegIndex, 701 | | positionSize 702 | | ); 703 | | 704 | * | $sTickLower[$activeLegIndex] = $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(); 705 | * | $sTickUpper[$activeLegIndex] = $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper(); 706 | * | $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] = $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].liquidity(); 707 | | 708 | | // *** if liquidity amounts is zero then execution should revert *** 709 | | { 710 | | if ($sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] == 0) $shouldRevertSFPM = true; 711 | | } 712 | | 713 | | // store the active position details 714 | | { 715 | | $tickLowerActive = $sTickLower[$activeLegIndex]; 716 | | $tickUpperActive = $sTickUpper[$activeLegIndex]; 717 | | $LiqAmountActive = $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex]; 718 | | } 719 | | 720 | | // emit positional bounds and liquidity 721 | | emit LogInt256("tick lower", $tickLowerActive); 722 | | emit LogInt256("tick upper", $tickUpperActive); 723 | | emit LogUint256("liquidity amounts", $LiqAmountActive); 724 | | } 725 | | 726 | | // poke if there is pre-existing liq for the user at the positional bounds 727 | | { 728 | | hevm.prank(address(sfpm)); 729 | | try pool.burn($tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive, 0) {} catch {} 730 | | } 731 | | 732 | | { 733 | | // get the amount of liquidity within that range present in uniswap already 734 | | $positionKey[$activeLegIndex] = keccak256( 735 | | abi.encodePacked(address(sfpm), $tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive) 736 | | ); 737 | | (uniLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], , , , ) = pool.positions( 738 | | $positionKey[$activeLegIndex] 739 | | ); 740 | | 741 | | // get SFPM stored account liquidity before 742 | | LeftRightUnsigned accountLiquiditiesBefore = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 743 | | address(pool), 744 | | $activeUser, 745 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 746 | | $tickLowerActive, 747 | | $tickUpperActive 748 | | ); 749 | | 750 | | // store the removed and net liquidity for the chunk 751 | | // before mint 752 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesBefore.leftSlot(); 753 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesBefore.rightSlot(); 754 | | } 755 | | 756 | | { 757 | | // s_accountFeesBase before 758 | | // check s_accountFeesBase is updated correctly 759 | | ($oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]) = sfpm 760 | | .getAccountFeesBase( 761 | | address(pool), 762 | | $activeUser, 763 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 764 | | $tickLowerActive, 765 | | $tickUpperActive 766 | | ); 767 | | 768 | | emit LogInt256("pre-mint feesbase 0", $oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex]); 769 | | emit LogInt256("pre-mint feesbase 1", $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]); 770 | | } 771 | | 772 | | { 773 | | ( 774 | | , 775 | | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex], 776 | | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex], 777 | | , 778 | | 779 | | ) = pool.positions( 780 | | keccak256(abi.encodePacked(address(sfpm), $tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive)) 781 | | ); 782 | | 783 | | // after touch 784 | | emit LogUint256( 785 | | "pre-mint feeGrowthInside0LastX128", 786 | | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex] 787 | | ); 788 | | emit LogUint256( 789 | | "pre-mint feeGrowthInside1LastX128", 790 | | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex] 791 | | ); 792 | | } 793 | | 794 | | { 795 | | $newFeesBaseRoundDown0[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 796 | | int256( 797 | * | Math.mulDiv128( 798 | * | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex], 799 | * | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] 800 | | ) 801 | | ) 802 | | ); 803 | | $newFeesBaseRoundDown1[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 804 | | int256( 805 | | Math.mulDiv128( 806 | | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex], 807 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] 808 | | ) 809 | | ) 810 | | ); 811 | | 812 | | emit LogInt256("newFeesBaseRoundDown0", $newFeesBaseRoundDown0[$activeLegIndex]); 813 | | emit LogInt256("newFeesBaseRoundDown1", $newFeesBaseRoundDown1[$activeLegIndex]); 814 | | 815 | | // 816 | | $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 817 | * | Math.max( 818 | * | $newFeesBaseRoundDown0[$activeLegIndex] - $oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], 819 | * | 0 820 | | ) 821 | | ); 822 | | $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 823 | | Math.max( 824 | * | $newFeesBaseRoundDown1[$activeLegIndex] - $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex], 825 | | 0 826 | | ) 827 | | ); 828 | | 829 | | // get the burned amounts (true moved amounts) 830 | | // also get the true collected amounts 831 | | quote_uni_CollectAndBurn(); 832 | | } 833 | | 834 | | // get premium gross/owed before (compute with max tick to get value stored in sfpm currently) 835 | | // after check if stored value matches this value 836 | | { 837 | | ( 838 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 839 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 840 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 841 | | address(pool), 842 | | $activeUser, 843 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 844 | | $tickLowerActive, 845 | | $tickUpperActive, 846 | | type(int24).max, 847 | | 0 // short to check gross 848 | | ); 849 | | 850 | | // get gross premium 851 | | emit LogUint256( 852 | | "$accountPremiumGrossBefore0", 853 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex] 854 | | ); 855 | | emit LogUint256( 856 | | "$accountPremiumGrossBefore1", 857 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 858 | | ); 859 | | 860 | | // owed premium 861 | | ( 862 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 863 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 864 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 865 | | address(pool), 866 | | $activeUser, 867 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 868 | | $tickLowerActive, 869 | | $tickUpperActive, 870 | | type(int24).max, 871 | | 1 // long to check owed 872 | | ); 873 | | 874 | | // get owed premium 875 | | emit LogUint256( 876 | | "$accountPremiumOwedBefore0", 877 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex] 878 | | ); 879 | | emit LogUint256( 880 | | "$accountPremiumOwedBefore1", 881 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 882 | | ); 883 | | } 884 | | } 885 | | 886 | | // reverse tick order if swap at mint 887 | | int24 tickLimitLow = swapAtMint ? int24(887272) : int24(-887272); 888 | | int24 tickLimitHigh = swapAtMint ? int24(-887272) : int24(887272); 889 | | 890 | | hevm.prank($activeUser); 891 | *r | try 892 | | sfpm.mintTokenizedPosition($activeTokenId, positionSize, tickLimitLow, tickLimitHigh) 893 | | returns (LeftRightUnsigned[4] memory collectedByLeg, LeftRightSigned totalSwapped) { 894 | | emit LogString("mint was successful"); 895 | | 896 | | // copy return into storage 897 | | $sCollectedByLeg = collectedByLeg; 898 | | $sTotalSwapped = totalSwapped; 899 | | 900 | | // preform post-mint invariant checks per leg 901 | | for (uint i; i < $activeNumLegs; i++) { 902 | | $activeLegIndex = i; 903 | | 904 | | emit LogUint256("active leg index: ", $activeLegIndex); 905 | | 906 | | { 907 | | $tickLowerActive = $sTickLower[$activeLegIndex]; 908 | | $tickUpperActive = $sTickUpper[$activeLegIndex]; 909 | | $LiqAmountActive = $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex]; 910 | | 911 | | emit LogInt256("$tickLowerActive", $tickLowerActive); 912 | | emit LogInt256("$tickUpperActive", $tickUpperActive); 913 | | emit LogUint256("$LiqAmountActive", $LiqAmountActive); 914 | | } 915 | | 916 | | // check the liquidity deposited within uniswap 917 | | // ** make netting change 918 | | // { 919 | | // (uniLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex], , , , ) = pool.positions( 920 | | // $positionKey[$activeLegIndex] 921 | | // ); 922 | | 923 | | // emit LogUint256("uni liquidity before", uniLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex]); 924 | | // emit LogUint256("$LiqAmountActive", $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex]); 925 | | // emit LogUint256("uni liquidity after", uniLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex]); 926 | | 927 | | // // if multiple chunks touch the same leg the account for this difference 928 | | // // in the final returned amounts 929 | | // assertWithMsg( 930 | | // uniLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] + $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] == 931 | | // uniLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex], 932 | | // "invalid uniswap liq" 933 | | // ); 934 | | // } 935 | | 936 | | // check the net liquidity added 937 | | { 938 | | LeftRightUnsigned accountLiquiditiesAfter = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 939 | | address(pool), 940 | | $activeUser, 941 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 942 | | $tickLowerActive, 943 | | $tickUpperActive 944 | | ); 945 | | 946 | | $removedLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesAfter.leftSlot(); 947 | | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesAfter.rightSlot(); 948 | | 949 | | emit LogUint256( 950 | | "removedLiquidityBefore", 951 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] 952 | | ); 953 | | emit LogUint256("netLiquidityBefore", $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex]); 954 | | 955 | | emit LogUint256( 956 | | "removedLiquidityAfter", 957 | | $removedLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] 958 | | ); 959 | | emit LogUint256("netLiquidityAfter", $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex]); 960 | | 961 | | // check the liquidity tracked is the same as the liquidity computed 962 | * | assertWithMsg( 963 | * | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] == 964 | * | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] - $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex], 965 | | "invalid net liquidity" 966 | | ); 967 | | 968 | | // ensure the removed liquidity is incremented 969 | | assertWithMsg( 970 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] + $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] == 971 | | $removedLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex], 972 | | "invalid removed liquidity" 973 | | ); 974 | | } 975 | | 976 | | // check stored fees base for this position 977 | | { 978 | | ( 979 | | , 980 | | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128After[$activeLegIndex], 981 | | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128After[$activeLegIndex], 982 | | , 983 | | 984 | | ) = pool.positions( 985 | | keccak256( 986 | | abi.encodePacked(address(sfpm), $tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive) 987 | | ) 988 | | ); 989 | | 990 | | emit LogUint256( 991 | | "feeGrowthInside0LastX128After", 992 | | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128After[$activeLegIndex] 993 | | ); 994 | | emit LogUint256( 995 | | "feeGrowthInside1LastX128After", 996 | | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128After[$activeLegIndex] 997 | | ); 998 | | 999 | | // new fees base 1000 | | $newFeesBaseRoundUp0[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 1001 | | int256( 1002 | * | Math.mulDiv128RoundingUp( 1003 | * | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128After[$activeLegIndex], 1004 | * | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] 1005 | | ) 1006 | | ) 1007 | | ); 1008 | | $newFeesBaseRoundUp1[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 1009 | | int256( 1010 | | Math.mulDiv128RoundingUp( 1011 | | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128After[$activeLegIndex], 1012 | | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] 1013 | | ) 1014 | | ) 1015 | | ); 1016 | | 1017 | | // check newly stored feesBase 1018 | | 1019 | | ($newFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], $newFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]) = sfpm 1020 | | .getAccountFeesBase( 1021 | | address(pool), 1022 | | $activeUser, 1023 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 1024 | | $tickLowerActive, 1025 | | $tickUpperActive 1026 | | ); 1027 | | 1028 | | emit LogInt256("oldFeesBase0", $oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex]); 1029 | | emit LogInt256("oldFeesBase1", $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]); 1030 | | 1031 | | emit LogInt256("newFeesBase0", $newFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex]); 1032 | | emit LogInt256("newFeesBase1", $newFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]); 1033 | | 1034 | | emit LogInt256("$newFeesBaseRoundUp0", $newFeesBaseRoundUp0[$activeLegIndex]); 1035 | | emit LogInt256("$newFeesBaseRoundUp1", $newFeesBaseRoundUp1[$activeLegIndex]); 1036 | | 1037 | * | assertWithMsg( 1038 | * | $newFeesBaseRoundUp0[$activeLegIndex] == $newFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], 1039 | | "invalid fees base 0" 1040 | | ); 1041 | * | assertWithMsg( 1042 | * | $newFeesBaseRoundUp1[$activeLegIndex] == $newFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex], 1043 | | "invalid fees base 1" 1044 | | ); 1045 | | } 1046 | | 1047 | | /// compute and verify the amounts to collect 1048 | | { 1049 | | $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] += int128($amountBurned0[$activeLegIndex]); 1050 | | $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] += int128($amountBurned1[$activeLegIndex]); 1051 | | 1052 | | // ensure amountToCollect is always positive 1053 | * | assertWithMsg( 1054 | * | $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] >= 0, 1055 | | "amountToCollect0 invalid" 1056 | | ); 1057 | * | assertWithMsg( 1058 | * | $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] >= 0, 1059 | | "amountToCollect1 invalid" 1060 | | ); 1061 | | 1062 | | // ensure that the collected amounts never underflow 1063 | | // as the collected amounts are computed in an unchecked block 1064 | | assertWithMsg( 1065 | | $recievedAmount0[$activeLegIndex] >= 1066 | | uint128(int128($amountBurned0[$activeLegIndex])), 1067 | | "collected 0 underflow" 1068 | | ); 1069 | | assertWithMsg( 1070 | | $recievedAmount1[$activeLegIndex] >= 1071 | | uint128(int128($amountBurned1[$activeLegIndex])), 1072 | | "collected 1 underflow" 1073 | | ); 1074 | | 1075 | | $collected0[$activeLegIndex] = 1076 | | $recievedAmount0[$activeLegIndex] - 1077 | | uint128(int128($amountBurned0[$activeLegIndex])); 1078 | | $collected1[$activeLegIndex] = 1079 | | $recievedAmount1[$activeLegIndex] - 1080 | | uint128(int128($amountBurned1[$activeLegIndex])); 1081 | | 1082 | | emit LogInt256("amountToCollect0", $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex]); 1083 | | emit LogInt256("amountToCollect1", $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex]); 1084 | | 1085 | | emit LogUint256("receivedAmount0", $recievedAmount0[$activeLegIndex]); 1086 | | emit LogUint256("receivedAmount1", $recievedAmount1[$activeLegIndex]); 1087 | | 1088 | | emit LogInt256("amountBurned0", $amountBurned0[$activeLegIndex]); 1089 | | emit LogInt256("amountBurned1", $amountBurned1[$activeLegIndex]); 1090 | | 1091 | | emit LogUint256("collected0", $collected0[$activeLegIndex]); 1092 | | emit LogUint256("collected1", $collected1[$activeLegIndex]); 1093 | | 1094 | | emit LogUint256( 1095 | | "collectedByLeg token 0", 1096 | | $sCollectedByLeg[$activeLegIndex].rightSlot() 1097 | | ); 1098 | | emit LogUint256( 1099 | | "collectedByLeg token 1", 1100 | * | $sCollectedByLeg[$activeLegIndex].leftSlot() 1101 | | ); 1102 | | 1103 | * | assertWithMsg( 1104 | * | $collected0[$activeLegIndex] == 1105 | * | $sCollectedByLeg[$activeLegIndex].rightSlot(), 1106 | | "invalid collected 0" 1107 | | ); 1108 | * | assertWithMsg( 1109 | * | $collected1[$activeLegIndex] == 1110 | * | $sCollectedByLeg[$activeLegIndex].leftSlot(), 1111 | | "invalid collected 1" 1112 | | ); 1113 | | 1114 | | { 1115 | | // get premium gross 1116 | | ( 1117 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 1118 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 1119 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 1120 | | address(pool), 1121 | | $activeUser, 1122 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 1123 | | $tickLowerActive, 1124 | | $tickUpperActive, 1125 | | type(int24).max, 1126 | | 0 // to query gross 1127 | | ); 1128 | | 1129 | | // get premium owed 1130 | | ( 1131 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 1132 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 1133 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 1134 | | address(pool), 1135 | | $activeUser, 1136 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 1137 | | $tickLowerActive, 1138 | | $tickUpperActive, 1139 | | type(int24).max, 1140 | | 1 // to query owed 1141 | | ); 1142 | | 1143 | | // gross 1144 | | emit LogUint256( 1145 | | "$accountPremiumGrossAfter0", 1146 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex] 1147 | | ); 1148 | | emit LogUint256( 1149 | | "$accountPremiumGrossAfter1", 1150 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 1151 | | ); 1152 | | // owed 1153 | | emit LogUint256( 1154 | | "$accountPremiumOwedAfter0", 1155 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex] 1156 | | ); 1157 | | emit LogUint256( 1158 | | "$accountPremiumOwedAfter1", 1159 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 1160 | | ); 1161 | | 1162 | | if ( 1163 | | $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] != 0 || 1164 | | $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] != 0 1165 | | ) { 1166 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumOwed; 1167 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumGross; 1168 | | 1169 | | /// assert premia values before and after 1170 | | // add previous s_accountPremiumOwed by new amounts (if previously uint128 max ensure it doesn't overflow) 1171 | | try 1172 | | this.getPremiaDeltasChecked( 1173 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], 1174 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], 1175 | | $collected0[$activeLegIndex], 1176 | | $collected1[$activeLegIndex] 1177 | | ) 1178 | | returns ( 1179 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumOwedR, 1180 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumGrossR 1181 | | ) { 1182 | | // pass 1183 | | deltaPremiumOwed = deltaPremiumOwedR; 1184 | | deltaPremiumGross = deltaPremiumGrossR; 1185 | | } catch { 1186 | | assertWithMsg(false, "fail in premia calc"); 1187 | | } 1188 | | 1189 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumOwed 0", deltaPremiumOwed.rightSlot()); 1190 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumOwed 1", deltaPremiumOwed.leftSlot()); 1191 | | // 1192 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumGross 0", deltaPremiumGross.rightSlot()); 1193 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumGross 1", deltaPremiumGross.leftSlot()); 1194 | | 1195 | | // ensure getAccountPremium up to the current touch(max tick) vals match 1196 | | // against the externally computed premia values 1197 | | ( 1198 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated0[$activeLegIndex], 1199 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated1[$activeLegIndex], 1200 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated0[$activeLegIndex], 1201 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] 1202 | | ) = incrementPremiaAccumulator( 1203 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 1204 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex], 1205 | | // 1206 | | deltaPremiumGross.rightSlot(), 1207 | | deltaPremiumGross.leftSlot(), 1208 | | // 1209 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 1210 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex], 1211 | | // 1212 | | deltaPremiumOwed.rightSlot(), 1213 | | deltaPremiumOwed.leftSlot() 1214 | | ); 1215 | | 1216 | | emit LogUint256( 1217 | | "$accountPremiumGrossCalculated0", 1218 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] 1219 | | ); 1220 | | emit LogUint256( 1221 | | "$accountPremiumGrossCalculated1", 1222 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] 1223 | | ); 1224 | | // 1225 | | emit LogUint256( 1226 | | "$accountPremiumOwedCalculated0", 1227 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] 1228 | | ); 1229 | | emit LogUint256( 1230 | | "$accountPremiumOwedCalculated1", 1231 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] 1232 | | ); 1233 | | 1234 | | // check calculated gross matches up with stored 1235 | | assertWithMsg( 1236 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] == 1237 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 1238 | | "invalid gross 0" 1239 | | ); 1240 | | assertWithMsg( 1241 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] == 1242 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 1243 | | "invalid gross 1" 1244 | | ); 1245 | | 1246 | | // check owed matches up with stored 1247 | | assertWithMsg( 1248 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] == 1249 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 1250 | | "invalid owed 0" 1251 | | ); 1252 | | assertWithMsg( 1253 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] == 1254 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 1255 | | "invalid owed 1" 1256 | | ); 1257 | | } else { 1258 | | // gross checks 1259 | * | assertWithMsg( 1260 | * | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex] == 1261 | * | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 1262 | | "invalid gross 0 -> no collect" 1263 | | ); 1264 | * | assertWithMsg( 1265 | * | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex] == 1266 | * | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 1267 | | "invalid gross 1 -> no collect" 1268 | | ); 1269 | | 1270 | | // owed checks 1271 | * | assertWithMsg( 1272 | * | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex] == 1273 | * | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 1274 | | "invalid owed 0 -> no collect" 1275 | | ); 1276 | * | assertWithMsg( 1277 | * | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex] == 1278 | * | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 1279 | | "invalid owed 1 -> no collect" 1280 | | ); 1281 | | } 1282 | | } 1283 | | } 1284 | | 1285 | | // check the balance of their ERC1155 id increased by position size 1286 | | { 1287 | | // adjust balances and verify 1288 | | _increment_tokenBalance(positionSize); 1289 | | _check_tokenBalance(); 1290 | | } 1291 | | } 1292 | | 1293 | | // add minted option to mapping of minted SFPM positions (to grab for burn) 1294 | | userPositionsSFPMLong[msg.sender].push($activeTokenId); 1295 | | 1296 | | // reset the activeTokenId for next iteration 1297 | | $activeTokenId = TokenId.wrap(uint256(0)); 1298 | | } catch Error(string memory reason) { 1299 | | emit LogString(reason); 1300 | | 1301 | | emit LogBool("should revert ?", $shouldRevertSFPM); 1302 | | 1303 | | assertWithMsg($shouldRevertSFPM, "non-expected revert"); 1304 | | } 1305 | | } 1306 | | 1307 | | /// *** general multiple mints of longs + shorts 1308 | | // check for should revert flag and bound so that it is a valid event 1309 | | // looks for chunks minted via the panoptic pool 1310 | * | function mint_option_SFPM_general( 1311 | | uint256 numLegs, 1312 | | bool[4] memory asset_in, 1313 | | bool[4] memory is_call_in, 1314 | | bool[4] memory is_long_in, 1315 | | bool[4] memory is_otm_in, 1316 | | bool[4] memory is_atm_in, 1317 | | uint24[4] memory width_in, 1318 | | int256[4] memory strike_in, 1319 | | uint128 positionSize, 1320 | | bool swapAtMint, 1321 | | uint8 randSeed 1322 | | ) public { 1323 | * | $shouldRevertSFPM = false; 1324 | | 1325 | | // store the current actor 1326 | * | $activeUser = msg.sender; 1327 | | 1328 | | // generate a random number of legs 1329 | * | $activeNumLegs = bound(numLegs, 1, 4); 1330 | | 1331 | | // initialize tokenId 1332 | | // ** find matching short chunks for the long legs to increase success rate ?? 1333 | * | $activeTokenId = _generate_multiple_leg_tokenid( 1334 | * | numLegs, 1335 | * | asset_in, 1336 | * | is_call_in, 1337 | * | is_long_in, 1338 | * | is_otm_in, 1339 | * | is_atm_in, 1340 | * | width_in, 1341 | * | strike_in 1342 | | ); 1343 | | 1344 | | // if the count of legs is less than 4 then add a chunk minted via the panoptic pool 1345 | | if ($activeNumLegs < 4) { 1346 | | uint256 totalPPChunks = touchedPanopticChunks.length; 1347 | | 1348 | | ChunkWithTokenType memory touchedChunk = touchedPanopticChunks[ 1349 | | bound(randSeed, 0, touchedPanopticChunks.length - 1) 1350 | | ]; 1351 | | 1352 | | // randomly selected chunk 1353 | | $activeTokenId = $activeTokenId.addLeg( 1354 | | $activeNumLegs - 1, 1355 | | 1, // option ratio 1356 | | uint256(asset_in[0] ? 1 : 0), 1357 | | uint256(is_long_in[0] ? 1 : 0), 1358 | | touchedChunk.tokenType, 1359 | | $activeNumLegs - 1, 1360 | | touchedChunk.strike, 1361 | | touchedChunk.width 1362 | | ); 1363 | | 1364 | | // increment active number of legs 1365 | | $activeNumLegs++; 1366 | | } 1367 | | 1368 | | // pre-mint calculations/actions for storage 1369 | | for (uint i; i < $activeNumLegs; i++) { 1370 | | $activeLegIndex = i; 1371 | | 1372 | | emit LogUint256("active leg index: ", $activeLegIndex); 1373 | | 1374 | | { 1375 | | // get the amount of liquidity being deposited 1376 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex] = PanopticMath.getLiquidityChunk( 1377 | | $activeTokenId, 1378 | | $activeLegIndex, 1379 | | positionSize 1380 | | ); 1381 | | 1382 | | $sTickLower[$activeLegIndex] = $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(); 1383 | | $sTickUpper[$activeLegIndex] = $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper(); 1384 | | $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] = $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].liquidity(); 1385 | | 1386 | | // *** if liquidity amounts is zero then execution should revert *** 1387 | | { 1388 | | if ($sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] == 0) $shouldRevertSFPM = true; 1389 | | } 1390 | | 1391 | | // store the active position details 1392 | | { 1393 | | $tickLowerActive = $sTickLower[$activeLegIndex]; 1394 | | $tickUpperActive = $sTickUpper[$activeLegIndex]; 1395 | | $LiqAmountActive = $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex]; 1396 | | } 1397 | | 1398 | | // emit positional bounds and liquidity 1399 | | emit LogInt256("tick lower", $tickLowerActive); 1400 | | emit LogInt256("tick upper", $tickUpperActive); 1401 | | emit LogUint256("liquidity amounts", $LiqAmountActive); 1402 | | } 1403 | | 1404 | | // poke if there is pre-existing liq for the user at the positional bounds 1405 | | { 1406 | | hevm.prank(address(sfpm)); 1407 | | try pool.burn($tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive, 0) {} catch {} 1408 | | } 1409 | | 1410 | | { 1411 | | // get the amount of liquidity within that range present in uniswap already 1412 | | $positionKey[$activeLegIndex] = keccak256( 1413 | | abi.encodePacked(address(sfpm), $tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive) 1414 | | ); 1415 | | (uniLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], , , , ) = pool.positions( 1416 | | $positionKey[$activeLegIndex] 1417 | | ); 1418 | | 1419 | | // get SFPM stored account liquidity before 1420 | | LeftRightUnsigned accountLiquiditiesBefore = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 1421 | | address(pool), 1422 | | $activeUser, 1423 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 1424 | | $tickLowerActive, 1425 | | $tickUpperActive 1426 | | ); 1427 | | 1428 | | // store the removed and net liquidity for the chunk 1429 | | // before mint 1430 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesBefore.leftSlot(); 1431 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesBefore.rightSlot(); 1432 | | } 1433 | | 1434 | | { 1435 | | // s_accountFeesBase before 1436 | | // check s_accountFeesBase is updated correctly 1437 | | ($oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]) = sfpm 1438 | | .getAccountFeesBase( 1439 | | address(pool), 1440 | | $activeUser, 1441 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 1442 | | $tickLowerActive, 1443 | | $tickUpperActive 1444 | | ); 1445 | | 1446 | | emit LogInt256("pre-mint feesbase 0", $oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex]); 1447 | | emit LogInt256("pre-mint feesbase 1", $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]); 1448 | | } 1449 | | 1450 | | { 1451 | | ( 1452 | | , 1453 | | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex], 1454 | | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex], 1455 | | , 1456 | | 1457 | | ) = pool.positions( 1458 | | keccak256(abi.encodePacked(address(sfpm), $tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive)) 1459 | | ); 1460 | | 1461 | | // after touch 1462 | | emit LogUint256( 1463 | | "pre-mint feeGrowthInside0LastX128", 1464 | | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex] 1465 | | ); 1466 | | emit LogUint256( 1467 | | "pre-mint feeGrowthInside1LastX128", 1468 | | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex] 1469 | | ); 1470 | | } 1471 | | 1472 | | { 1473 | | $newFeesBaseRoundDown0[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 1474 | | int256( 1475 | | Math.mulDiv128( 1476 | | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex], 1477 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] 1478 | | ) 1479 | | ) 1480 | | ); 1481 | | $newFeesBaseRoundDown1[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 1482 | | int256( 1483 | | Math.mulDiv128( 1484 | | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128Before[$activeLegIndex], 1485 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] 1486 | | ) 1487 | | ) 1488 | | ); 1489 | | 1490 | | emit LogInt256("newFeesBaseRoundDown0", $newFeesBaseRoundDown0[$activeLegIndex]); 1491 | | emit LogInt256("newFeesBaseRoundDown1", $newFeesBaseRoundDown1[$activeLegIndex]); 1492 | | 1493 | | $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 1494 | | Math.max( 1495 | | $newFeesBaseRoundDown0[$activeLegIndex] - $oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], 1496 | | 0 1497 | | ) 1498 | | ); 1499 | | $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 1500 | | Math.max( 1501 | | $newFeesBaseRoundDown1[$activeLegIndex] - $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex], 1502 | | 0 1503 | | ) 1504 | | ); 1505 | | 1506 | | if ($activeTokenId.isLong($activeLegIndex) == 1) { 1507 | | quote_uni_CollectAndBurn(); 1508 | | } else { 1509 | | quote_uni_CollectAndMint(); 1510 | | } 1511 | | } 1512 | | 1513 | | // get premium gross/owed before (compute with max tick to get value stored in sfpm currently) 1514 | | // after check if stored value matches this value 1515 | | { 1516 | | ( 1517 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 1518 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 1519 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 1520 | | address(pool), 1521 | | $activeUser, 1522 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 1523 | | $tickLowerActive, 1524 | | $tickUpperActive, 1525 | | type(int24).max, 1526 | | 0 // short to check gross 1527 | | ); 1528 | | 1529 | | // get gross premium 1530 | | emit LogUint256( 1531 | | "$accountPremiumGrossBefore0", 1532 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex] 1533 | | ); 1534 | | emit LogUint256( 1535 | | "$accountPremiumGrossBefore1", 1536 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 1537 | | ); 1538 | | 1539 | | // owed premium 1540 | | ( 1541 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 1542 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 1543 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 1544 | | address(pool), 1545 | | $activeUser, 1546 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 1547 | | $tickLowerActive, 1548 | | $tickUpperActive, 1549 | | type(int24).max, 1550 | | 1 // long to check owed 1551 | | ); 1552 | | 1553 | | // get owed premium 1554 | | emit LogUint256( 1555 | | "$accountPremiumOwedBefore0", 1556 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex] 1557 | | ); 1558 | | emit LogUint256( 1559 | | "$accountPremiumOwedBefore1", 1560 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 1561 | | ); 1562 | | } 1563 | | } 1564 | | 1565 | | // reverse tick order if swap at mint 1566 | | int24 tickLimitLow = swapAtMint ? int24(887272) : int24(-887272); 1567 | | int24 tickLimitHigh = swapAtMint ? int24(-887272) : int24(887272); 1568 | | 1569 | | hevm.prank($activeUser); 1570 | | try 1571 | | sfpm.mintTokenizedPosition($activeTokenId, positionSize, tickLimitLow, tickLimitHigh) 1572 | | returns (LeftRightUnsigned[4] memory collectedByLeg, LeftRightSigned totalSwapped) { 1573 | | emit LogString("mint was successful"); 1574 | | 1575 | | // copy return into storage 1576 | | $sCollectedByLeg = collectedByLeg; 1577 | | $sTotalSwapped = totalSwapped; 1578 | | 1579 | | // preform post-mint invariant checks per leg 1580 | | for (uint i; i < $activeNumLegs; i++) { 1581 | | $activeLegIndex = i; 1582 | | 1583 | | emit LogUint256("active leg index: ", $activeLegIndex); 1584 | | 1585 | | { 1586 | | $tickLowerActive = $sTickLower[$activeLegIndex]; 1587 | | $tickUpperActive = $sTickUpper[$activeLegIndex]; 1588 | | $LiqAmountActive = $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex]; 1589 | | 1590 | | emit LogInt256("$tickLowerActive", $tickLowerActive); 1591 | | emit LogInt256("$tickUpperActive", $tickUpperActive); 1592 | | emit LogUint256("$LiqAmountActive", $LiqAmountActive); 1593 | | } 1594 | | 1595 | | // check the liquidity deposited within uniswap 1596 | | // ** make netting change 1597 | | // { 1598 | | // (uniLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex], , , , ) = pool.positions( 1599 | | // $positionKey[$activeLegIndex] 1600 | | // ); 1601 | | 1602 | | // emit LogUint256("uni liquidity before", uniLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex]); 1603 | | // emit LogUint256("$LiqAmountActive", $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex]); 1604 | | // emit LogUint256("uni liquidity after", uniLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex]); 1605 | | 1606 | | // // if multiple chunks touch the same leg the account for this difference 1607 | | // // in the final returned amounts 1608 | | // assertWithMsg( 1609 | | // uniLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] + $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] == 1610 | | // uniLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex], 1611 | | // "invalid uniswap liq" 1612 | | // ); 1613 | | // } 1614 | | 1615 | | // check the net liquidity added 1616 | | { 1617 | | LeftRightUnsigned accountLiquiditiesAfter = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 1618 | | address(pool), 1619 | | $activeUser, 1620 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 1621 | | $tickLowerActive, 1622 | | $tickUpperActive 1623 | | ); 1624 | | 1625 | | $removedLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesAfter.leftSlot(); 1626 | | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesAfter.rightSlot(); 1627 | | 1628 | | emit LogUint256( 1629 | | "removedLiquidityBefore", 1630 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] 1631 | | ); 1632 | | emit LogUint256("netLiquidityBefore", $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex]); 1633 | | 1634 | | emit LogUint256( 1635 | | "removedLiquidityAfter", 1636 | | $removedLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] 1637 | | ); 1638 | | emit LogUint256("netLiquidityAfter", $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex]); 1639 | | 1640 | | if ($activeTokenId.isLong($activeLegIndex) == 1) { 1641 | | // check the liquidity tracked is the same as the liquidity computed 1642 | | assertWithMsg( 1643 | | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] == 1644 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] - 1645 | | $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex], 1646 | | "invalid net liquidity" 1647 | | ); 1648 | | 1649 | | // ensure the removed liquidity is incremented 1650 | | assertWithMsg( 1651 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] + 1652 | | $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] == 1653 | | $removedLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex], 1654 | | "invalid removed liquidity" 1655 | | ); 1656 | | } else { 1657 | | // check the liquidity tracked is the same as the liquidity computed 1658 | | assertWithMsg( 1659 | | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] == 1660 | | $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] + 1661 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], 1662 | | "invalid net liquidity" 1663 | | ); 1664 | | 1665 | | // ensure the removed liquidity remains the same 1666 | | assertWithMsg( 1667 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] - 1668 | | $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] == 1669 | | $removedLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex], 1670 | | "invalid removed liquidity" 1671 | | ); 1672 | | } 1673 | | } 1674 | | 1675 | | // check stored fees base for this position 1676 | | { 1677 | | ( 1678 | | , 1679 | | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128After[$activeLegIndex], 1680 | | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128After[$activeLegIndex], 1681 | | , 1682 | | 1683 | | ) = pool.positions( 1684 | | keccak256( 1685 | | abi.encodePacked(address(sfpm), $tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive) 1686 | | ) 1687 | | ); 1688 | | 1689 | | emit LogUint256( 1690 | | "feeGrowthInside0LastX128After", 1691 | | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128After[$activeLegIndex] 1692 | | ); 1693 | | emit LogUint256( 1694 | | "feeGrowthInside1LastX128After", 1695 | | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128After[$activeLegIndex] 1696 | | );
