1697 | | 1698 | | // new fees base 1699 | | $newFeesBaseRoundUp0[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 1700 | | int256( 1701 | | Math.mulDiv128RoundingUp( 1702 | | $feeGrowthInside0LastX128After[$activeLegIndex], 1703 | | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] 1704 | | ) 1705 | | ) 1706 | | ); 1707 | | $newFeesBaseRoundUp1[$activeLegIndex] = int128( 1708 | | int256( 1709 | | Math.mulDiv128RoundingUp( 1710 | | $feeGrowthInside1LastX128After[$activeLegIndex], 1711 | | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] 1712 | | ) 1713 | | ) 1714 | | ); 1715 | | 1716 | | // check newly stored feesBase 1717 | | 1718 | | ($newFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], $newFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]) = sfpm 1719 | | .getAccountFeesBase( 1720 | | address(pool), 1721 | | $activeUser, 1722 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 1723 | | $tickLowerActive, 1724 | | $tickUpperActive 1725 | | ); 1726 | | 1727 | | emit LogInt256("oldFeesBase0", $oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex]); 1728 | | emit LogInt256("oldFeesBase1", $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]); 1729 | | 1730 | | emit LogInt256("newFeesBase0", $newFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex]); 1731 | | emit LogInt256("newFeesBase1", $newFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]); 1732 | | 1733 | | emit LogInt256("$newFeesBaseRoundUp0", $newFeesBaseRoundUp0[$activeLegIndex]); 1734 | | emit LogInt256("$newFeesBaseRoundUp1", $newFeesBaseRoundUp1[$activeLegIndex]); 1735 | | 1736 | | assertWithMsg( 1737 | | $newFeesBaseRoundUp0[$activeLegIndex] == $newFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], 1738 | | "invalid fees base 0" 1739 | | ); 1740 | | assertWithMsg( 1741 | | $newFeesBaseRoundUp1[$activeLegIndex] == $newFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex], 1742 | | "invalid fees base 1" 1743 | | ); 1744 | | } 1745 | | 1746 | | /// compute and verify the amounts to collect 1747 | | { 1748 | | if ($activeTokenId.isLong($activeLegIndex) == 1) { 1749 | | $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] += int128( 1750 | | $amountBurned0[$activeLegIndex] 1751 | | ); 1752 | | $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] += int128( 1753 | | $amountBurned1[$activeLegIndex] 1754 | | ); 1755 | | } 1756 | | 1757 | | // ensure amountToCollect is always positive 1758 | | assertWithMsg( 1759 | | $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] >= 0, 1760 | | "amountToCollect0 invalid" 1761 | | ); 1762 | | assertWithMsg( 1763 | | $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] >= 0, 1764 | | "amountToCollect1 invalid" 1765 | | ); 1766 | | 1767 | | if ($activeTokenId.isLong($activeLegIndex) == 1) { 1768 | | // ensure that the collected amounts never underflow 1769 | | // as the collected amounts are computed in an unchecked block 1770 | | assertWithMsg( 1771 | | $recievedAmount0[$activeLegIndex] >= 1772 | | uint128(int128($amountBurned0[$activeLegIndex])), 1773 | | "collected 0 underflow" 1774 | | ); 1775 | | assertWithMsg( 1776 | | $recievedAmount1[$activeLegIndex] >= 1777 | | uint128(int128($amountBurned1[$activeLegIndex])), 1778 | | "collected 1 underflow" 1779 | | ); 1780 | | 1781 | | $collected0[$activeLegIndex] = 1782 | | $recievedAmount0[$activeLegIndex] - 1783 | | uint128(int128($amountBurned0[$activeLegIndex])); 1784 | | $collected1[$activeLegIndex] = 1785 | | $recievedAmount1[$activeLegIndex] - 1786 | | uint128(int128($amountBurned1[$activeLegIndex])); 1787 | | 1788 | | emit LogInt256("amountBurned0", $amountBurned0[$activeLegIndex]); 1789 | | emit LogInt256("amountBurned1", $amountBurned1[$activeLegIndex]); 1790 | | } else { 1791 | | $collected0[$activeLegIndex] = $recievedAmount0[$activeLegIndex]; 1792 | | $collected1[$activeLegIndex] = $recievedAmount1[$activeLegIndex]; 1793 | | } 1794 | | 1795 | | emit LogInt256("amountToCollect0", $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex]); 1796 | | emit LogInt256("amountToCollect1", $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex]); 1797 | | 1798 | | emit LogUint256("receivedAmount0", $recievedAmount0[$activeLegIndex]); 1799 | | emit LogUint256("receivedAmount1", $recievedAmount1[$activeLegIndex]); 1800 | | 1801 | | emit LogUint256("collected0", $collected0[$activeLegIndex]); 1802 | | emit LogUint256("collected1", $collected1[$activeLegIndex]); 1803 | | 1804 | | emit LogUint256( 1805 | | "collectedByLeg token 0", 1806 | | $sCollectedByLeg[$activeLegIndex].rightSlot() 1807 | | ); 1808 | | emit LogUint256( 1809 | | "collectedByLeg token 1", 1810 | | $sCollectedByLeg[$activeLegIndex].leftSlot() 1811 | | ); 1812 | | 1813 | | assertWithMsg( 1814 | | $collected0[$activeLegIndex] == 1815 | | $sCollectedByLeg[$activeLegIndex].rightSlot(), 1816 | | "invalid collected 0" 1817 | | ); 1818 | | assertWithMsg( 1819 | | $collected1[$activeLegIndex] == 1820 | | $sCollectedByLeg[$activeLegIndex].leftSlot(), 1821 | | "invalid collected 1" 1822 | | ); 1823 | | 1824 | | { 1825 | | // get premium gross 1826 | | ( 1827 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 1828 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 1829 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 1830 | | address(pool), 1831 | | $activeUser, 1832 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 1833 | | $tickLowerActive, 1834 | | $tickUpperActive, 1835 | | type(int24).max, 1836 | | 0 // to query gross 1837 | | ); 1838 | | 1839 | | // get premium owed 1840 | | ( 1841 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 1842 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 1843 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 1844 | | address(pool), 1845 | | $activeUser, 1846 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 1847 | | $tickLowerActive, 1848 | | $tickUpperActive, 1849 | | type(int24).max, 1850 | | 1 // to query owed 1851 | | ); 1852 | | 1853 | | // gross 1854 | | emit LogUint256( 1855 | | "$accountPremiumGrossAfter0", 1856 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex] 1857 | | ); 1858 | | emit LogUint256( 1859 | | "$accountPremiumGrossAfter1", 1860 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 1861 | | ); 1862 | | // owed 1863 | | emit LogUint256( 1864 | | "$accountPremiumOwedAfter0", 1865 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex] 1866 | | ); 1867 | | emit LogUint256( 1868 | | "$accountPremiumOwedAfter1", 1869 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 1870 | | ); 1871 | | 1872 | | if ( 1873 | | $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] != 0 || 1874 | | $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] != 0 1875 | | ) { 1876 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumOwed; 1877 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumGross; 1878 | | 1879 | | /// assert premia values before and after 1880 | | // add previous s_accountPremiumOwed by new amounts (if previously uint128 max ensure it doesn't overflow) 1881 | | try 1882 | | this.getPremiaDeltasChecked( 1883 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], 1884 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], 1885 | | $collected0[$activeLegIndex], 1886 | | $collected1[$activeLegIndex] 1887 | | ) 1888 | | returns ( 1889 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumOwedR, 1890 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumGrossR 1891 | | ) { 1892 | | // pass 1893 | | deltaPremiumOwed = deltaPremiumOwedR; 1894 | | deltaPremiumGross = deltaPremiumGrossR; 1895 | | } catch { 1896 | | assertWithMsg(false, "fail in premia calc"); 1897 | | } 1898 | | 1899 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumOwed 0", deltaPremiumOwed.rightSlot()); 1900 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumOwed 1", deltaPremiumOwed.leftSlot()); 1901 | | // 1902 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumGross 0", deltaPremiumGross.rightSlot()); 1903 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumGross 1", deltaPremiumGross.leftSlot()); 1904 | | 1905 | | // ensure getAccountPremium up to the current touch(max tick) vals match 1906 | | // against the externally computed premia values 1907 | | ( 1908 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated0[$activeLegIndex], 1909 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated1[$activeLegIndex], 1910 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated0[$activeLegIndex], 1911 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] 1912 | | ) = incrementPremiaAccumulator( 1913 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 1914 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex], 1915 | | // 1916 | | deltaPremiumGross.rightSlot(), 1917 | | deltaPremiumGross.leftSlot(), 1918 | | // 1919 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 1920 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex], 1921 | | // 1922 | | deltaPremiumOwed.rightSlot(), 1923 | | deltaPremiumOwed.leftSlot() 1924 | | ); 1925 | | 1926 | | emit LogUint256( 1927 | | "$accountPremiumGrossCalculated0", 1928 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] 1929 | | ); 1930 | | emit LogUint256( 1931 | | "$accountPremiumGrossCalculated1", 1932 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] 1933 | | ); 1934 | | // 1935 | | emit LogUint256( 1936 | | "$accountPremiumOwedCalculated0", 1937 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] 1938 | | ); 1939 | | emit LogUint256( 1940 | | "$accountPremiumOwedCalculated1", 1941 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] 1942 | | ); 1943 | | 1944 | | // check calculated gross matches up with stored 1945 | | assertWithMsg( 1946 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] == 1947 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 1948 | | "invalid gross 0" 1949 | | ); 1950 | | assertWithMsg( 1951 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] == 1952 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 1953 | | "invalid gross 1" 1954 | | ); 1955 | | 1956 | | // check owed matches up with stored 1957 | | assertWithMsg( 1958 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] == 1959 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 1960 | | "invalid owed 0" 1961 | | ); 1962 | | assertWithMsg( 1963 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] == 1964 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 1965 | | "invalid owed 1" 1966 | | ); 1967 | | } else { 1968 | | // gross checks 1969 | | assertWithMsg( 1970 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex] == 1971 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 1972 | | "invalid gross 0 -> no collect" 1973 | | ); 1974 | | assertWithMsg( 1975 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex] == 1976 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 1977 | | "invalid gross 1 -> no collect" 1978 | | ); 1979 | | 1980 | | // owed checks 1981 | | assertWithMsg( 1982 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex] == 1983 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 1984 | | "invalid owed 0 -> no collect" 1985 | | ); 1986 | | assertWithMsg( 1987 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex] == 1988 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 1989 | | "invalid owed 1 -> no collect" 1990 | | ); 1991 | | } 1992 | | } 1993 | | } 1994 | | } 1995 | | 1996 | | // check the balance of their ERC1155 id increased by position size 1997 | | { 1998 | | // adjust balances and verify 1999 | | _increment_tokenBalance(positionSize); 2000 | | _check_tokenBalance(); 2001 | | } 2002 | | 2003 | | // add minted option to mapping of minted SFPM positions (to grab for burn) 2004 | | userPositionsSFPMix[msg.sender].push($activeTokenId); 2005 | | 2006 | | // reset the activeTokenId for next iteration 2007 | | $activeTokenId = TokenId.wrap(uint256(0)); 2008 | | } catch Error(string memory reason) { 2009 | | emit LogString(reason); 2010 | | 2011 | | emit LogBool("should revert ?", $shouldRevertSFPM); 2012 | | 2013 | | assertWithMsg($shouldRevertSFPM, "non-expected revert"); 2014 | | } 2015 | | } 2016 | | 2017 | | // mint SFPM Swap At Mint = true, and ITM = true 2018 | * | function mint_option_SFPM_swapT_ITMT( 2019 | | uint256 minter_index, 2020 | | bool asset, 2021 | | bool is_call, 2022 | | bool is_long, 2023 | | uint24 width, 2024 | | int256 strike, 2025 | | uint128 positionSize 2026 | | ) public { 2027 | * | minter_index = bound(minter_index, 0, 4); 2028 | * | if (actors[minter_index] == msg.sender) { 2029 | * | minter_index = bound(minter_index + 1, 0, 4); 2030 | | } 2031 | | 2032 | * | address minter = actors[minter_index]; 2033 | | 2034 | | // must be 2035 | * | TokenId $activeTokenId = _generate_single_leg_tokenid( 2036 | * | asset, 2037 | * | is_call, 2038 | | false, 2039 | | false, 2040 | | false, 2041 | * | width, 2042 | * | strike 2043 | | ); 2044 | | 2045 | * | int256 totalMoved0; 2046 | | int256 totalMoved1; 2047 | | 2048 | * | int24 tickLimitLow = int24(887272); 2049 | | int24 tickLimitHigh = int24(-887272); 2050 | | 2051 | | { 2052 | | // get moved amounts 2053 | | // moved amounts is faulty function 2054 | | // reverts for some reason 2055 | * | (int256 moved0, int256 moved1) = _calculate_moved_amounts($activeTokenId, positionSize); 2056 | | 2057 | * | emit LogInt256("moved0", moved0); 2058 | * | emit LogInt256("moved1", moved1); 2059 | | 2060 | | // get itm amounts 2061 | * | (int256 itm0, int256 itm1) = _calculate_itm_amounts( 2062 | * | $activeTokenId.tokenType(0), 2063 | | moved0, 2064 | | moved1 2065 | | ); 2066 | | 2067 | * | emit LogInt256("itm0", itm0); 2068 | * | emit LogInt256("itm1", itm1); 2069 | | 2070 | * | (int256 swapAmount, bool zeroForOne) = _compute_swap_amounts(itm0, itm1); 2071 | | 2072 | * | (int256 swap0, int256 swap1, int24 tickAfterSwap) = _execute_swap_simulation( 2073 | * | minter, 2074 | * | zeroForOne, 2075 | * | swapAmount 2076 | | ); 2077 | | 2078 | * | emit LogInt256("swap0", swap0); 2079 | * | emit LogInt256("swap1", swap1); 2080 | | 2081 | | // total moved 2082 | * | totalMoved0 = moved0 + swap0; 2083 | * | totalMoved1 = moved1 + swap1; 2084 | | 2085 | * | emit LogInt256("totalMoved0", totalMoved0); 2086 | * | emit LogInt256("totalMoved1", totalMoved1); 2087 | | } 2088 | | 2089 | | // current balances 2090 | * | int256 balBefore0 = int256(IERC20(USDC).balanceOf(minter)); 2091 | * | int256 balBefore1 = int256(IERC20(WETH).balanceOf(minter)); 2092 | | 2093 | * | emit LogInt256("bal before 0", balBefore0); 2094 | * | emit LogInt256("bal before 1", balBefore1); 2095 | | 2096 | | // then try to purchase an amount larger than this amount (startingLiquidity < chunkLiquidity) 2097 | * | hevm.prank(minter); 2098 | * | try sfpm.mintTokenizedPosition($activeTokenId, positionSize, tickLimitLow, tickLimitHigh) { 2099 | | // check final balances 2100 | | int256 balAfter0 = int256(IERC20(USDC).balanceOf(minter)); 2101 | | int256 balAfter1 = int256(IERC20(WETH).balanceOf(minter)); 2102 | | 2103 | | emit LogInt256("bal after 0", balAfter0); 2104 | | emit LogInt256("bal after 1", balAfter1); 2105 | | 2106 | | assertApproxEqRel( 2107 | | balBefore0 - totalMoved0, 2108 | | balAfter0, 2109 | | 1e21, // 1e+21 -> assert value is within 0.01% 2110 | | "bal 0 delta invalid" 2111 | | ); 2112 | | 2113 | | assertApproxEqRel( 2114 | | balBefore1 - totalMoved1, 2115 | | balAfter1, 2116 | | 1e21, // 1e+21 -> assert value is within 0.01% 2117 | | "bal 1 delta invalid" 2118 | | ); 2119 | | 2120 | | // check the balance of their ERC1155 id increased by position size 2121 | | { 2122 | | // adjust balances and verify 2123 | | _increment_tokenBalance(positionSize); 2124 | | _check_tokenBalance(); 2125 | | } 2126 | | 2127 | | // add minted option to mapping of minted SFPM positions (to grab for burn) 2128 | | userPositionsSFPMShort[minter].push($activeTokenId); 2129 | | } catch {} 2130 | | } 2131 | | 2132 | | // mint SFPM regular mint Swap At Mint = false, and ITM = false 2133 | * | function mint_option_SFPM_swapF_ITMF( 2134 | | uint256 minter_index, 2135 | | bool asset, 2136 | | bool is_call, 2137 | | bool is_long, 2138 | | uint24 width, 2139 | | int256 strike, 2140 | | uint128 positionSize 2141 | * | ) public { 2142 | * | if (actors[minter_index] == msg.sender) { 2143 | | minter_index = bound(minter_index + 1, 0, 4); 2167 | * | int24 tickLimitHigh = int24(887272); 2168 | | 2169 | | { 2170 | | // get moved amounts 2171 | | // moved amounts is faulty function 2172 | | // reverts for some reason 2173 | * | (moved0, moved1) = _calculate_moved_amounts($activeTokenId, positionSize); 2419 | | 2420 | * | emit LogInt256("swapAmount", swapAmount); 2421 | * | emit LogBool("zeroForOne", zeroForOne); 2422 | | 2423 | * | (int256 swap0, int256 swap1, int24 tickAfterSwap) = _execute_swap_simulation( 2424 | * | msg.sender, 2425 | * | zeroForOne, 2426 | * | swapAmount 2427 | | ); 2428 | | 2429 | | emit LogInt256("swap0", swap0); 2430 | | emit LogInt256("swap1", swap1); 2431 | | 2432 | | // total moved 2433 | | totalMoved0 = moved0 + swap0; 2434 | | totalMoved1 = moved1 + swap1; 2435 | | 2436 | | emit LogInt256("totalMoved0", totalMoved0); 2437 | | emit LogInt256("totalMoved1", totalMoved1); 2438 | | } 2439 | | 2440 | | // current balances 2441 | | int256 balBefore0 = int256(IERC20(USDC).balanceOf(msg.sender)); 2442 | | int256 balBefore1 = int256(IERC20(WETH).balanceOf(msg.sender)); 2443 | | 2444 | | emit LogInt256("bal before 0", balBefore0); 2445 | | emit LogInt256("bal before 1", balBefore1); 2446 | | 2447 | | // get price before swap 2448 | | (currentSqrtPriceX96, , , , , , ) = pool.slot0(); 2449 | | 2450 | | hevm.prank(msg.sender); 2451 | * | try sfpm.mintTokenizedPosition($activeTokenId, positionSize, tickLimitHigh, tickLimitLow) { 2452 | | // check final balances 2453 | | int256 balAfter0 = int256(IERC20(USDC).balanceOf(msg.sender)); 2454 | | int256 balAfter1 = int256(IERC20(WETH).balanceOf(msg.sender)); 2455 | | 2456 | | emit LogInt256("bal after 0", balAfter0); 2457 | | emit LogInt256("bal after 1", balAfter1); 2458 | | 2459 | * | assertApproxEqRel( 2460 | * | balBefore0 - totalMoved0, 2461 | * | balAfter0, 2462 | * | 1e21, // 1e+21 -> assert value is within 0.01% 2463 | | "bal 0 delta invalid" 2464 | | ); 2465 | | 2466 | * | assertApproxEqRel( 2467 | * | balBefore1 - totalMoved1, 2468 | * | balAfter1, 2469 | * | 1e21, // 1e+21 -> assert value is within 0.01% 2470 | | "bal 1 delta invalid" 2471 | | ); 2472 | | 2473 | | int256 convertedMoved1to0 = PanopticMath.convert1to0(totalMoved1, currentSqrtPriceX96); 2474 | | emit LogInt256("value of total moved 1 to 0", convertedMoved1to0); 2475 | | 2476 | | // disabled as on low liq pools the swap won't occur at a single price (tick liquidity will roll over) 2477 | | // ensure that only token 0 was moved as this was a netting swap 2478 | | // assertWithMsg(totalMoved0 == convertedMoved1to0, "invalid conversion"); 2479 | | 2480 | | // check the balance of their ERC1155 id increased by position size 2481 | | { 2482 | | // adjust balances and verify 2483 | | _increment_tokenBalance(positionSize); 2484 | | _check_tokenBalance(); 2485 | | } 2486 | | 2487 | | // add minted option to mapping of minted SFPM positions (to grab for burn) 2488 | | userPositionsSFPMShort[msg.sender].push($activeTokenId); 2489 | | } catch {} 2490 | | } 2491 | | 2492 | | // mint SFPM position size = 0 2493 | * | function invariant_mint_option_SFPM_posSize0( 2494 | | uint256 minter_index, 2495 | | bool asset, 2496 | | bool is_call, 2497 | | bool is_long, 2498 | | bool is_otm, 2499 | | bool is_atm, 2500 | | bool swapAtMint, 2501 | | uint24 width, 2502 | | int256 strike 2503 | * | ) public { 2504 | * | minter_index = bound(minter_index, 0, 4); 2505 | * | if (actors[minter_index] == msg.sender) { 2506 | * | minter_index = bound(minter_index + 1, 0, 4); 2507 | | } 2508 | | 2509 | * | address minter = actors[minter_index]; 2510 | | 2511 | | // pos size 0 2512 | | uint128 positionSize = 0; 2513 | * | TokenId tokenId = _generate_single_leg_tokenid( 2514 | * | asset, 2515 | * | is_call, 2516 | | false, 2517 | * | is_otm, 2518 | * | is_atm, 2519 | * | width, 2520 | * | strike 2521 | | ); 2522 | | 2523 | * | int24 tickLimitLow = swapAtMint ? int24(887272) : int24(-887272); 2524 | * | int24 tickLimitHigh = swapAtMint ? int24(-887272) : int24(887272); 2525 | | 2526 | | // if positionSize == 0 then should fail 2527 | * | if (positionSize == 0) { 2528 | * | hevm.prank(minter); 2529 | * | try sfpm.mintTokenizedPosition(tokenId, positionSize, tickLimitLow, tickLimitHigh) { 2530 | * | assertWithMsg(false, "can't mint option with position size of 0"); 2531 | | } catch {} 2532 | | } 2533 | | } 2534 | | 2535 | | // token composition is over 127 bits on either side should fail 2536 | * | function invariant_mint_option_SFPM_PositionTooLarge( 2537 | | uint256 minter_index, 2538 | | bool asset, 2539 | | bool is_call, 2540 | | bool is_long, 2541 | | bool is_otm, 2542 | | bool is_atm, 2543 | | bool swapAtMint, 2544 | | uint24 width, 2545 | | int256 strike, 2546 | | uint128 positionSize 2547 | | ) public { 2548 | * | minter_index = bound(minter_index, 0, 4); 2549 | * | if (actors[minter_index] == msg.sender) { 2550 | * | minter_index = bound(minter_index + 1, 0, 4); 2551 | | } 2552 | | 2553 | * | address minter = actors[minter_index]; 2554 | | 2555 | * | TokenId tokenId = _generate_single_leg_tokenid( 2556 | * | asset, 2557 | * | is_call, 2558 | | false, 2559 | * | is_otm, 2560 | * | is_atm, 2561 | * | width, 2562 | * | strike 2563 | | ); 2564 | | 2565 | * | int24 tickLimitLow = swapAtMint ? int24(887272) : int24(-887272); 2566 | * | int24 tickLimitHigh = swapAtMint ? int24(-887272) : int24(887272); 2567 | | 2568 | | // current balances 2569 | * | uint256 balBefore0 = IERC20(USDC).balanceOf(minter); 2570 | * | uint256 balBefore1 = IERC20(WETH).balanceOf(minter); 2571 | | 2572 | * | hevm.prank(minter); 2573 | * | try sfpm.mintTokenizedPosition(tokenId, positionSize, tickLimitLow, tickLimitHigh) { 2574 | | // if amount moved is greater than 2 ** 127 bits 2575 | | // bal before - bal after > 2 ** 127 - 4 2576 | | 2577 | | // check final balances 2578 | * | uint256 balAfter0 = IERC20(USDC).balanceOf(minter); 2579 | * | uint256 balAfter1 = IERC20(WETH).balanceOf(minter); 2580 | | 2581 | * | uint256 balDelta0 = balBefore0 - balAfter0; 2582 | * | uint256 balDelta1 = balBefore1 - balAfter1; 2583 | | 2584 | | //-- 2585 | * | emit LogUint256("balBefore0", balBefore0); 2586 | * | emit LogUint256("balBefore1", balBefore1); 2587 | | // 2588 | * | emit LogUint256("balAfter0", balAfter0); 2589 | * | emit LogUint256("balAfter1", balAfter1); 2590 | | // 2591 | * | emit LogUint256("balDelta0", balDelta0); 2592 | * | emit LogUint256("balDelta1", balDelta1); 2593 | | // 2594 | * | emit LogUint256("max", uint128(type(int128).max - 4)); 2595 | | 2596 | * | assertWithMsg( 2597 | * | !(balDelta0 > uint128(type(int128).max - 4) || 2598 | * | balDelta1 > uint128(type(int128).max - 4)), 2599 | | "can't mint a position which exceeds the token limits of 127 bits" 2600 | | ); 2601 | | } catch {} 2602 | | } 2603 | | 2604 | | // attempt to purchase more liquidity than exists at the chunk 2605 | * | function invariant_mint_option_SFPM_NotEnoughLiquidity( 2606 | | uint256 minter_index, 2607 | | bool asset, 2608 | | bool is_call, 2609 | | bool is_long, 2610 | | bool is_otm, 2611 | | bool is_atm, 2612 | | bool swapAtMint, 2613 | | uint24 width, 2614 | | int256 strike, 2615 | | uint128 positionSize, 2616 | | uint128 sizeIncrement 2617 | * | ) public { 2618 | * | minter_index = bound(minter_index, 0, 4); 2619 | * | if (actors[minter_index] == msg.sender) { 2620 | * | minter_index = bound(minter_index + 1, 0, 4); 2621 | | } 2622 | | 2623 | * | $activeUser = actors[minter_index]; 2624 | | 2625 | * | TokenId $activeTokenId = _generate_single_leg_tokenid( 2626 | * | asset, 2627 | * | is_call, 2628 | | false, 2629 | * | is_otm, 2630 | * | is_atm, 2631 | * | width, 2632 | * | strike 2633 | | ); 2634 | * | TokenId tokenIdLong = _generate_single_leg_tokenid( 2635 | * | asset, 2636 | * | is_call, 2637 | * | true, 2638 | * | is_otm, 2639 | * | is_atm, 2640 | * | width, 2641 | * | strike 2642 | | ); 2643 | | 2644 | * | int24 tickLimitLow = swapAtMint ? int24(887272) : int24(-887272); 2645 | * | int24 tickLimitHigh = swapAtMint ? int24(-887272) : int24(887272); 2646 | | 2647 | * | (int24 tickLower, int24 tickUpper) = $activeTokenId.asTicks(0); 2648 | | 2649 | | // check there is no pre-existing liquidity at this chunk deployed by the minter 2650 | * | LeftRightUnsigned accountLiquidities = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 2651 | * | address(pool), 2652 | * | $activeUser, 2653 | * | $activeTokenId.tokenType(0), 2654 | * | tickLower, 2655 | * | tickUpper 2656 | | ); 2657 | | 2658 | | // 2659 | * | if (accountLiquidities.rightSlot() != 0) { 2660 | | // mint a small amount of liquidity at this chunk 2661 | | sfpm.mintTokenizedPosition($activeTokenId, positionSize, tickLimitLow, tickLimitHigh); 2662 | | } 2663 | | 2664 | | // invoke actions as the chosen minter 2665 | * | hevm.prank($activeUser); 2666 | | // then try to purchase an amount larger than this amount (startingLiquidity < chunkLiquidity) 2667 | * | try 2668 | * | sfpm.mintTokenizedPosition( 2669 | * | tokenIdLong, 2670 | * | positionSize + sizeIncrement, 2671 | * | tickLimitLow, 2672 | * | tickLimitHigh 2673 | | ) 2674 | * | { 2675 | | uint256 shortLiq = PanopticMath 2676 | | .getLiquidityChunk($activeTokenId, 0, positionSize) 2677 | | .liquidity(); 2678 | | uint256 longLiq = PanopticMath 2679 | | .getLiquidityChunk(tokenIdLong, 0, positionSize + sizeIncrement) 2680 | | .liquidity(); 2681 | | 2682 | | emit LogUint256("shortLiq", shortLiq); 2683 | | emit LogUint256("longLiq", longLiq); 2684 | | 2685 | | // continue because the position size generated is of the same size 2686 | | if (shortLiq == longLiq) { 2687 | | revert(); 2688 | | } 2689 | | 2690 | * | assertWithMsg(false, "Can't purchase more chunk liquidity than is available!"); 2691 | | } catch {} 2692 | | } 2693 | | 2694 | | // can't mint a position that defies the slippage bounds 2695 | * | function invariant_mint_option_SFPM_PriceBoundFail( 2696 | | bool asset, 2697 | | bool is_call, 2698 | | bool is_long, 2699 | | bool is_otm, 2700 | | bool is_atm, 2701 | | bool swapAtMint, 2702 | | uint24 width, 2703 | | int256 strike, 2704 | | uint128 positionSize, 2705 | | bool slippageDirection, 2706 | | int24 randTick 2707 | * | ) public { 2708 | * | TokenId $activeTokenId = _generate_single_leg_tokenid( 2709 | * | asset, 2710 | * | is_call, 2711 | * | false, 2712 | * | is_otm, 2713 | * | is_atm, 2714 | * | width, 2715 | * | strike 2716 | | ); 2717 | | 2718 | | // get moved amounts 2719 | | // moved amounts is faulty function 2720 | | // reverts for some reason 2721 | * | (int256 moved0, int256 moved1) = _calculate_moved_amounts($activeTokenId, positionSize); 2722 | | 2723 | | // get itm amounts 2724 | * | (int256 itm0, int256 itm1) = _calculate_itm_amounts( 2725 | * | $activeTokenId.tokenType(0), 2726 | * | moved0, 2727 | * | moved1 2728 | | ); 2729 | | 2730 | * | (int256 swapAmount, bool zeroForOne) = _compute_swap_amounts(itm0, itm1); 2731 | | 2732 | * | (, , /*int256 swap0*/ /*int256 swap1*/ int24 tickAfterSwap) = _execute_swap_simulation( 2733 | * | msg.sender, 2734 | * | zeroForOne, 2735 | * | swapAmount 2736 | | ); 2737 | | 2738 | * | int24 tickLimitLow; 2739 | * | int24 tickLimitHigh; 2740 | | 2741 | | // get the currentTick after this position would have been minted via sim and 2742 | * | if (slippageDirection) { 2743 | | // set invalid tickLow 2744 | | // sets to a lower tickLimitLow 2745 | * | tickLimitLow = randTick % tickAfterSwap; 2746 | | 2747 | | // set valid tickHigh 2748 | * | tickLimitHigh = int24(887272); 2749 | | } else { 2750 | | // set valid tickLow 2751 | * | tickLimitLow = int24(-887272); 2752 | | 2753 | | // set invalid tickHigh 2754 | * | tickLimitHigh = tickAfterSwap + int24(Math.abs(randTick)); 2755 | | } 2756 | | 2757 | | // flip ticks for swap at mint signal 2758 | * | if (swapAtMint) { 2759 | * | (tickLimitLow, tickLimitHigh) = (tickLimitHigh, tickLimitLow); 2760 | | } 2761 | | 2762 | | // then try to purchase an amount larger than this amount (startingLiquidity < chunkLiquidity) 2763 | * | try sfpm.mintTokenizedPosition($activeTokenId, positionSize, tickLimitLow, tickLimitHigh) { 2764 | * | assertWithMsg(false, "Can't mint an option which defies the slippage bounds"); 2765 | | } catch {} 2766 | | } 2767 | | 2768 | | /// burn 2769 | | 2770 | * | function burn_option_SFPM_general( 2771 | | uint256 numLegs, 2772 | | uint128 positionSize, 2773 | | bool swapAtMint, 2774 | | bool isLong, 2775 | | bool isMix, 2776 | | uint256 randSeed 2777 | * | ) public { 2778 | * | $shouldRevertSFPM = false; 2779 | | 2780 | | // store the current actor 2781 | * | $activeUser = msg.sender; 2782 | | 2783 | | // grab a random tokenId owned by the current interactor *** 2784 | * | if (isMix && userPositionsSFPMix[$activeUser].length != 0) { 2785 | | // burn mix 2786 | | uint256 randIndex = bound(randSeed, 0, userPositionsSFPMix[$activeUser].length - 1); 2787 | | $activeTokenId = userPositionsSFPMix[$activeUser][randIndex]; 2788 | | 2789 | | // delete from owner 2790 | | userPositionsSFPMix[$activeUser][randIndex] = TokenId.wrap(0); 2791 | * | } else if (isLong && userPositionsSFPMLong[$activeUser].length != 0) { 2792 | | // burn a long 2793 | | uint256 randIndex = bound(randSeed, 0, userPositionsSFPMLong[$activeUser].length - 1); 2794 | | $activeTokenId = userPositionsSFPMLong[$activeUser][randIndex]; 2795 | | 2796 | | // delete from owner 2797 | | userPositionsSFPMLong[$activeUser][randIndex] = TokenId.wrap(0); 2798 | | } else { 2799 | * | if (userPositionsSFPMShort[$activeUser].length == 0) { 2800 | *r | revert(); 2801 | | } 2802 | | 2803 | | // burn a short 2804 | | uint256 randIndex = bound(randSeed, 0, userPositionsSFPMShort[$activeUser].length - 1); 2805 | | $activeTokenId = userPositionsSFPMShort[$activeUser][randIndex]; 2806 | | 2807 | | // delete from owner 2808 | | userPositionsSFPMShort[$activeUser][randIndex] = TokenId.wrap(0); 2809 | | } 2810 | | 2811 | | // pre-mint calculations/actions for storage 2812 | | for (uint i = $activeNumLegs; i > 0; i--) { 2813 | | $activeLegIndex = i; 2814 | | 2815 | | emit LogUint256("active leg index: ", $activeLegIndex); 2816 | | 2817 | | { 2818 | | // get the amount of liquidity being deposited 2819 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex] = PanopticMath.getLiquidityChunk( 2820 | | $activeTokenId, 2821 | | $activeLegIndex, 2822 | | positionSize 2823 | | ); 2824 | | 2825 | | $sTickLower[$activeLegIndex] = $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(); 2826 | | $sTickUpper[$activeLegIndex] = $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper(); 2827 | | $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] = $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].liquidity(); 2828 | | 2829 | | // *** if liquidity amounts is zero then execution should revert *** 2830 | | { 2831 | | if ($sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] == 0) $shouldRevertSFPM = true; 2832 | | } 2833 | | 2834 | | // store the active position details 2835 | | { 2836 | | $tickLowerActive = $sTickLower[$activeLegIndex]; 2837 | | $tickUpperActive = $sTickUpper[$activeLegIndex]; 2838 | | $LiqAmountActive = $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex]; 2839 | | } 2840 | | 2841 | | // emit positional bounds and liquidity 2842 | | emit LogInt256("tick lower", $tickLowerActive); 2843 | | emit LogInt256("tick upper", $tickUpperActive); 2844 | | emit LogUint256("liquidity amounts", $LiqAmountActive); 2845 | | } 2846 | | 2847 | | // poke if there is pre-existing liq for the user at the positional bounds 2848 | | { 2849 | | hevm.prank(address(sfpm)); 2850 | | try pool.burn($tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive, 0) {} catch {} 2851 | | } 2852 | | 2853 | | { 2854 | | // get the amount of liquidity within that range present in uniswap already 2855 | | $positionKey[$activeLegIndex] = keccak256( 2856 | | abi.encodePacked(address(sfpm), $tickLowerActive, $tickUpperActive) 2857 | | ); 2858 | | (uniLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], , , , ) = pool.positions( 2859 | | $positionKey[$activeLegIndex] 2860 | | ); 2861 | | 2862 | | // get SFPM stored account liquidity before 2863 | | LeftRightUnsigned accountLiquiditiesBefore = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 2864 | | address(pool), 2865 | | $activeUser, 2866 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 2867 | | $tickLowerActive, 2868 | | $tickUpperActive 2869 | | ); 2870 | | 2871 | | // store the removed and net liquidity for the chunk 2872 | | // before mint 2873 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesBefore.leftSlot(); 2874 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex] = accountLiquiditiesBefore.rightSlot(); 2875 | | } 2876 | | 2877 | | { 2878 | | // s_accountFeesBase before 2879 | | // check s_accountFeesBase is updated correctly 2880 | | ($oldFeesBase0[$activeLegIndex], $oldFeesBase1[$activeLegIndex]) = sfpm 2881 | | .getAccountFeesBase( 2882 | | address(pool), 2883 | | $activeUser, 2884 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 2885 | | $tickLowerActive, 2886 | | $tickUpperActive 2887 | | ); 2972 | | 2973 | | // get gross premium 2974 | | emit LogUint256( 2975 | | "$accountPremiumGrossBefore0", 2976 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex] 2977 | | ); 2978 | | emit LogUint256( 2979 | | "$accountPremiumGrossBefore1", 2980 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 2981 | | ); 2996 | | 2997 | | // get owed premium 2998 | | emit LogUint256( 2999 | | "$accountPremiumOwedBefore0", 3000 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex] 3001 | | ); 3002 | | emit LogUint256( 3003 | | "$accountPremiumOwedBefore1", 3004 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 3005 | | ); 3057 | | // } 3058 | | 3059 | | // check the net liquidity added 3060 | | { 3061 | | LeftRightUnsigned accountLiquiditiesAfter = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 3062 | | address(pool), 3063 | | $activeUser, 3064 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 3065 | | $tickLowerActive, 3066 | | $tickUpperActive 3067 | | ); 3099 | | } else { 3100 | | // check the liquidity tracked is the same as the liquidity computed 3101 | | assertWithMsg( 3102 | | $netLiquidityAfter[$activeLegIndex] == 3103 | * | $sLiqAmounts[$activeLegIndex] + 3104 | * | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], 3105 | | "invalid net liquidity" 3106 | | ); 3266 | | 3267 | | { 3268 | | // get premium gross 3269 | | ( 3270 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 3271 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 3272 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountPremium( 3273 | | address(pool), 3274 | | $activeUser, 3275 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 3276 | | $tickLowerActive, 3277 | | $tickUpperActive, 3278 | | type(int24).max, 3279 | | 0 // to query gross 3280 | | ); 3295 | | 3296 | | // gross 3297 | | emit LogUint256( 3298 | | "$accountPremiumGrossAfter0", 3299 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex] 3300 | | ); 3301 | | emit LogUint256( 3302 | | "$accountPremiumGrossAfter1", 3303 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 3304 | | ); 3305 | | // owed 3306 | | emit LogUint256( 3307 | | "$accountPremiumOwedAfter0", 3308 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex] 3309 | | ); 3310 | | emit LogUint256( 3311 | | "$accountPremiumOwedAfter1", 3312 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 3313 | | ); 3314 | | 3315 | | if ( 3316 | | $amountToCollect0[$activeLegIndex] != 0 || 3317 | | $amountToCollect1[$activeLegIndex] != 0 3318 | | ) { 3319 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumOwed; 3320 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumGross; 3321 | | 3322 | | /// assert premia values before and after 3323 | | // add previous s_accountPremiumOwed by new amounts (if previously uint128 max ensure it doesn't overflow) 3324 | | try 3325 | | this.getPremiaDeltasChecked( 3326 | | $netLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], 3327 | | $removedLiquidityBefore[$activeLegIndex], 3328 | | $collected0[$activeLegIndex], 3329 | | $collected1[$activeLegIndex] 3330 | | ) 3331 | | returns ( 3332 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumOwedR, 3333 | | LeftRightUnsigned deltaPremiumGrossR 3334 | | ) { 3335 | | // pass 3336 | | deltaPremiumOwed = deltaPremiumOwedR; 3337 | | deltaPremiumGross = deltaPremiumGrossR; 3338 | | } catch { 3339 | | assertWithMsg(false, "fail in premia calc"); 3340 | | } 3341 | | 3342 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumOwed 0", deltaPremiumOwed.rightSlot()); 3343 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumOwed 1", deltaPremiumOwed.leftSlot()); 3344 | | // 3345 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumGross 0", deltaPremiumGross.rightSlot()); 3346 | | emit LogUint256("deltaPremiumGross 1", deltaPremiumGross.leftSlot()); 3347 | | 3348 | | // ensure getAccountPremium up to the current touch(max tick) vals match 3349 | | // against the externally computed premia values 3350 | | ( 3351 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated0[$activeLegIndex], 3352 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated1[$activeLegIndex], 3353 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated0[$activeLegIndex], 3354 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] 3355 | | ) = incrementPremiaAccumulator( 3356 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 3357 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex], 3358 | | // 3359 | | deltaPremiumGross.rightSlot(), 3360 | | deltaPremiumGross.leftSlot(), 3361 | | // 3362 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 3363 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex], 3364 | | // 3365 | | deltaPremiumOwed.rightSlot(), 3366 | | deltaPremiumOwed.leftSlot() 3367 | | ); 3368 | | 3369 | | emit LogUint256( 3370 | | "$accountPremiumGrossCalculated0", 3371 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] 3372 | | ); 3373 | | emit LogUint256( 3374 | | "$accountPremiumGrossCalculated1", 3375 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] 3376 | | ); 3377 | | // 3378 | | emit LogUint256( 3379 | | "$accountPremiumOwedCalculated0", 3380 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] 3381 | | ); 3382 | | emit LogUint256( 3383 | | "$accountPremiumOwedCalculated1", 3384 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] 3385 | | ); 3386 | | 3387 | | // check calculated gross matches up with stored 3388 | | assertWithMsg( 3389 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] == 3390 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 3391 | | "invalid gross 0" 3392 | | ); 3393 | | assertWithMsg( 3394 | | $accountPremiumGrossCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] == 3395 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 3396 | | "invalid gross 1" 3397 | | ); 3398 | | 3399 | | // check owed matches up with stored 3400 | | assertWithMsg( 3401 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated0[$activeLegIndex] == 3402 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 3403 | | "invalid owed 0" 3404 | | ); 3405 | | assertWithMsg( 3406 | | $accountPremiumOwedCalculated1[$activeLegIndex] == 3407 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 3408 | | "invalid owed 1" 3409 | | ); 3410 | | } else { 3411 | | // gross checks 3412 | | assertWithMsg( 3413 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore0[$activeLegIndex] == 3414 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 3415 | | "invalid gross 0 -> no collect" 3416 | | ); 3417 | | assertWithMsg( 3418 | | $accountPremiumGrossBefore1[$activeLegIndex] == 3419 | | $accountPremiumGrossAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 3420 | | "invalid gross 1 -> no collect" 3421 | | ); 3422 | | 3423 | | // owed checks 3424 | | assertWithMsg( 3425 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore0[$activeLegIndex] == 3426 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 3427 | | "invalid owed 0 -> no collect" 3428 | | ); 3429 | | assertWithMsg( 3430 | | $accountPremiumOwedBefore1[$activeLegIndex] == 3431 | | $accountPremiumOwedAfter1[$activeLegIndex], 3432 | | "invalid owed 1 -> no collect" 3433 | | ); 3434 | | } 3435 | | } 3436 | | } 3437 | | 3438 | | { 3439 | | // adjust balances and verify 3440 | | _decrement_tokenBalance(positionSize); 3441 | | _check_tokenBalance(); 3442 | | } 3443 | | } 3444 | | 3445 | | // add minted option to mapping of minted SFPM positions (to grab for burn) 3446 | | userPositionsSFPMix[msg.sender].push($activeTokenId); 3447 | | 3448 | | // reset the activeTokenId for next iteration 3449 | | $activeTokenId = TokenId.wrap(uint256(0)); 3450 | | } catch Error(string memory reason) { 3451 | | emit LogString(reason); 3452 | | 3453 | | emit LogBool("should revert ?", $shouldRevertSFPM); 3454 | | 3455 | | assertWithMsg($shouldRevertSFPM, "non-expected revert"); 3456 | | } 3457 | | } 3458 | | 3459 | | // transfer 3460 | | 3461 | | function transfer_tokenId( 3462 | | uint256 positionSize, 3463 | | address randUser, 3464 | | bool transferToPP, // transfer to panoptic pool flag 3465 | | bool isLong, 3466 | | bool isMix, 3467 | | uint256 randSeed, 3468 | | bytes calldata data 3469 | | ) public { 3470 | | $shouldRevertSFPM = false; 3471 | | 3472 | | $activeUser = msg.sender; 3473 | | 3474 | | if (transferToPP) { 3475 | | randUser = address(panopticPool); 3476 | | } 3477 | | 3478 | | // grab a random tokenId owned by the current interactor *** 3479 | | if (isMix && userPositionsSFPMix[$activeUser].length != 0) { 3480 | | // burn mix 3481 | | uint256 randIndex = bound(randSeed, 0, userPositionsSFPMix[$activeUser].length - 1); 3482 | | $activeTokenId = userPositionsSFPMix[$activeUser][randIndex]; 3483 | | 3484 | | // delete from owner and give to recipient 3485 | | userPositionsSFPMix[$activeUser][randIndex] = TokenId.wrap(0); 3486 | | userPositionsSFPMix[randUser].push($activeTokenId); 3487 | | } else if (isLong && userPositionsSFPMLong[$activeUser].length != 0) { 3488 | | // burn a long 3489 | | uint256 randIndex = bound(randSeed, 0, userPositionsSFPMLong[$activeUser].length - 1); 3490 | | $activeTokenId = userPositionsSFPMLong[$activeUser][randIndex]; 3491 | | 3492 | | // delete from owner and give to recipient 3493 | | userPositionsSFPMLong[$activeUser][randIndex] = TokenId.wrap(0); 3494 | | userPositionsSFPMLong[randUser].push($activeTokenId); 3495 | | } else { 3496 | | if (userPositionsSFPMShort[$activeUser].length == 0) { 3497 | | revert(); 3498 | | } 3499 | | 3500 | | // burn a short 3501 | | uint256 randIndex = bound(randSeed, 0, userPositionsSFPMShort[$activeUser].length - 1); 3502 | | $activeTokenId = userPositionsSFPMShort[$activeUser][randIndex]; 3503 | | 3504 | | // delete from owner and give to recipient 3505 | | userPositionsSFPMShort[$activeUser][randIndex] = TokenId.wrap(0); 3506 | | userPositionsSFPMShort[randUser].push($activeTokenId); 3507 | | } 3508 | | 3509 | | // check internal balance of that tokenId 3510 | | tokenBalanceSenderBefore = sfpm.balanceOf($activeUser, TokenId.unwrap($activeTokenId)); 3511 | | tokenBalanceRecipientBefore = sfpm.balanceOf(randUser, TokenId.unwrap($activeTokenId)); 3512 | | 3513 | | $activeNumLegs = $activeTokenId.countLegs(); 3514 | | for (uint256 i = 0; i < $activeNumLegs; i++) { 3515 | | $activeLegIndex = i; 3516 | | 3517 | | // the chunk being transferred 3518 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex] = PanopticMath.getLiquidityChunk( 3519 | | $activeTokenId, 3520 | | $activeLegIndex, 3521 | | uint128(positionSize) 3522 | | ); 3523 | | 3524 | | { 3525 | | // construct the positionKey for the from and to addresses 3526 | | positionKey_from[$activeLegIndex] = keccak256( 3527 | | abi.encodePacked( 3528 | | address(pool), 3529 | | $activeUser, 3530 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 3531 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(), 3532 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper() 3533 | | ) 3534 | | ); 3535 | | positionKey_to[$activeLegIndex] = keccak256( 3536 | | abi.encodePacked( 3537 | | address(pool), 3538 | | randUser, 3539 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 3540 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(), 3541 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper() 3542 | | ) 3543 | | ); 3544 | | } 3545 | | 3546 | | { 3547 | | // store feesbase before sender 3548 | | ( 3549 | | $senderFeesBaseBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 3550 | | $senderFeesBaseBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 3551 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountFeesBase( 3552 | | address(pool), 3553 | | $activeUser, 3554 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 3555 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(), 3556 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper() 3557 | | ); 3558 | | 3559 | | // store feesbase before receiver (should be 0) 3560 | | ( 3561 | | $recipientFeesBaseBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 3562 | | $recipientFeesBaseBefore1[$activeLegIndex] 3563 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountFeesBase( 3564 | | address(pool), 3565 | | randUser, 3566 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 3567 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(), 3568 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper() 3569 | | ); 3570 | | } 3571 | | 3572 | | { 3573 | | // store account liquidity before sender (should not be 0 ~) 3574 | | accountLiquiditiesSenderBefore[$activeLegIndex] = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 3575 | | address(pool), 3576 | | $activeUser, 3577 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 3578 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(), 3579 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper() 3580 | | ); 3581 | | 3582 | | // store account liquidity before recipient (should be 0 ~) 3583 | | accountLiquiditiesRecipientBefore[$activeLegIndex] = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 3584 | | address(pool), 3585 | | randUser, 3586 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 3587 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(), 3588 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper() 3589 | | ); 3590 | | } 3591 | | 3592 | | // if not sending the entre liq amount or transferring long 3593 | | if ( 3594 | | ($liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].liquidity() != 3595 | | LeftRightUnsigned.unwrap(accountLiquiditiesSenderBefore[$activeLegIndex])) || 3596 | | (LeftRightUnsigned.unwrap(accountLiquiditiesRecipientBefore[$activeLegIndex]) != 0) 3597 | | ) { 3598 | | $shouldRevertSFPM = true; 3599 | | } 3600 | | } 3601 | | 3602 | | try 3603 | | sfpm.safeTransferFrom( 3604 | | $activeUser, 3605 | | randUser, 3606 | | TokenId.unwrap($activeTokenId), 3607 | | positionSize, 3608 | | data 3609 | | ) 3610 | | { 3611 | | for (uint256 i = 0; i < $activeNumLegs; i++) { 3612 | | $activeLegIndex = i; 3613 | | 3614 | | { 3615 | | // store feesbase before sender 3616 | | ( 3617 | | $senderFeesBaseAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 3618 | | $senderFeesBaseAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 3619 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountFeesBase( 3620 | | address(pool), 3621 | | $activeUser, 3622 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 3623 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(), 3624 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper() 3625 | | ); 3626 | | 3627 | | // store feesbase before receiver (should be 0) 3628 | | ( 3629 | | $recipientFeesBaseAfter0[$activeLegIndex], 3630 | | $recipientFeesBaseAfter1[$activeLegIndex] 3631 | | ) = sfpm.getAccountFeesBase( 3632 | | address(pool), 3633 | | randUser, 3634 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 3635 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(), 3636 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper() 3637 | | ); 3638 | | } 3639 | | 3640 | | { 3641 | | // store account liquidity before sender (should not be 0 ~) 3642 | | accountLiquiditiesSenderAfter[$activeLegIndex] = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 3643 | | address(pool), 3644 | | $activeUser, 3645 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 3646 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(), 3647 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper() 3648 | | ); 3649 | | 3650 | | // store account liquidity before recipient (should be 0 ~) 3651 | | accountLiquiditiesRecipientAfter[$activeLegIndex] = sfpm.getAccountLiquidity( 3652 | | address(pool), 3653 | | randUser, 3654 | | $activeTokenId.tokenType($activeLegIndex), 3655 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickLower(), 3656 | | $liquidityChunk[$activeLegIndex].tickUpper() 3657 | | ); 3658 | | } 3659 | | 3660 | | /// checks 3661 | | { 3662 | | // check feesbase after sender == 0 3663 | | assertWithMsg( 3664 | | $senderFeesBaseAfter0[$activeLegIndex] == 0, 3665 | | "non zero fees base 0 of sender" 3666 | | ); 3667 | | assertWithMsg( 3668 | | $senderFeesBaseAfter1[$activeLegIndex] == 0, 3669 | | "non zero fees base 1 of sender" 3670 | | ); 3671 | | 3672 | | // check feesbase after receiver (should be = from feesbase) 3673 | | assertWithMsg( 3674 | | $recipientFeesBaseAfter0[$activeLegIndex] == 3675 | | $senderFeesBaseBefore0[$activeLegIndex], 3676 | | "non zero fees base 0 of sender" 3677 | | ); 3678 | | assertWithMsg( 3679 | | $recipientFeesBaseAfter1[$activeLegIndex] == 3680 | | $senderFeesBaseBefore1[$activeLegIndex], 3681 | | "non zero fees base 1 of sender" 3682 | | ); 3683 | | 3684 | | // check acc liq sender = 0 3685 | | assertWithMsg( 3686 | | LeftRightUnsigned.unwrap(accountLiquiditiesSenderAfter[$activeLegIndex]) == 3687 | | 0, 3688 | | "invalid sender liquidity" 3689 | | ); 3690 | | 3691 | | // check acc liq receiver = acc liq sender 3692 | | assertWithMsg( 3693 | | LeftRightUnsigned.unwrap( 3694 | | accountLiquiditiesRecipientAfter[$activeLegIndex] 3695 | | ) == 3696 | | LeftRightUnsigned.unwrap( 3697 | | accountLiquiditiesSenderBefore[$activeLegIndex] 3698 | | ), 3699 | | "invalid recipient liquidity" 3700 | | ); 3701 | | } 3702 | | 3703 | | { 3704 | | // delete and update record of token ownership 3705 | | tokenBalances[$activeTokenId][randUser] += positionSize; 3706 | | tokenBalances[$activeTokenId][$activeUser] -= positionSize; 3707 | | 3708 | | assertWithMsg( 3709 | | tokenBalances[$activeTokenId][randUser] == 3710 | | tokenBalances[$activeTokenId][randUser], 3711 | | "invalid tracked erc1155 balance recipient" 3712 | | ); 3713 | | assertWithMsg( 3714 | | tokenBalances[$activeTokenId][$activeUser] == 3715 | | tokenBalances[$activeTokenId][$activeUser], 3716 | | "invalid tracked erc1155 balance sender" 3717 | | ); 3718 | | } 3719 | | } 3720 | | 3721 | | assertWithMsg(false, "success"); 3722 | | 3723 | | // inverse 3724 | | assertWithMsg(!$shouldRevertSFPM, "should have reverted"); 3725 | | 3726 | | // transfer should fail if trying to transfer bal > before bal 3727 | | } catch Error(string memory reason) { 3728 | | emit LogString(reason); 3729 | | 3730 | | emit LogBool("should revert ?", $shouldRevertSFPM); 3731 | | 3732 | | assertWithMsg($shouldRevertSFPM, "non-expected revert"); 3733 | | } 3734 | | } 3735 | | 3736 | | // transferFrom with insufficient approval 3737 | | // safeTransferFrom 3738 | | // batchTransferFrom 3739 | | } 3740 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/fuzz/echidna/fuzz-mocks/IUniDeployer.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: UNLICENSED 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.0; 3 | | 4 | | interface IUniDeployer { 5 | | function token0() external returns (address); 6 | | 7 | | function token1() external returns (address); 8 | | 9 | | function pool() external returns (address); 10 | | 11 | | function factory() external returns (address); 12 | | 13 | | function mintToken(bool mintToken1, address recipient, uint256 amt) external; 14 | | } 15 | |

/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/fuzz/echidna/fuzz-mocks/MockERC20.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: UNLICENSED 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.0; 3 | | 4 | | contract MockERC20 { 5 | | event Transfer(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 value); 6 | | event Approval(address indexed owner, address indexed spender, uint256 value); 7 | | 8 | | mapping(address => uint256) public balanceOf; 9 | | mapping(address => mapping(address => uint256)) public allowance; 10 | | 11 | | constructor(uint256 amountToMint) { 12 | | mint(msg.sender, amountToMint); 13 | | } 14 | | 15 | | function mint(address to, uint256 amount) public { 16 | | uint256 balanceNext = balanceOf[to] + amount; 17 | | require(balanceNext >= amount, "overflow balance"); 18 | | balanceOf[to] = balanceNext; 19 | | } 20 | | 21 | | function transfer(address recipient, uint256 amount) external returns (bool) { 22 | | uint256 balanceBefore = balanceOf[msg.sender]; 23 | | require(balanceBefore >= amount, "insufficient balance"); 24 | | balanceOf[msg.sender] = balanceBefore - amount; 25 | | 26 | | uint256 balanceRecipient = balanceOf[recipient]; 27 | | require(balanceRecipient + amount >= balanceRecipient, "recipient balance overflow"); 28 | | balanceOf[recipient] = balanceRecipient + amount; 29 | | 30 | | emit Transfer(msg.sender, recipient, amount); 31 | | return true; 32 | | } 33 | | 34 | | function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) external returns (bool) { 35 | | allowance[msg.sender][spender] = amount; 36 | | emit Approval(msg.sender, spender, amount); 37 | | return true; 38 | | } 39 | | 40 | | function transferFrom( 41 | | address sender, 42 | | address recipient, 43 | | uint256 amount 44 | | ) external returns (bool) { 45 | | uint256 allowanceBefore = allowance[sender][msg.sender]; 46 | | require(allowanceBefore >= amount, "allowance insufficient"); 47 | | 48 | | allowance[sender][msg.sender] = allowanceBefore - amount; 49 | | 50 | | uint256 balanceRecipient = balanceOf[recipient]; 51 | | require(balanceRecipient + amount >= balanceRecipient, "overflow balance recipient"); 52 | | balanceOf[recipient] = balanceRecipient + amount; 53 | | uint256 balanceSender = balanceOf[sender]; 54 | | require(balanceSender >= amount, "underflow balance sender"); 55 | | balanceOf[sender] = balanceSender - amount; 56 | | 57 | | emit Transfer(sender, recipient, amount); 58 | | return true; 59 | | } 60 | | } 61 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/fuzz/echidna/fuzz-mocks/WETH9.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later 2 | | 3 | | pragma solidity >0.8.4; 4 | | 5 | | contract WETH9 { 6 | | string public name = "Wrapped Ether"; 7 | | string public symbol = "WETH"; 8 | | uint8 public decimals = 18; 9 | | 10 | | event Approval(address indexed src, address indexed guy, uint256 wad); 11 | | event Transfer(address indexed src, address indexed dst, uint256 wad); 12 | | event Deposit(address indexed dst, uint256 wad); 13 | | event Withdrawal(address indexed src, uint256 wad); 14 | | 15 | | mapping(address => uint256) public balanceOf; 16 | | mapping(address => mapping(address => uint256)) public allowance; 17 | | 18 | | receive() external payable { 19 | | deposit(); 20 | | } 21 | | 22 | | function deposit() public payable { 23 | | balanceOf[msg.sender] += msg.value; 24 | | emit Deposit(msg.sender, msg.value); 25 | | } 26 | | 27 | | function withdraw(uint256 wad) public { 28 | | require(balanceOf[msg.sender] >= wad, ""); 29 | | balanceOf[msg.sender] -= wad; 30 | | payable(msg.sender).transfer(wad); 31 | | emit Withdrawal(msg.sender, wad); 32 | | } 33 | | 34 | | function totalSupply() public view returns (uint256) { 35 | | return address(this).balance; 36 | | } 37 | | 38 | | function approve(address guy, uint256 wad) public returns (bool) { 39 | | allowance[msg.sender][guy] = wad; 40 | | emit Approval(msg.sender, guy, wad); 41 | | return true; 42 | | } 43 | | 44 | | function transfer(address dst, uint256 wad) public returns (bool) { 45 | | return transferFrom(msg.sender, dst, wad); 46 | | } 47 | | 48 | | function transferFrom(address src, address dst, uint256 wad) public returns (bool) { 49 | | require(balanceOf[src] >= wad, ""); 50 | | 51 | | if (src != msg.sender && allowance[src][msg.sender] != type(uint256).max) { 52 | | require(allowance[src][msg.sender] >= wad, ""); 53 | | allowance[src][msg.sender] -= wad; 54 | | } 55 | | 56 | | balanceOf[src] -= wad; 57 | | balanceOf[dst] += wad; 58 | | 59 | | emit Transfer(src, dst, wad); 60 | | 61 | | return true; 62 | | } 63 | | } 64 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/libraries/CallbackLib.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-2.0-or-later 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.0; 3 | | 4 | | // Interfaces 5 | | import {IUniswapV3Factory} from "univ3-core/interfaces/IUniswapV3Factory.sol"; 6 | | // Libraries 7 | | import {Errors} from "@libraries/Errors.sol"; 8 | | 9 | | /// @title Library for verifying and decoding Uniswap callbacks. 10 | | /// @author Axicon Labs Limited 11 | | /// @notice This library provides functions to verify that a callback came from a canonical Uniswap V3 pool with a claimed set of features. 12 | | library CallbackLib { 13 | | /// @notice Defining characteristics of a Uni V3 pool 14 | | struct PoolFeatures { 15 | | address token0; 16 | | address token1; 17 | | uint24 fee; 18 | | } 19 | | 20 | | /// @notice Data sent by pool in mint/swap callbacks used to validate the pool and send back requisite tokens 21 | | struct CallbackData { 22 | | PoolFeatures poolFeatures; 23 | | address payer; 24 | | } 25 | | 26 | | /// @notice Verifies that a callback came from the canonical Uniswap pool with a claimed set of features. 27 | | /// @param sender The address initiating the callback and claiming to be a Uniswap pool 28 | | /// @param factory The address of the canonical Uniswap V3 factory 29 | | /// @param features The features `sender` claims to contain (tokens and fee) 30 | * | function validateCallback( 31 | | address sender, 32 | | IUniswapV3Factory factory, 33 | | PoolFeatures memory features 34 | | ) internal view { 35 | | // Call getPool on the factory to verify that the sender corresponds to the canonical pool with the claimed features 36 | * | if (factory.getPool(features.token0, features.token1, features.fee) != sender) 37 | * | revert Errors.InvalidUniswapCallback(); 38 | | } 39 | | } 40 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/libraries/Constants.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-2.0-or-later 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.0; 3 | | 4 | | /// @title Library of Constants used in Panoptic. 5 | | /// @author Axicon Labs Limited 6 | | /// @notice This library provides constants used in Panoptic. 7 | | library Constants { 8 | | /// @notice Fixed point multiplier: 2**96 9 | | uint256 internal constant FP96 = 0x1000000000000000000000000; 10 | | 11 | | /// @notice Minimum possible price tick in a Uniswap V3 pool 12 | | int24 internal constant MIN_V3POOL_TICK = -887272; 13 | | 14 | | /// @notice Maximum possible price tick in a Uniswap V3 pool 15 | * | int24 internal constant MAX_V3POOL_TICK = 887272; 16 | | 17 | | /// @notice Minimum possible sqrtPriceX96 in a Uniswap V3 pool 18 | * | uint160 internal constant MIN_V3POOL_SQRT_RATIO = 4295128739; 19 | | 20 | | /// @notice Maximum possible sqrtPriceX96 in a Uniswap V3 pool 21 | | uint160 internal constant MAX_V3POOL_SQRT_RATIO = 22 | * | 1461446703485210103287273052203988822378723970342; 23 | | 24 | | /// @notice Parameter that determines which oracle type to use for the "slow" oracle price on non-liquidation solvency checks. 25 | | /// @dev If false, an 8-slot internal median array is used to compute the "slow" oracle price. 26 | | /// @dev This oracle is updated with the last Uniswap observation during `mintOptions` if MEDIAN_PERIOD has elapsed past the last observation. 27 | | /// @dev If true, the "slow" oracle price is instead computed on-the-fly from 8 Uniswap observations (spaced 5 observations apart) irrespective of the frequency of `mintOptions` calls. 28 | | bool internal constant SLOW_ORACLE_UNISWAP_MODE = false; 29 | | 30 | | /// @notice The minimum amount of time, in seconds, permitted between internal TWAP updates. 31 | * | uint256 internal constant MEDIAN_PERIOD = 60; 32 | | 33 | | /// @notice Amount of Uniswap observations to include in the "fast" oracle price. 34 | * | uint256 internal constant FAST_ORACLE_CARDINALITY = 3; 35 | | 36 | | /// @dev Amount of observation indices to skip in between each observation for the "fast" oracle price. 37 | | /// @dev Note that the *minimum* total observation time is determined by the blocktime and may need to be adjusted by chain. 38 | | /// @dev Uniswap observations snapshot the last block's closing price at the first interaction with the pool in a block. 39 | | /// @dev In this case, if there is an interaction every block, the "fast" oracle can consider 3 consecutive block end prices (min=36 seconds on Ethereum). 40 | * | uint256 internal constant FAST_ORACLE_PERIOD = 1; 41 | | 42 | | /// @notice Amount of Uniswap observations to include in the "slow" oracle price (in Uniswap mode). 43 | | uint256 internal constant SLOW_ORACLE_CARDINALITY = 8; 44 | | 45 | | /// @notice Amount of observation indices to skip in between each observation for the "slow" oracle price. 46 | | /// @dev Structured such that the minimum total observation time is 8 minutes on Ethereum (similar to internal median mode). 47 | | uint256 internal constant SLOW_ORACLE_PERIOD = 5; 48 | | } 49 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/libraries/Errors.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-2.0-or-later 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.0; 3 | | 4 | | /// @title Custom Errors library. 5 | | /// @author Axicon Labs Limited 6 | | /// @notice Contains all custom error messages used in Panoptic. 7 | | library Errors { 8 | | /// @notice Casting error 9 | | /// @dev e.g. uint128(uint256(a)) fails 10 | | error CastingError(); 11 | | 12 | | /// @notice CollateralTracker: collateral token has already been initialized 13 | | error CollateralTokenAlreadyInitialized(); 14 | | 15 | | /// @notice CollateralTracker: the amount of shares (or assets) deposited is larger than the maximum permitted 16 | | error DepositTooLarge(); 17 | | 18 | * | /// @notice PanopticPool: the effective liquidity (X32) is greater than min(`MAX_SPREAD`, `USER_PROVIDED_THRESHOLD`) during a long mint or short burn 19 | * | /// @dev Effective liquidity measures how much new liquidity is minted relative to how much is already in the pool 20 | * | error EffectiveLiquidityAboveThreshold(); 21 | | 22 | * | /// @notice CollateralTracker: attempted to withdraw/redeem more than available liquidity, owned shares, or open positions would allow for 23 | * | error ExceedsMaximumRedemption(); 24 | | 25 | * | /// @notice PanopticPool: force exercisee is insolvent - liquidatable accounts are not permitted to open or close positions outside of a liquidation 26 | * | error ExerciseeNotSolvent(); 27 | | 28 | * | /// @notice PanopticPool: the provided list of option positions is incorrect or invalid 29 | * | error InputListFail(); 30 | | 31 | * | /// @notice PanopticFactory: first 20 bytes of provided salt does not match caller address 32 | * | error InvalidSalt(); 33 | | 34 | * | /// @notice Tick is not between `MIN_TICK` and `MAX_TICK` 35 | | error InvalidTick(); 36 | | 37 | | /// @notice The result of a notional value conversion is too small (=0) or too large (>2^128-1) 38 | | error InvalidNotionalValue(); 39 | | 40 | | /// @notice Invalid TokenId parameter detected 41 | | /// @param parameterType poolId=0, ratio=1, tokenType=2, risk_partner=3, strike=4, width=5, two identical strike/width/tokenType chunks=6 42 | | error InvalidTokenIdParameter(uint256 parameterType); 43 | | 44 | * | /// @notice A mint or swap callback was attempted from an address that did not match the canonical Uniswap V3 pool with the claimed features 45 | * | error InvalidUniswapCallback(); 46 | | 47 | * | /// @notice Invalid input in LeftRight library 48 | * | error LeftRightInputError(); 49 | | 50 | * | /// @notice PanopticPool: one of the legs in a position are force-exercisable (they are all either short or ITM long) 51 | * | error NoLegsExercisable(); 52 | | 53 | * | /// @notice PanopticPool: the account is not solvent enough to perform the desired action 54 | | error AccountInsolvent(); 55 | | 56 | * | /// @notice SFPM: maximum token amounts for a position exceed 128 bits 57 | | error PositionTooLarge(); 58 | | 59 | * | /// @notice PanopticPool: the leg is not long, so the premium cannot be settled through `settleLongPremium` 60 | | error NotALongLeg(); 61 | | 62 | * | /// @notice PanopticPool: there is not enough avaiable liquidity to buy an option 63 | * | error NotEnoughLiquidity(); 64 | | 65 | * | /// @notice PanopticPool: position is still solvent and cannot be liquidated 66 | * | error NotMarginCalled(); 67 | | 68 | * | /// @notice CollateralTracker: the caller for a permissioned function is not the Panoptic Pool 69 | | error NotPanopticPool(); 70 | | 71 | | /// @notice Minting and burning in the SFPM must operate on >0 contracts 72 | | error OptionsBalanceZero(); 73 | | 74 | | /// @notice Uniswap pool has already been initialized in the SFPM or created in the factory 75 | | error PoolAlreadyInitialized(); 76 | | 77 | | /// @notice PanopticPool: Option position already minted 78 | | error PositionAlreadyMinted(); 79 | | 80 | | /// @notice CollateralTracker: The user has open/active option positions, so they cannot transfer collateral shares 81 | | error PositionCountNotZero(); 82 | | 83 | | /// @notice The current tick in the pool falls outside a user-defined open interval slippage range 84 | | error PriceBoundFail(); 85 | | 86 | | /// @notice SFPM: function has been called while reentrancy lock is active 87 | | error ReentrantCall(); 88 | | 89 | | /// @notice An oracle price is too far away from another oracle price or the current tick 90 | | /// This is a safeguard against price manipulation during option mints, burns, and liquidations 91 | | error StaleTWAP(); 92 | | 93 | | /// @notice PanopticPool: too many positions open (above limit per account) 94 | | error TooManyPositionsOpen(); 95 | | 96 | | /// @notice ERC20 or SFPM token transfer did not complete successfully 97 | | error TransferFailed(); 98 | | 99 | | /// @notice The tick range given by the strike price and width is invalid 100 | | /// because the upper and lower ticks are not multiples of `tickSpacing` 101 | | error TicksNotInitializable(); 102 | | 103 | | /// @notice An operation in a library has failed due to an underflow or overflow 104 | | error UnderOverFlow(); 105 | | 106 | | /// @notice The Uniswap Pool has not been created, so it cannot be used in the SFPM or factory 107 | | error UniswapPoolNotInitialized(); 108 | | 109 | | /// @notice SFPM: Mints/burns of 0-liquidity chunks in Uniswap are not supported 110 | | error ZeroLiquidity(); 111 | | } 112 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/libraries/FeesCalc.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.0; 3 | | 4 | | // Interfaces 5 | | import {IUniswapV3Pool} from "univ3-core/interfaces/IUniswapV3Pool.sol"; 6 | | // Libraries 7 | | import {Math} from "@libraries/Math.sol"; 8 | | import {PanopticMath} from "@libraries/PanopticMath.sol"; 9 | | // Custom types 10 | | import {LeftRightUnsigned, LeftRightSigned} from "@types/LeftRight.sol"; 11 | | import {LiquidityChunk} from "@types/LiquidityChunk.sol"; 12 | | import {TokenId} from "@types/TokenId.sol"; 13 | | 14 | | /// @title Library for Fee Calculations. 15 | | /// @author Axicon Labs Limited 16 | | /// @notice Compute fees accumulated within option position legs (a leg is a liquidity chunk). 17 | | /// @dev Some options positions involve moving liquidity chunks to the AMM/Uniswap. Those chunks can then earn AMM swap fees. 18 | | // 19 | | // When price tick moves within 20 | | // this liquidity chunk == an option leg within a `tokenId` option position: 21 | | // Fees accumulate. 22 | | // ◄────────────► 23 | | // liquidity ┌───┼────────┐ 24 | | // ▲ │ │ │ 25 | | // │ │ : ◄──────Liquidity chunk 26 | | // │ │ │ │ (an option position leg) 27 | | // │ ┌─┴───┼────────┴─┐ 28 | | // │ │ │ │ 29 | | // │ │ : │ 30 | | // │ │ │ │ 31 | | // │ │ : │ 32 | | // │ │ │ │ 33 | | // └───┴─────┴──────────┴────► price 34 | | // ▲ 35 | | // │ 36 | | // Current price tick 37 | | // of the AMM 38 | | // 39 | | library FeesCalc { 40 | | /// @notice Calculate NAV of user's option portfolio at a given tick. 41 | | /// @param atTick The tick to calculate the value at 42 | | /// @param userBalance The position balance array for the user (left=tokenId, right=positionSize) 43 | | /// @param positionIdList A list of all positions the user holds on that pool 44 | | /// @return value0 The amount of token0 owned by portfolio 45 | | /// @return value1 The amount of token1 owned by portfolio 46 | | function getPortfolioValue( 47 | | int24 atTick, 48 | | mapping(TokenId tokenId => LeftRightUnsigned balance) storage userBalance, 49 | | TokenId[] calldata positionIdList 50 | | ) external view returns (int256 value0, int256 value1) { 51 | | for (uint256 k = 0; k < positionIdList.length; ) { 52 | | TokenId tokenId = positionIdList[k]; 53 | | uint128 positionSize = userBalance[tokenId].rightSlot(); 54 | | uint256 numLegs = tokenId.countLegs(); 55 | | for (uint256 leg = 0; leg < numLegs; ) { 56 | | LiquidityChunk liquidityChunk = PanopticMath.getLiquidityChunk( 57 | | tokenId, 58 | | leg, 59 | | positionSize 60 | | ); 61 | | 62 | | (uint256 amount0, uint256 amount1) = Math.getAmountsForLiquidity( 63 | | atTick, 64 | | liquidityChunk 65 | | ); 66 | | 67 | | if (tokenId.isLong(leg) == 0) { 68 | | unchecked { 69 | | value0 += int256(amount0); 70 | | value1 += int256(amount1); 71 | | } 72 | | } else { 73 | | unchecked { 74 | | value0 -= int256(amount0); 75 | | value1 -= int256(amount1); 76 | | } 77 | | } 78 | | 79 | | unchecked { 80 | | ++leg; 81 | | } 82 | | } 83 | | unchecked { 84 | | ++k; 85 | | } 86 | | } 87 | | } 88 | | 89 | | /// @notice Calculate the AMM Swap/trading fees for a `liquidityChunk` of each token. 90 | | /// @dev Read from the uniswap pool and compute the accumulated fees from swapping activity. 91 | | /// @param univ3pool The AMM/Uniswap pool where fees are collected from 92 | | /// @param currentTick The current price tick 93 | | /// @param tickLower The lower tick of the chunk to calculate fees for 94 | | /// @param tickUpper The upper tick of the chunk to calculate fees for 95 | | /// @param liquidity The liquidity amount of the chunk to calculate fees for 96 | | /// @return The fees collected from the AMM for each token (LeftRight-packed) with token0 in the right slot and token1 in the left slot 97 | | function calculateAMMSwapFees( 98 | | IUniswapV3Pool univ3pool, 99 | | int24 currentTick, 100 | | int24 tickLower, 101 | | int24 tickUpper, 102 | | uint128 liquidity 103 | | ) public view returns (LeftRightSigned) { 104 | | // extract the amount of AMM fees collected within the liquidity chunk` 105 | | // NOTE: the fee variables are *per unit of liquidity*; so more "rate" variables 106 | | ( 107 | | uint256 ammFeesPerLiqToken0X128, 108 | | uint256 ammFeesPerLiqToken1X128 109 | | ) = _getAMMSwapFeesPerLiquidityCollected(univ3pool, currentTick, tickLower, tickUpper); 110 | | 111 | | // Use the fee growth (rate) variable to compute the absolute fees accumulated within the chunk: 112 | | // ammFeesToken0X128 * liquidity / (2**128) 113 | | // to store the (absolute) fees as int128: 114 | | return 115 | | LeftRightSigned 116 | | .wrap(0) 117 | | .toRightSlot(int128(int256(Math.mulDiv128(ammFeesPerLiqToken0X128, liquidity)))) 118 | | .toLeftSlot(int128(int256(Math.mulDiv128(ammFeesPerLiqToken1X128, liquidity)))); 119 | | } 120 | | 121 | | /// @notice Calculates the fee growth that has occurred (per unit of liquidity) in the AMM/Uniswap for an 122 | | /// option position's tick range. 123 | | /// @dev Extracts the feeGrowth from the uniswap v3 pool. 124 | | /// @param univ3pool The AMM pool where the leg is deployed 125 | | /// @param currentTick The current price tick in the AMM 126 | | /// @param tickLower The lower tick of the option position leg (a liquidity chunk) 127 | | /// @param tickUpper The upper tick of the option position leg (a liquidity chunk) 128 | | /// @return feeGrowthInside0X128 The fee growth in the AMM of token0 129 | | /// @return feeGrowthInside1X128 The fee growth in the AMM of token1 130 | | function _getAMMSwapFeesPerLiquidityCollected( 131 | | IUniswapV3Pool univ3pool, 132 | | int24 currentTick, 133 | | int24 tickLower, 134 | | int24 tickUpper 135 | | ) internal view returns (uint256 feeGrowthInside0X128, uint256 feeGrowthInside1X128) { 136 | | // Get feesGrowths from the option position's lower+upper ticks 137 | | // lowerOut0: For token0: fee growth per unit of liquidity on the _other_ side of tickLower (relative to currentTick) 138 | | // only has relative meaning, not absolute — the value depends on when the tick is initialized 139 | | // (...) 140 | | // upperOut1: For token1: fee growth on the _other_ side of tickUpper (again: relative to currentTick) 141 | | // the point is: the range covered by lowerOut0 changes depending on where currentTick is. 142 | | (, , uint256 lowerOut0, uint256 lowerOut1, , , , ) = univ3pool.ticks(tickLower); 143 | | (, , uint256 upperOut0, uint256 upperOut1, , , , ) = univ3pool.ticks(tickUpper); 144 | | 145 | | // compute the effective feeGrowth, depending on whether price is above/below/within range 146 | | unchecked { 147 | | if (currentTick < tickLower) { 148 | | /** 149 | | Diagrams shown for token0, and applies for token1 the same 150 | | L = lowerTick, U = upperTick 151 | | 152 | | liquidity lowerOut0 (all fees collected in this price tick range for token0) 153 | | ▲ ◄──────────────^v───► (to MAX_TICK) 154 | | │ 155 | | │ upperOut0 156 | | │ ◄─────^v───► 157 | | │ ┌────────┐ 158 | | │ │ chunk │ 159 | | │ │ │ 160 | | └─────▲─────┴────────┴────────► price tick 161 | | │ L U 162 | | │ 163 | | current 164 | | tick 165 | | */ 166 | | feeGrowthInside0X128 = lowerOut0 - upperOut0; // fee growth inside the chunk 167 | | feeGrowthInside1X128 = lowerOut1 - upperOut1; 168 | | } else if (currentTick >= tickUpper) { 169 | | /** 170 | | liquidity 171 | | ▲ upperOut0 172 | | │◄─^v─────────────────────► 173 | | │ 174 | | │ lowerOut0 ┌────────┐ 175 | | │◄─^v───────────►│ chunk │ 176 | | │ │ │ 177 | | └────────────────┴────────┴─▲─────► price tick 178 | | L U │ 179 | | │ 180 | | current 181 | | tick 182 | | */ 183 | | feeGrowthInside0X128 = upperOut0 - lowerOut0; 184 | | feeGrowthInside1X128 = upperOut1 - lowerOut1; 185 | | } else { 186 | | /** 187 | | current AMM tick is within the option position range (within the chunk) 188 | | 189 | | liquidity 190 | | ▲ feeGrowthGlobal0X128 = global fee growth 191 | | │ = (all fees collected for the entire price range for token 0) 192 | | │ 193 | | │ 194 | | │ lowerOut0 ┌──────────────┐ upperOut0 195 | | │◄─^v───────────►│ │◄─────^v───► 196 | | │ │ chunk │ 197 | | │ │ │ 198 | | └────────────────┴───────▲──────┴─────► price tick 199 | | L │ U 200 | | │ 201 | | current 202 | | tick 203 | | */ 204 | | feeGrowthInside0X128 = univ3pool.feeGrowthGlobal0X128() - lowerOut0 - upperOut0; 205 | | feeGrowthInside1X128 = univ3pool.feeGrowthGlobal1X128() - lowerOut1 - upperOut1; 206 | | } 207 | | } 208 | | } 209 | | } 210 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/libraries/InteractionHelper.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.0; 3 | | 4 | | // Interfaces 5 | | import {CollateralTracker} from "@contracts/CollateralTracker.sol"; 6 | | import {IERC20Metadata} from "@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/extensions/IERC20Metadata.sol"; 7 | * | import {IERC20Partial} from "@tokens/interfaces/IERC20Partial.sol"; 8 | | import {SemiFungiblePositionManager} from "@contracts/SemiFungiblePositionManager.sol"; 9 | | // Libraries 10 | | import {PanopticMath} from "@libraries/PanopticMath.sol"; 11 | | 12 | | /// @title InteractionHelper - contains helper functions for external interactions such as approvals. 13 | | /// @notice Used to delegate logic with multiple external calls. 14 | | /// @dev Generally employed when there is a need to save or reuse bytecode size 15 | | /// on a core contract (calls take a significant amount of logic). 16 | | /// @author Axicon Labs Limited 17 | | library InteractionHelper { 18 | | /// @notice Function that performs approvals on behalf of the PanopticPool for CollateralTracker and SemiFungiblePositionManager. 19 | | /// @param sfpm The SemiFungiblePositionManager being approved for both token0 and token1 20 | | /// @param ct0 The CollateralTracker (token0) being approved for token0 21 | | /// @param ct1 The CollateralTracker (token1) being approved for token1 22 | | /// @param token0 The token0 (in Uniswap) being approved for 23 | | /// @param token1 The token1 (in Uniswap) being approved for 24 | | function doApprovals( 25 | | SemiFungiblePositionManager sfpm, 26 | | CollateralTracker ct0, 27 | | CollateralTracker ct1, 28 | | address token0, 29 | | address token1 30 | | ) external { 31 | | // Approve transfers of Panoptic Pool funds by SFPM 32 | | IERC20Partial(token0).approve(address(sfpm), type(uint256).max); 33 | | IERC20Partial(token1).approve(address(sfpm), type(uint256).max); 34 | | 35 | | // Approve transfers of Panoptic Pool funds by Collateral token 36 | | IERC20Partial(token0).approve(address(ct0), type(uint256).max); 37 | | IERC20Partial(token1).approve(address(ct1), type(uint256).max); 38 | | } 39 | | 40 | | /// @notice Computes the name of a CollateralTracker based on the token composition and fee of the underlying Uniswap Pool. 41 | | /// @dev Some tokens do not have proper symbols so error handling is required - this logic takes up significant bytecode size, which is why it is in a library. 42 | | /// @param token0 The token0 in the Uniswap Pool 43 | | /// @param token1 The token1 in the Uniswap Pool 44 | | /// @param isToken0 Whether the collateral token computing the name is for token0 or token1 45 | | /// @param fee The fee of the Uniswap pool in hundredths of basis points 46 | | /// @param prefix A constant string appended to the start of the token name 47 | | /// @return The complete name of the collateral token calling this function 48 | | function computeName( 49 | | address token0, 50 | | address token1, 51 | | bool isToken0, 52 | | uint24 fee, 53 | | string memory prefix 54 | | ) external view returns (string memory) { 55 | | string memory symbol0 = PanopticMath.safeERC20Symbol(token0); 56 | | string memory symbol1 = PanopticMath.safeERC20Symbol(token1); 57 | | 58 | | unchecked { 59 | | return 60 | | string.concat( 61 | | prefix, 62 | | " ", 63 | | isToken0 ? symbol0 : symbol1, 64 | | " LP on ", 65 | | symbol0, 66 | | "/", 67 | | symbol1, 68 | | " ", 69 | | PanopticMath.uniswapFeeToString(fee) 70 | | ); 71 | | } 72 | | } 73 | | 74 | | /// @notice Returns symbol as prefixed symbol of underlying token. 75 | | /// @param token The address of the underlying token used to compute the symbol 76 | | /// @param prefix A constant string appended to the symbol of the underlying token to create the final symbol 77 | | /// @return The symbol of the token 78 | | function computeSymbol( 79 | | address token, 80 | | string memory prefix 81 | | ) external view returns (string memory) { 82 | | return string.concat(prefix, PanopticMath.safeERC20Symbol(token)); 83 | | } 84 | | 85 | | /// @notice Returns decimals of underlying token (0 if not present). 86 | | /// @param token The address of the underlying token used to compute the decimals 87 | | /// @return The decimals of the token 88 | | function computeDecimals(address token) external view returns (uint8) { 89 | | // not guaranteed that token supports metadada extension 90 | | // so we need to let call fail and return placeholder if not 91 | | try IERC20Metadata(token).decimals() returns (uint8 _decimals) { 92 | | return _decimals; 93 | | } catch { 94 | | return 0; 95 | | } 96 | | } 97 | | } 98 | |
/home/xshadow/panoptic-v1-core-private/contracts/libraries/Math.sol 1 | | // SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-2.0-or-later 2 | | pragma solidity ^0.8.0; 3 | | 4 | | // Libraries 5 | | import {Errors} from "@libraries/Errors.sol"; 6 | | import {Constants} from "@libraries/Constants.sol"; 7 | | // Custom types 8 | | import {LiquidityChunk, LiquidityChunkLibrary} from "@types/LiquidityChunk.sol"; 9 | | 10 | | /// @title Core math library. 11 | | /// @author Axicon Labs Limited 12 | | /// @notice Contains general math helpers and functions 13 | | library Math { 14 | | /// @notice This is equivalent to type(uint256).max — used in assembly blocks as a replacement. 15 | | uint256 internal constant MAX_UINT256 = 2 ** 256 - 1; 16 | | 17 | | /*////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// 18 | | GENERAL MATH HELPERS 19 | * | //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////*/ 20 | | 21 | | /// @notice Compute the min of the incoming int24s `a` and `b`. 22 | * | /// @param a The first number 23 | | /// @param b The second number 24 | | /// @return The min of `a` and `b`: min(a, b), e.g.: min(4, 1) = 1 25 | | function min24(int24 a, int24 b) internal pure returns (int24) { 26 | | return a < b ? a : b; 27 | | } 28 | | 29 | | /// @notice Compute the max of the incoming int24s `a` and `b`. 30 | | /// @param a The first number 31 | | /// @param b The second number 32 | | /// @return The max of `a` and `b`: max(a, b), e.g.: max(4, 1) = 4 33 | * | function max24(int24 a, int24 b) internal pure returns (int24) { 34 | * | return a > b ?
