274 | | } 275 | | // stop if price is within 0.01% (1 tick) of LP 276 | | if ( 277 | | netEquity(pool, account, x1 + 1, positionIdList) >= 0 == 278 | | netEquity(pool, account, x1 - 1, positionIdList) <= 0 279 | | ) { 280 | | return x1; 281 | | } 282 | | } 283 | | } 284 | | 285 | | /// @notice initializes a given leg in a tokenId as a call. 286 | | /// @param tokenId tokenId to edit 287 | | /// @param legIndex index of the leg to edit 288 | | /// @param optionRatio relative size of the leg 289 | | /// @param asset asset of the leg 290 | | /// @param isLong whether the leg is long or short 291 | | /// @param riskPartner defined risk partner of the leg 292 | | /// @param strike strike of the leg 293 | | /// @param width width of the leg 294 | | /// @return tokenId with the leg initialized 295 | | function addCallLeg( 296 | | TokenId tokenId, 297 | | uint256 legIndex, 298 | | uint256 optionRatio, 299 | | uint256 asset, 300 | | uint256 isLong, 301 | | uint256 riskPartner, 302 | | int24 strike, 303 | | int24 width 304 | | ) internal pure returns (TokenId) { 305 | | return 306 | | TokenIdLibrary.addLeg( 307 | | tokenId, 308 | | legIndex, 309 | | optionRatio, 310 | | asset, 311 | | isLong, 312 | | 0, 313 | | riskPartner, 314 | | strike, 315 | | width 316 | | ); 317 | | } 318 | | 319 | | /// @notice initializes a given leg in a tokenId as a put. 320 | | /// @param tokenId tokenId to edit 321 | | /// @param legIndex index of the leg to edit 322 | | /// @param optionRatio relative size of the leg 323 | | /// @param asset asset of the leg 324 | | /// @param isLong whether the leg is long or short 325 | | /// @param riskPartner defined risk partner of the leg 326 | | /// @param strike strike of the leg 327 | | /// @param width width of the leg 328 | | /// @return tokenId with the leg initialized 329 | | function addPutLeg( 330 | | TokenId tokenId, 331 | | uint256 legIndex, 332 | | uint256 optionRatio, 333 | | uint256 asset, 334 | | uint256 isLong, 335 | | uint256 riskPartner, 336 | | int24 strike, 337 | | int24 width 338 | | ) internal pure returns (TokenId) { 339 | | return 340 | | TokenIdLibrary.addLeg( 341 | | tokenId, 342 | | legIndex, 343 | | optionRatio, 344 | | asset, 345 | | isLong, 346 | | 1, 347 | | riskPartner, 348 | | strike, 349 | | width 350 | | ); 351 | | } 352 | | 353 | | /// @notice creates "Classic" strangle using a call and a put, with asymmetric upward risk. 354 | | /// @dev example: createStrangle(uniPoolAddress, 4, 50, -50, 0, 1, 1, 0). 355 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 356 | | /// @param width width of the strangle 357 | | /// @param callStrike strike of the call 358 | | /// @param putStrike strike of the put 359 | | /// @param asset asset of the strangle 360 | | /// @param isLong is the strangle long or short 361 | | /// @param optionRatio relative size of the strangle 362 | | /// @param start leg index where the (2 legs) of the strangle begin (usually 0) 363 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 364 | | function createStrangle( 365 | | address univ3pool, 366 | | int24 width, 367 | | int24 callStrike, 368 | | int24 putStrike, 369 | | uint256 asset, 370 | | uint256 isLong, 371 | | uint256 optionRatio, 372 | | uint256 start 373 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 374 | | // Pool 375 | | tokenId = tokenId.addPoolId(SFPM.getPoolId(univ3pool)); 376 | | 377 | | // A strangle is composed of 378 | | // 1. a call with a higher strike price 379 | | // 2. a put with a lower strike price 380 | | 381 | | // Call w/ higher strike 382 | | tokenId = addCallLeg( 383 | | tokenId, 384 | | start, 385 | | optionRatio, 386 | | asset, 387 | | isLong, 388 | | start + 1, 389 | | callStrike, 390 | | width 391 | | ); 392 | | 393 | | // Put w/ lower strike 394 | | tokenId = addPutLeg( 395 | | tokenId, 396 | | start + 1, 397 | | optionRatio, 398 | | asset, 399 | | isLong, 400 | | start, 401 | | putStrike, 402 | | width 403 | | ); 404 | | } 405 | | 406 | | /// @notice creates "Classic" straddle using a call and a put, with asymmetric upward risk. 407 | | /// @dev createStraddle(uniPoolAddress, 4, 0, 0, 1, 1, 0). 408 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 409 | | /// @param width width of the strangle 410 | | /// @param strike strike of the call and put 411 | | /// @param asset asset of the strangle 412 | | /// @param isLong is the strangle long or short 413 | | /// @param optionRatio relative size of the strangle 414 | | /// @param start leg index where the (2 legs) of the straddle begin (usually 0) 415 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 416 | | function createStraddle( 417 | | address univ3pool, 418 | | int24 width, 419 | | int24 strike, 420 | | uint256 asset, 421 | | uint256 isLong, 422 | | uint256 optionRatio, 423 | | uint256 start 424 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 425 | | // Pool 426 | | tokenId = tokenId.addPoolId(SFPM.getPoolId(univ3pool)); 427 | | 428 | | // A straddle is composed of 429 | | // 1. a call with an identical strike price 430 | | // 2. a put with an identical strike price 431 | | 432 | | // call 433 | | tokenId = addCallLeg(tokenId, start, optionRatio, asset, isLong, start + 1, strike, width); 434 | | 435 | | // put 436 | | tokenId = addPutLeg(tokenId, start + 1, optionRatio, asset, isLong, start, strike, width); 437 | | } 438 | | 439 | | /// @notice creates a call spread with 1 long leg and 1 short leg. 440 | | /// @dev example: createCallSpread(uniPoolAddress, 4, -50, 50, 0, 1, 0). 441 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 442 | | /// @param width width of the spread 443 | | /// @param strikeLong strike of the long leg 444 | | /// @param strikeShort strike of the short leg 445 | | /// @param asset asset of the spread 446 | | /// @param optionRatio relative size of the spread 447 | | /// @param start leg index where the (2 legs) of the spread begin (usually 0) 448 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 449 | * | function createCallSpread( 450 | | address univ3pool, 451 | | int24 width, 452 | | int24 strikeLong, 453 | | int24 strikeShort, 454 | | uint256 asset, 455 | | uint256 optionRatio, 456 | | uint256 start 457 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 458 | | // Pool 459 | | tokenId = tokenId.addPoolId(SFPM.getPoolId(univ3pool)); 460 | | 461 | | // A call spread is composed of 462 | | // 1. a long call with a lower strike price 463 | | // 2. a short call with a higher strike price 464 | | 465 | | // Long call 466 | | tokenId = addCallLeg(tokenId, start, optionRatio, asset, 1, start + 1, strikeLong, width); 467 | | 468 | | // Short call 469 | | tokenId = addCallLeg(tokenId, start + 1, optionRatio, asset, 0, start, strikeShort, width); 470 | | } 471 | | 472 | | /// @notice creates a put spread with 1 long leg and 1 short leg. 473 | | /// @dev example: createPutSpread(uniPoolAddress, 4, -50, 50, 0, 1, 0). 474 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 475 | | /// @param width width of the spread 476 | | /// @param strikeLong strike of the long leg 477 | | /// @param strikeShort strike of the short leg 478 | | /// @param asset asset of the spread 479 | | /// @param optionRatio relative size of the spread 480 | | /// @param start leg index where the (2 legs) of the spread begin (usually 0) 481 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 482 | | function createPutSpread( 483 | | address univ3pool, 484 | | int24 width, 485 | | int24 strikeLong, 486 | | int24 strikeShort, 487 | | uint256 asset, 488 | | uint256 optionRatio, 489 | | uint256 start 490 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 491 | | // Pool 492 | | tokenId = tokenId.addPoolId(SFPM.getPoolId(univ3pool)); 493 | | 494 | | // A put spread is composed of 495 | | // 1. a long put with a higher strike price 496 | | // 2. a short put with a lower strike price 497 | | 498 | | // Long put 499 | | tokenId = addPutLeg(tokenId, start, optionRatio, asset, 1, start + 1, strikeLong, width); 500 | | 501 | | // Short put 502 | | tokenId = addPutLeg(tokenId, start + 1, optionRatio, asset, 0, start, strikeShort, width); 503 | | } 504 | | 505 | | /// @notice creates a diagonal spread with 1 long leg and 1 short leg.abi. 506 | | /// @dev example: createCallDiagonalSpread(uniPoolAddress, 4, 8, -50, 50, 0, 1, 0). 507 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 508 | | /// @param widthLong width of the long leg 509 | | /// @param widthShort width of the short leg 510 | | /// @param strikeLong strike of the long leg 511 | | /// @param strikeShort strike of the short leg 512 | | /// @param asset asset of the spread 513 | | /// @param optionRatio relative size of the spread 514 | | /// @param start leg index where the (2 legs) of the spread begin (usually 0) 515 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 516 | | function createCallDiagonalSpread( 517 | | address univ3pool, 518 | | int24 widthLong, 519 | | int24 widthShort, 520 | | int24 strikeLong, 521 | | int24 strikeShort, 522 | | uint256 asset, 523 | | uint256 optionRatio, 524 | | uint256 start 525 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 526 | | // Pool 527 | | tokenId = tokenId.addPoolId(SFPM.getPoolId(univ3pool)); 528 | | 529 | | // A call diagonal spread is composed of 530 | | // 1. a long call with a (lower/higher) strike price and (lower/higher) width(expiry) 531 | | // 2. a short call with a (higher/lower) strike price and (higher/lower) width(expiry) 532 | | 533 | | // Long call 534 | | tokenId = addCallLeg( 535 | | tokenId, 536 | | start, 537 | | optionRatio, 538 | | asset, 539 | | 1, 540 | | start + 1, 541 | | strikeLong, 542 | | widthLong 543 | | ); 544 | | 545 | | // Short call 546 | | tokenId = addCallLeg( 547 | | tokenId, 548 | | start + 1, 549 | | optionRatio, 550 | | asset, 551 | | 0, 552 | | start, 553 | | strikeShort, 554 | | widthShort 555 | | ); 556 | | } 557 | | 558 | | /// @notice creates a diagonal spread with 1 long leg and 1 short leg. 559 | | /// @dev example: createPutDiagonalSpread(uniPoolAddress, 4, 8, -50, 50, 0, 1, 0). 560 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 561 | | /// @param widthLong width of the long leg 562 | | /// @param widthShort width of the short leg 563 | | /// @param strikeLong strike of the long leg 564 | | /// @param strikeShort strike of the short leg 565 | | /// @param asset asset of the spread 566 | | /// @param optionRatio relative size of the spread 567 | | /// @param start leg index where the (2 legs) of the spread begin (usually 0) 568 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 569 | | function createPutDiagonalSpread( 570 | | address univ3pool, 571 | | int24 widthLong, 572 | | int24 widthShort, 573 | | int24 strikeLong, 574 | | int24 strikeShort, 575 | | uint256 asset, 576 | | uint256 optionRatio, 577 | | uint256 start 578 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 579 | | // Pool 580 | | tokenId = tokenId.addPoolId(SFPM.getPoolId(univ3pool)); 581 | | 582 | | // A bearish diagonal spread is composed of 583 | | // 1. a long put with a (higher/lower) strike price and (lower/higher) width(expiry) 584 | | // 2. a short put with a (lower/higher) strike price and (higher/lower) width(expiry) 585 | | 586 | | // Long put 587 | | tokenId = addPutLeg( 588 | | tokenId, 589 | | start, 590 | | optionRatio, 591 | | asset, 592 | | 1, 593 | | start + 1, 594 | | strikeLong, 595 | | widthLong 596 | | ); 597 | | 598 | | // Short put 599 | | tokenId = addPutLeg( 600 | | tokenId, 601 | | start + 1, 602 | | optionRatio, 603 | | asset, 604 | | 0, 605 | | start, 606 | | strikeShort, 607 | | widthShort 608 | | ); 609 | | } 610 | | 611 | | /// @notice creates a calendar spread with 1 long leg and 1 short leg. 612 | | /// @dev example: createCallCalendarSpread(uniPoolAddress, 4, 8, 0, 0, 1, 0). 613 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 614 | | /// @param widthLong width of the long leg 615 | | /// @param widthShort width of the short leg 616 | | /// @param strike strike of the long and short legs 617 | | /// @param asset asset of the spread 618 | | /// @param optionRatio relative size of the spread 619 | | /// @param start leg index where the (2 legs) of the spread begin (usually 0) 620 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 621 | | function createCallCalendarSpread( 622 | | address univ3pool, 623 | | int24 widthLong, 624 | | int24 widthShort, 625 | | int24 strike, 626 | | uint256 asset, 627 | | uint256 optionRatio, 628 | | uint256 start 629 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 630 | | // calendar spread is a diagonal spread where the legs have identical strike prices 631 | | // so we can create one using the diagonal spread function 632 | | tokenId = createCallDiagonalSpread( 633 | | univ3pool, 634 | | widthLong, 635 | | widthShort, 636 | | strike, 637 | | strike, 638 | | asset, 639 | | optionRatio, 640 | | start 641 | | ); 642 | | } 643 | | 644 | | /// @notice creates a calendar spread with 1 long leg and 1 short leg. 645 | | /// @dev example: createPutCalendarSpread(uniPoolAddress, 4, 8, 0, 0, 1, 0). 646 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 647 | | /// @param widthLong width of the long leg 648 | | /// @param widthShort width of the short leg 649 | | /// @param strike strike of the long and short legs 650 | | /// @param asset asset of the spread 651 | | /// @param optionRatio relative size of the spread 652 | | /// @param start leg index where the (2 legs) of the spread begin (usually 0) 653 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 654 | | function createPutCalendarSpread( 655 | | address univ3pool, 656 | | int24 widthLong, 657 | | int24 widthShort, 658 | | int24 strike, 659 | | uint256 asset, 660 | | uint256 optionRatio, 661 | | uint256 start 662 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 663 | | // calendar spread is a diagonal spread where the legs have identical strike prices 664 | | // so we can create one using the diagonal spread function 665 | | tokenId = createPutDiagonalSpread( 666 | | univ3pool, 667 | | widthLong, 668 | | widthShort, 669 | | strike, 670 | | strike, 671 | | asset, 672 | | optionRatio, 673 | | start 674 | | ); 675 | | } 676 | | 677 | | /// @notice creates iron condor w/ call and put spread. 678 | | /// @dev example: createIronCondor(uniPoolAddress, 4, 50, -50, 50, 0). 679 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 680 | | /// @param width width of the spread 681 | | /// @param callStrike strike of the call spread 682 | | /// @param putStrike strike of the put spread 683 | | /// @param wingWidth width of the wings 684 | | /// @param asset asset of the strategy 685 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 686 | | function createIronCondor( 687 | | address univ3pool, 688 | | int24 width, 689 | | int24 callStrike, 690 | | int24 putStrike, 691 | | int24 wingWidth, 692 | | uint256 asset 693 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 694 | | // an iron condor is composed of 695 | | // 1. a call spread 696 | | // 2. a put spread 697 | | // the "wings" represent how much more OTM the long sides of the spreads are 698 | | 699 | | // call spread 700 | | tokenId = createCallSpread( 701 | | univ3pool, 702 | | width, 703 | | callStrike + wingWidth, 704 | | callStrike, 705 | | asset, 706 | | 1, 707 | | 0 708 | | ); 709 | | 710 | | // put spread 711 | | tokenId = TokenId.wrap( 712 | | TokenId.unwrap(tokenId) + 713 | | TokenId.unwrap( 714 | | createPutSpread( 715 | | address(0), 716 | | width, 717 | | putStrike - wingWidth, 718 | | putStrike, 719 | | asset, 720 | | 1, 721 | | 2 722 | | ) 723 | | ) 724 | | ); 725 | | } 726 | | 727 | | /// @notice creates a jade lizard w/ long call and short asymmetric (traditional) strangle. 728 | | /// @dev example: createJadeLizard(uniPoolAddress, 4, 100, 50, -50, 0). 729 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 730 | | /// @param width width of the spread 731 | | /// @param longCallStrike strike of the long call 732 | | /// @param shortCallStrike strike of the short call 733 | | /// @param shortPutStrike strike of the short put 734 | | /// @param asset asset of the strategy 735 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 736 | | function createJadeLizard( 737 | | address univ3pool, 738 | | int24 width, 739 | | int24 longCallStrike, 740 | | int24 shortCallStrike, 741 | | int24 shortPutStrike, 742 | | uint256 asset 743 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 744 | | // a jade lizard is composed of 745 | | // 1. a short strangle 746 | | // 2. a long call 747 | | 748 | | // short strangle 749 | | tokenId = createStrangle(univ3pool, width, shortCallStrike, shortPutStrike, asset, 0, 1, 1); 750 | | 751 | | // long call 752 | | tokenId = addCallLeg(tokenId, 0, 1, asset, 1, 0, longCallStrike, width); 753 | | } 754 | | 755 | | /// @notice creates a big lizard w/ long call and short asymmetric (traditional) straddle. 756 | | /// @dev example: createBigLizard(uniPoolAddress, 4, 100, 50, 0). 757 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 758 | | /// @param width width of the spread 759 | | /// @param longCallStrike strike of the long call 760 | | /// @param straddleStrike strike of the short straddle 761 | | /// @param asset asset of the strategy 762 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 763 | | function createBigLizard( 764 | | address univ3pool, 765 | | int24 width, 766 | | int24 longCallStrike, 767 | | int24 straddleStrike, 768 | | uint256 asset 769 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 770 | | // a big lizard is composed of 771 | | // 1. a short straddle 772 | | // 2. a long call 773 | | 774 | | // short straddle 775 | | tokenId = createStraddle(univ3pool, width, straddleStrike, asset, 0, 1, 1); 776 | | 777 | | // long call 778 | | tokenId = addCallLeg(tokenId, 0, 1, asset, 1, 0, longCallStrike, width); 779 | | } 780 | | 781 | | /// @notice creates a super bull w/ long call spread and short put. 782 | | /// @dev example: createSuperBull(uniPoolAddress, 4, -50, 50, 50, 0). 783 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 784 | | /// @param width width of the spread 785 | | /// @param longCallStrike strike of the long call 786 | | /// @param shortCallStrike strike of the short call 787 | | /// @param shortPutStrike strike of the short put 788 | | /// @param asset asset of the strategy 789 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 790 | | function createSuperBull( 791 | | address univ3pool, 792 | | int24 width, 793 | | int24 longCallStrike, 794 | | int24 shortCallStrike, 795 | | int24 shortPutStrike, 796 | | uint256 asset 797 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 798 | | // a super bull is composed of 799 | | // 1. a long call spread 800 | | // 2. a short put 801 | | 802 | | // long call spread 803 | | tokenId = createCallSpread(univ3pool, width, longCallStrike, shortCallStrike, asset, 1, 1); 804 | | 805 | | // short put 806 | | tokenId = addPutLeg(tokenId, 0, 1, asset, 0, 0, shortPutStrike, width); 807 | | } 808 | | 809 | | /// @notice creates a super bear w/ long put spread and short call. 810 | | /// @dev example: createSuperBear(uniPoolAddress, 4, 50, -50, -50, 0). 811 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 812 | | /// @param width width of the spread 813 | | /// @param longPutStrike strike of the long put 814 | | /// @param shortPutStrike strike of the short put 815 | | /// @param shortCallStrike strike of the short call 816 | | /// @param asset asset of the strategy 817 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 818 | | function createSuperBear( 819 | | address univ3pool, 820 | | int24 width, 821 | | int24 longPutStrike, 822 | | int24 shortPutStrike, 823 | | int24 shortCallStrike, 824 | | uint256 asset 825 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 826 | | // a super bear is composed of 827 | | // 1. a long put spread 828 | | // 2. a short call 829 | | 830 | | // long put spread 831 | | tokenId = createPutSpread(univ3pool, width, longPutStrike, shortPutStrike, asset, 1, 1); 832 | | 833 | | // short call 834 | | tokenId = addCallLeg(tokenId, 0, 1, asset, 0, 0, shortCallStrike, width); 835 | | } 836 | | 837 | | /// @notice creates a butterfly w/ long call spread and short put spread. 838 | | /// @dev example: createIronButterfly(uniPoolAddress, 4, 0, 50, 0). 839 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 840 | | /// @param width width of the spread 841 | | /// @param strike strike of the long and short legs 842 | | /// @param wingWidth width of the wings 843 | | /// @param asset asset of the strategy 844 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 845 | | function createIronButterfly( 846 | | address univ3pool, 847 | | int24 width, 848 | | int24 strike, 849 | | int24 wingWidth, 850 | | uint256 asset 851 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 852 | | // an iron butterfly is composed of 853 | | // 1. a long call spread 854 | | // 2. a short put spread 855 | | 856 | | // long call spread 857 | | tokenId = createCallSpread(univ3pool, width, strike, strike + wingWidth, asset, 1, 0); 858 | | 859 | | // short put spread 860 | | tokenId = TokenId.wrap( 861 | | TokenId.unwrap(tokenId) + 862 | | TokenId.unwrap( 863 | | createPutSpread(address(0), width, strike, strike - wingWidth, asset, 1, 2) 864 | | ) 865 | | ); 866 | | } 867 | | 868 | | /// @notice creates a ratio spread w/ long call and multiple short calls. 869 | | /// @dev example: createCallRatioSpread(uniPoolAddress, 4, -50, 50, 0, 2, 0). 870 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 871 | | /// @param width width of the spread 872 | | /// @param longStrike strike of the long call 873 | | /// @param shortStrike strike of the short calls 874 | | /// @param asset asset of the strategy 875 | | /// @param ratio ratio of the short calls to the long call 876 | | /// @param start leg index where the (2 legs) of the spread begin (usually 0) 877 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 878 | | 879 | | function createCallRatioSpread( 880 | | address univ3pool, 881 | | int24 width, 882 | | int24 longStrike, 883 | | int24 shortStrike, 884 | | uint256 asset, 885 | | uint256 ratio, 886 | | uint256 start 887 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 888 | | // Pool 889 | | tokenId = tokenId.addPoolId(SFPM.getPoolId(univ3pool)); 890 | | 891 | | // a call ratio spread is composed of 892 | | // 1. a long call 893 | | // 2. multiple short calls 894 | | 895 | | // long call 896 | | tokenId = addCallLeg(tokenId, start, 1, asset, 1, start + 1, longStrike, width); 897 | | 898 | | // short calls 899 | | tokenId = addCallLeg(tokenId, start + 1, ratio, asset, 0, start, shortStrike, width); 900 | | } 901 | | 902 | | /// @notice creates a ratio spread w/ long put and multiple short puts. 903 | | /// @dev example: createPutRatioSpread(uniPoolAddress, 4, -50, 50, 0, 2, 0). 904 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 905 | | /// @param width width of the spread 906 | | /// @param longStrike strike of the long put 907 | | /// @param shortStrike strike of the short puts 908 | | /// @param asset asset of the strategy 909 | | /// @param ratio ratio of the short puts to the long put 910 | | /// @param start leg index where the (2 legs) of the spread begin (usually 0) 911 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 912 | | function createPutRatioSpread( 913 | | address univ3pool, 914 | | int24 width, 915 | | int24 longStrike, 916 | | int24 shortStrike, 917 | | uint256 asset, 918 | | uint256 ratio, 919 | | uint256 start 920 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 921 | | // Pool 922 | | tokenId = tokenId.addPoolId(SFPM.getPoolId(univ3pool)); 923 | | 924 | | // a put ratio spread is composed of 925 | | // 1. a long put 926 | | // 2. multiple short puts 927 | | 928 | | // long put 929 | | tokenId = addPutLeg(tokenId, start, 1, asset, 1, start + 1, longStrike, width); 930 | | 931 | | // short puts 932 | | tokenId = addPutLeg(tokenId, start + 1, ratio, asset, 0, start, shortStrike, width); 933 | | } 934 | | 935 | | /// @notice creates a ZEBRA spread w/ short call and multiple long calls. 936 | | /// @dev example: createCallZEBRASpread(uniPoolAddress, 4, -50, 50, 0, 2, 0). 937 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 938 | | /// @param width width of the spread 939 | | /// @param longStrike strike of the long calls 940 | | /// @param shortStrike strike of the short call 941 | | /// @param asset asset of the strategy 942 | | /// @param ratio ratio of the short call to the long calls 943 | | /// @param start leg index where the (2 legs) of the spread begin (usually 0) 944 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 945 | | function createCallZEBRASpread( 946 | | address univ3pool, 947 | | int24 width, 948 | | int24 longStrike, 949 | | int24 shortStrike, 950 | | uint256 asset, 951 | | uint256 ratio, 952 | | uint256 start 953 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 954 | | // Pool 955 | | tokenId = tokenId.addPoolId(SFPM.getPoolId(univ3pool)); 956 | | 957 | | // a call ZEBRA(zero extrinsic value back ratio spread) spread is composed of 958 | | // 1. a short call 959 | | // 2. multiple long calls 960 | | 961 | | // long put 962 | | tokenId = addCallLeg(tokenId, start, ratio, asset, 1, start + 1, longStrike, width); 963 | | 964 | | // short puts 965 | | tokenId = addCallLeg(tokenId, start + 1, 1, asset, 0, start, shortStrike, width); 966 | | } 967 | | 968 | | /// @notice creates a ZEBRA spread w/ short put and multiple long puts. 969 | | /// @dev example: createPutZEBRASpread(uniPoolAddress, 4, -50, 50, 0, 2, 0). 970 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 971 | | /// @param width width of the spread 972 | | /// @param longStrike strike of the long puts 973 | | /// @param shortStrike strike of the short put 974 | | /// @param asset asset of the strategy 975 | | /// @param ratio ratio of the short put to the long puts 976 | | /// @param start leg index where the (2 legs) of the spread begin (usually 0) 977 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 978 | | function createPutZEBRASpread( 979 | | address univ3pool, 980 | | int24 width, 981 | | int24 longStrike, 982 | | int24 shortStrike, 983 | | uint256 asset, 984 | | uint256 ratio, 985 | | uint256 start 986 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 987 | | // Pool 988 | | tokenId = tokenId.addPoolId(SFPM.getPoolId(univ3pool)); 989 | | 990 | | // a put ZEBRA(zero extrinsic value back ratio spread) spread is composed of 991 | | // 1. a short put 992 | | // 2. multiple long puts 993 | | 994 | | // long puts 995 | | tokenId = addPutLeg(tokenId, start, ratio, asset, 1, start + 1, longStrike, width); 996 | | 997 | | // short put 998 | | tokenId = addPutLeg(tokenId, start + 1, 1, asset, 0, start, shortStrike, width); 999 | | } 1000 | | 1001 | | /// @notice creates a ZEEHBS w/ call and put ZEBRA spreads. 1002 | | /// @dev example: createPutZEBRASpread(uniPoolAddress, 4, -50, 50, 0, 2, 0). 1003 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 1004 | | /// @param width width of the spread 1005 | | /// @param longStrike strike of the long legs 1006 | | /// @param shortStrike strike of the short legs 1007 | | /// @param asset asset of the strategy 1008 | | /// @param ratio ratio of the short legs to the long legs 1009 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 1010 | | function createZEEHBS( 1011 | | address univ3pool, 1012 | | int24 width, 1013 | | int24 longStrike, 1014 | | int24 shortStrike, 1015 | | uint256 asset, 1016 | | uint256 ratio 1017 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 1018 | | // a ZEEHBS(Zero extrinsic hedged back spread) is composed of 1019 | | // 1. a call ZEBRA spread 1020 | | // 2. a put ZEBRA spread 1021 | | 1022 | | // call ZEBRA 1023 | | tokenId = createCallZEBRASpread(univ3pool, width, longStrike, shortStrike, asset, ratio, 0); 1024 | | 1025 | | // put ZEBRA 1026 | | tokenId = TokenId.wrap( 1027 | | TokenId.unwrap(tokenId) + 1028 | | TokenId.unwrap( 1029 | | createPutZEBRASpread( 1030 | | address(0), 1031 | | width, 1032 | | longStrike, 1033 | | shortStrike, 1034 | | asset, 1035 | | ratio, 1036 | | 2 1037 | | ) 1038 | | ) 1039 | | ); 1040 | | } 1041 | | 1042 | | /// @notice creates a BATS (AKA double ratio spread) w/ call and put ratio spreads. 1043 | | /// @dev example: createBATS(uniPoolAddress, 4, -50, 50, 0, 2). 1044 | | /// @param univ3pool address of the pool 1045 | | /// @param width width of the spread 1046 | | /// @param longStrike strike of the long legs 1047 | | /// @param shortStrike strike of the short legs 1048 | | /// @param asset asset of the strategy 1049 | | /// @param ratio ratio of the short legs to the long legs 1050 | | /// @return tokenId the position id with the strategy configured 1051 | | function createBATS( 1052 | | address univ3pool, 1053 | | int24 width, 1054 | | int24 longStrike, 1055 | | int24 shortStrike, 1056 | | uint256 asset, 1057 | | uint256 ratio 1058 | | ) public view returns (TokenId tokenId) { 1059 | | // a BATS(double ratio spread) is composed of 1060 | | // 1. a call ratio spread 1061 | | // 2. a put ratio spread 1062 | | 1063 | | // call ratio spread 1064 | | tokenId = createCallRatioSpread(univ3pool, width, longStrike, shortStrike, asset, ratio, 0); 1065 | | 1066 | | // put ratio spread 1067 | | tokenId = TokenId.wrap( 1068 | | TokenId.unwrap(tokenId) + 1069 | | TokenId.unwrap( 1070 | | createPutRatioSpread( 1071 | | address(0), 1072 | | width, 1073 | | longStrike, 1074 | | shortStrike, 1075 | | asset, 1076 | | ratio, 1077 | | 2 1078 | | ) 1079 | | ) 1080 | | ); 1081 | | } 1082 | | } 1083 | |
